title: Credit Dispute Specialist
description:
Zhon Credit is hiring a reliable and detail oriented Credit Dispute Specialist.



We are looking for someone who understands the full credit dispute process and can confidently work with consumer protection frameworks, including FTC and CFPB guidelines. The ideal candidate knows how to prepare, submit, and follow up on disputes with credit bureaus and creditors, ensuring accuracy and compliance at every step.

* Prepare and submit credit disputes on behalf of clients

* Apply FTC and CFPB regulations appropriately

* Track dispute progress and maintain organized records

* Communicate updates clearly and professionally



Requirements:



* Experience with credit repair or dispute processing

* Strong understanding of dispute laws and procedures

* High attention to detail and consistency

* Self-motivated and dependable



Compensation:



* $125 per week



If you are disciplined, organized, and know how to navigate the credit dispute process effectively, we want to hear from you.



Contact Zhon Credit to apply.

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For

title: Ad Creative Specialist
description:
Remote · Philippines · Full-Time

Department: Growth & Performance Marketing   ·   Reports to: Head of Creative and CMO

Yepoda is a fast-growing K-Beauty DTC brand on a mission to make effective skincare accessible and joyful. To win in the current social landscape we need a relentless creative engine — someone who lives and breathes short-form content, understands the Meta and TikTok algorithms, and uses AI tools to ship more, faster.

???? Location

Philippines (Remote) 

???? Hours Full-Time, 40 h/wk ????

 Salary PHP 35,000–55,000/mo 

???? Start ASAP



About the Role

As Yepoda’s Ad Creative Specialist you will be the engine behind our paid social growth. You will produce a high volume of scroll-stopping ads for Instagram,
, and TikTok every single week. This is a pure execution role — briefs come from the PM and Growth team, and your job is to bring them to life visually and get them out the door fast, using AI tools to multiply your output without sacrificing quality.

You will work closely with the Growth and PM team, receive clear creative briefs, and be trusted to translate them into platform-native content that stops the scroll. Speed, craft, and reliability are what we need from you.



What You’ll Do

Creative Production (70%)

• Receive creative briefs from the PM and Growth team and translate them into finished ad assets — no guesswork, just great execution.

• Produce 10–15 new ad creatives per week across Instagram Feed, Reels,
 Feed & Stories, and TikTok.

• Design static and motion graphics using Canva, Adobe Express, CapCut, or equivalent tools.

• Edit UGC and brand video footage into polished, platform-native short-form ads (15–60 sec).

• Use AI tools (e.g. Runway, Pika, ElevenLabs, Midjourney) to accelerate production and build creative variations fast.

• Build iterative creative variations from each brief to enable systematic A/B testing.

• Maintain organised asset libraries and a weekly delivery schedule with zero missed deadlines.



Performance & Iteration (20%)

• Review weekly ad performance reports shared by the Growth team and flag creative fatigue early.

• Suggest fresh visual or format angles when a creative is losing steam — the strategic direction stays with the PM team, but your production instincts matter.

• Maintain a structured delivery and testing log so the team always knows what is live, what is in production, and what has been retired.

• Stay ahead of trending audio, formats, and visual styles on TikTok and Instagram Reels and surface relevant opportunities to the team.



Collaboration & Process (10%)

• Join a weekly creative briefing call with the PM and Growth team to receive and clarify upcoming briefs.

• Ask smart questions when a brief is unclear — better to align upfront than to redo work.

• Provide clear ETAs and flag blockers early — proactive communication is essential.

• Help maintain Yepoda’s visual brand guidelines for paid social as the library grows.



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

• 2+ years experience producing paid social ad creatives (Meta and/or TikTok) — ideally for a DTC or e-commerce brand.

• Proficient in video editing: CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent.

• Strong graphic design skills: Canva Pro, Figma, or Adobe Express.

• Ability to read a brief and translate it faithfully into compelling visuals — you execute the creative vision, not define it.

• Hands-on experience with at least 2–3 AI creative tools (e.g. Runway, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, Pika).

• A fast, self-directed working style — you manage your own queue and hit deadlines consistently.

• Portfolio or examples of paid social ads you have created (required to apply).



Nice-to-Have

• Experience in beauty, skincare, or wellness brands.

• On-camera confidence or willingness to appear in UGC-style content.

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager or TikTok Ads Manager (understanding of creative formats, aspect ratios, specs).

• Knowledge of K-Beauty trends and aesthetics.

• Basic motion graphics or After Effects skills.



Tools You’ll Use

Category Tools

Video Editing CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve

Design Canva Pro, Figma, Adobe Express

AI — Video Runway, Pika Labs, Kling

AI — Image Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, DALL·E

AI — Copy / Voice ChatGPT, Claude, ElevenLabs

Project Management Notion, Slack, Google Drive



What We Offer

• Competitive salary: PHP 35,000–55,000/month depending on experience.

• Fully remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines.

• 13th month pay and statutory Philippine benefits (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG).

• Budget for AI tool subscriptions and creative software.

• Generous product allowance — you’ll always have the latest Yepoda skincare.

• A lean, fast-moving team that values your output and gives you real ownership.

• Direct exposure to performance data so you can see the impact of your work.

title: Phone Specialist (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a confident and professional Phone Support Specialist to join our team. This role will initially focus on handling incoming calls and guest inquiries, with the opportunity to transition into a full-time Virtual Assistant role as you grow with the company.



This is a great opportunity for someone with strong English communication skills who wants long-term remote work and career growth.



Initial Responsibilities (Phone Support Focus):

- Answer incoming guest and customer calls professionally

- Handle general inquiries regarding reservations, stays, and services

- Collect caller details accurately (name, reservation info, concern)

- Pass concerns to the internal team for follow-up

- Inform callers that updates will be sent via
 or messaging system

- Maintain a calm, friendly, and professional tone at all times

- Future Growth Opportunity (Full-Time VA Role):



Successful candidates may transition into a broader Virtual Assistant role, including:



- Guest messaging support

- Reservation management

- Calendar coordination

- Admin tasks

- Team support and operations assistance

- Requirements:

- Excellent spoken English

- Clear and professional phone manner

- Strong listening and note-taking skills

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

- Customer service mindset

- Able to stay calm under pressure

- Previous call center, customer support, or VA experience is a plus



Application Requirements:



1. Audio Recording

Please read the script below clearly and professionally:



"Hello, thank you for calling. My name is [Your Name], and I’d be happy to assist you today. May I please have your full name, reservation details, and a brief summary of your concern? Thank you. I will forward this information to our team, and we will get back to you via
 as soon as possible."



2. Video Recording

Please answer these customer service scenarios on video:



A guest is upset because no one replied to their message. How would you handle the call?

A caller is demanding immediate assistance, but you need to collect details first. What would you say?

A guest is frustrated and speaking quickly. How would you calm the situation?

A customer asks for something you cannot confirm on the call. How would you respond?

A rude caller refuses to give details but wants help immediately. What would you do?



Per call (initial role)

Full-time compensation to be discussed upon transition to VA role.



If you have excellent communication skills and want to grow into a long-term Virtual Assistant position, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Inside Sales Agent - (PUUR Health and Wellness)
description:
Inside Sales Agent (ISA) —PUUR Health and Wellness | Base + Commission | Long-Term Role with Team Lead Path



We are Precision Scaling, a sales operations company that builds and runs inside sales teams for US-based clinics, coaches, and high-ticket service businesses. We're hiring our first dedicated Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to call leads and book appointments for a US-based wellness and aesthetic clinic in Texas.



This is a long-term role with a clear management path — the right person will become the ISA Team Lead as we onboard more clinics and build out an ISA team underneath them.



What You'll Be Doing:

Calling warm leads who filled out a form on the clinic's website

Re-engaging old/unconverted leads from the clinic's CRM (extensive follow-up — this is where most of the money is made)

Running short discovery conversations to understand what treatment fits the lead

Booking leads into the clinic for a consultation OR a treatment (IV drips, aesthetic services, wellness packages)

Taking payment over the phone where appropriate, OR directing the lead to pay at the clinic

Logging every call, outcome, and follow-up in GoHighLevel (our CRM + dialer — provided)

Submitting a short End-of-Day (EOD) report

Treatments range from $200 single sessions to multi-session packages worth a few thousand dollars. Familiarity with wellness, aesthetic, IV therapy, or med spa industries is a major plus.



Daily Volume

Around 100-200 dials per day plus follow-ups. Most leads are warm or previously interested — this is not a hard cold-calling grind.



Schedule

Core hours: 9 AM – 5 PM US Eastern Time (which is 9 PM – 5 AM Philippine Time — please only apply if you are committed to working US hours)

Flexibility: You can work as early as 8 AM ET or as late as 8 PM ET

Weekends encouraged: Saturday and Sunday afternoons (US time) are when many leads actually answer the phone — and where commissions can be easiest to earn



Because most of your income is commission-based, you have full freedom to find the hours that book the most appointments



Compensation

Base: $50/week ($200/month) — paid weekly

Commission: 4% of all cash collected from your booked appointments and sales

Realistic earnings: $600–$800+ per month at expected performance

Top performer: Promotion to ISA Team Lead with override commissions on the team you will help build and train



Requirements

Clear, confident spoken English with a neutral or American-friendly accent — non-negotiable. You will be on the phone with US patients all day.

At least 6 months of phone sales, appointment setting, or ISA experience

Bonus: Experience with medical, wellness, aesthetic, med spa, IV therapy, or healthcare clients

Working laptop or desktop computer

Reliable internet (minimum 25 Mbps recommended)

Headset with microphone (or a clear built-in mic — no echo, no background noise)

Quiet, professional work environment

Available for weekly Zoom team meetings and onboarding sessions



What We Provide

GoHighLevel CRM and dialer access (you don't pay for any of this)

US phone numbers (provided)

Scripts, objection-handling frameworks, and recorded calls to learn from

Fast 2–3 day onboarding before you go live on calls

Access to AI tools (Claude, etc.) to help you research leads and refine your pitch

Direct mentorship from Precision Scaling leadership



Growth Path

This is the first ISA hire on a team we are actively building. As we sign more clinics, we'll need more ISAs — and the person hired today will be first in line to become Team Lead, training new hires and earning override commissions. If you are competent, hungry, and reliable, this role can become a five-figure-per-year management position within 6–12 months.



How to Apply (Read Carefully — Most Applicants Will Be Filtered Out Here)

Your application MUST include all three of the following or it will not be reviewed:

1. Subject Line Keyword Start the subject line of your application with: PRECISION-DIAL Applications without this exact keyword will be deleted unread.

2. A 1-2 minute Voice Recording Upload to Google Drive, Vocaroo, or any free file host and paste the link. Record yourself doing this mock call:



you are calling Sarah, a lead who filled out a form on a wellness clinic's website 3 months ago asking about IV drip therapy. She never booked an appointment. You are calling her now. Open the call, build rapport, and try to book her into the clinic. Speak naturally as if you're actually on the call.



We are listening for: clear English, sales instincts, warmth, ability to lead a conversation.

3. A Short Written Paragraph (5–7 sentences) Cover:

Your relevant sales experience — be specific (what did you sell, what was your closing rate, what tools did you use)

Why this role specifically interests you

Your typical availability in US Eastern Time

Applications that look copy-pasted, generic, or AI-written will be ignored. We are hiring one excellent person, not screening a hundred mediocre ones.

title: Sales Lead - Social Media Partnerships - Hourly + Commission

mber to grow revenue across our creator roster. You'll be the primary driver of brand deal flow: sourcing, pitching, structuring, and closing social media campaigns for our talent network.

, DMs, and agency relationships

title: Operations Associate - Revenue
description:
We are seeking a sharp, organized, and finance-savvy Revenue Operations Associate to support our growing business. This Philippines-based role will work directly with US-based leaders to keep our revenue engine running smoothly — owning day-to-day billing, AR, and finance operations work, running revenue operations QA, building and maintaining automations, and flexing into executive administrative support and broader operational initiatives as needed.



The ideal candidate has prior hands-on experience in billing, finance, or accounting, is methodical about catching errors before they ship, enjoys building lightweight automations to eliminate manual work, communicates clearly and professionally in writing and on calls, and is comfortable representing the company directly to finance and billing contacts at customer and vendor organizations.



- Start Date: Ideally immediately (or within 2 weeks)

- Rate: Competitive, commensurate with experience

- Hours: 40 hours per week

- Timezone: Monday to Friday, aligned with US business hours (PST/EST overlap required)



Key Responsibilities

- Revenue Operations (Primary Responsibility)

- Own day-to-day billing operations: invoice generation, delivery, follow-up, and reconciliation.

- Manage accounts receivable workflows — track outstanding balances, send dunning communications, and proactively follow up on overdue invoices.

- Partner with finance leadership on revenue reporting, customer billing data hygiene, and month-end close support.

- Maintain accurate customer billing records across our CRM, billing platform, and accounting tools.

- Assist with revenue recognition, contract-to-billing handoffs, and ensuring billing terms match signed agreements.

- Support light bookkeeping tasks, expense categorization, and finance system upkeep as needed.



External Finance & Billing Communication

- Serve as a professional point of contact for customer and vendor finance/billing teams.

- Hop on calls with external AP/AR contacts to resolve billing disputes, payment questions, vendor onboarding requirements, or tax/W-9 documentation.

- Send polished, executive-grade written communications on behalf of the Vooma Finance team.

- Manage customer billing inquiries with care and professionalism, escalating complex issues appropriately.



Executive Administrative Support

- Draft and send executive notes, internal updates, and external correspondence on behalf of the CEO.

- Manage inbox triage, calendar coordination, and meeting prep as needed, primarily related to billing but may include additional tasks.

- Organize documents, contracts, and signed agreements in our internal systems.

- Coordinate logistics for executive priorities — from vendor signups to expense workflows.

- May also be tasked with assisting on associated tasks such as commissions QA.



Revenue Operations QA

- Run QA on billing, invoicing, and revenue workflows — catch discrepancies between contracts, CRM data, and what gets invoiced before they reach the customer.

- Audit customer accounts for data integrity issues (mismatched billing terms, missing PO numbers, incorrect contract dates, stale contacts, etc.).

- Spot-check automated billing runs and reconcile outputs against expected results.

- Maintain QA checklists and test cases for recurring revenue processes.

- Surface patterns in errors or near-misses and recommend process or system fixes.



Automations & Systems Work

- Build and maintain automations across our revenue stack — primarily HubSpot, Stripe, and Zapier, plus LedgerUp for billing automation — to reduce manual data entry and handoffs.

- Help maintain and improve our internal revenue and finance systems (HubSpot CRM, Stripe billing, LedgerUp, and supporting accounting tools).

- Identify repetitive workflows that are good candidates for automation and propose solutions.

- Document standard operating procedures (SOPs) for billing, AR, QA, and automation processes.

- Identify recurring issues or bottlenecks and surface them to leadership with proposed solutions.

- Support ad hoc operational projects across the business as priorities shift.



Requirements

- 2+ years of prior experience in billing, finance, accounting, or AR/AP operations is required. This is non-negotiable.

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills — comfortable drafting executive-quality
s and notes.

- Confidence and professionalism on live calls with finance and billing contacts at other companies.

- Demonstrated attention to detail, especially with numbers, dates, contract terms, and reconciliation.

- Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision.

- Strong judgment about when to act independently vs. when to escalate.

- Comfort with US business hours and direct collaboration with US-based personnel.

- Hands-on experience with our core revenue stack — HubSpot, Stripe, and Zapier — is strongly preferred.





Preferred Skills

- Background supporting a US-based startup or high-growth company.

- Experience working directly with founders, CEOs, or other senior executives.

- Familiarity with revenue operations workflows (lead-to-cash, contracts, renewals).

- Comfort with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) for drafting and productivity.

- Light spreadsheet modeling skills (formulas, pivot tables, basic financial analysis).

- Exposure to QA testing, process automation, or systems integration work.





Training and Expectations

- Training and playbooks will be provided for our tools and systems.

- We expect fast learners who can quickly adapt, work efficiently with minimal supervision, communicate clearly, and know when to escalate.

- Strong emphasis on accuracy, discretion, and professionalism — this role handles sensitive financial and executive information.





Application Instructions

- To confirm you've read the entire job description, please respond with the subject line "Ready For Vooma RevOps".



Be sure to include the following in your application:

- Resume

- A short note (3–5 sentences) describing your prior billing, finance, or accounting experience

- Photo of your work area

title: Amazon FBA Virtual Assistant — Online Arbitrage Product Sourcing
description:
I run a growing Amazon FBA business focused on Online Arbitrage (OA). My store is new and I am looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help me find profitable products to sell daily and grow together from the ground up.



I am serious about this business and looking for someone who wants a long-term position with real earning potential as the store grows.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

- Search for profitable OA leads every day using Keepa and RevSeller

- Analyze BSR, competition, number of sellers, and profit margin for each product

- Check for IP complaint risks and brand restrictions

- Record every lead in a shared Google Sheet with complete information (ASIN, buy price, sell price, FBA fee, ROI)

- Update lead status as deals progress

- Communicate clearly and promptly via
 or messaging app



REQUIREMENTS:

- Minimum 1 year of real Amazon FBA experience (Online Arbitrage or Wholesale)

- Must know how to use Keepa and RevSeller — these are non-negotiable

- Strong understanding of ROI, FBA fees, Buy Box, and IP risks

- Honest, organized, and self-motivated

- Reliable internet connection and computer

- Available at least 20 hours per week



MINIMUM LEAD QUALITY STANDARDS:

Every lead you submit must meet ALL of the following:

- ROI of 30% or higher after all fees

- BSR of 50,000 or lower

- Amazon must NOT be a seller on the listing

- No IP complaint history

- Product must not be gated on our account



Quality is more important than quantity. Do not send leads that do not meet these standards.



LEAD EXPECTATIONS BY MONTH:

- Month 1 (trial): minimum 5 qualified leads per week

- Month 2 onward: minimum 8 to 10 qualified leads per week



TRIAL PERIOD — IMPORTANT, PLEASE READ:

The first 30 days are a paid trial. During this period I will evaluate the quality and consistency of your leads. If leads do not meet the minimum requirements consistently, the contract will not continue and final payment will only cover work actually completed and verified. I value honesty and clear expectations from day one — this protects both of us.



COMPENSATION:

- $200/month base salary (paid on the 5th)

- 3% commission on net profit from every product YOU sourced that sells (paid on the 15th)

- This is a new store — commissions will be small at first, but as sales grow, so does your income

- Long-term position for the right person



HOW TO APPLY:

Do NOT send a generic application. To be considered, your message must include:

1. One real product you sourced recently — include the ASIN, where you found it, and the ROI

2. Which tools you use daily

3. Your availability (hours per week and timezone)



Applications without these 3 things will not be reviewed.

title: DM Appointment Setter - Premium Coaching - Instagram & LinkedIn
description:
**IF YOU HAVE NO EXPERIENCE AS A DM SETTER FOR A FITNESS OR COACHING BUSINESS ON INSTAGRAM — DO NOT APPLY.



We are looking for an All Star DM appointment setter to join a premium coaching business with over 35,0000 organic followers in the health industry.



This is not your typical DM setter role.

It's your chance to work 1-1 with the founder, sharpen your sales skills, and play a key role in scaling a premium coaching business.

If you're hungry, coachable, and already experienced in DM setting, this could be a massive growth opportunity for you.

Check us out on 



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

— You're hungry to grow as a sales professional

— You take initiative and don't need to be chased

— You're reliable, proactive, and highly accountable

— You genuinely care about fitness, health, and personal development

— You thrive in a performance-driven environment



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

— Engage with qualified leads via Instagram DMs and LinkedIn

— Run warm outreach and outbound conversations daily

— Consistently execute high-volume, high-quality outreach (100+ DMs/day)

— Build relationships and nurture prospects toward booking calls

— Keep the CRM organized and up to date in Notion



REQUIREMENTS

— Proven experience as a DM setter for a fitness or coaching business on Instagram

— Native-level English with natural, conversational written communication

— Ability to work independently and consistently hit daily and weekly KPIs

— Available 6–8 hours per day, 6 days per week

— Able to overlap with UK and US business hours

— Familiarity with CRM systems (Notion experience is a bonus)



DO NOT APPLY IF

— You have no experience DM setting for a fitness or coaching brand

— You rely on AI to write your messages for you

— You give up when things get hard

— You're not willing to put in extra effort to secure more calls



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

— Competitive base salary + commission bonus for every closed deal (Coaching offer ranges from 2-4k per client)

— Strong earning potential for the right fit and overachievers



UNIQUE BENEFITS

— Proven sales training, scripts, and SOPs to rapidly level up your sales skills

— Access to cutting-edge AI tools and systems to help you work smarter & faster

— Direct 1-1 mentorship from the founder with over 7 years experience in the industry

— Growth opportunities to step into a closing or strategy role as you prove yourself

— Fully remote with flexibility, autonomy, and trust



HOW TO APPLY



Applications that miss any step will be ignored.



Title your submission: JOINING THE DREAM TEAM



STEP 1 — RECORD A LOOM VIDEO (30–60 SECONDS)

Answer the following 

— Why are you unique?

— Why would you be a great fit for this role?

— What experience do you have as a DM setter and in sales?



STEP 2 — COMPLETE THE WRITTEN TASK



DM SETTER SIMULATION

Context: Marcus is 31, works at a tech company in New York, and recently 
 Instagram features gym content, travel, and career wins. His latest caption says: "Been slacking on training lately, work's been insane."



Write the following responses:

1. Your opening DM to Marcus (keep it short and personalized)



2. Your follow-up message if he doesn't reply after 24 hours



Hint: Your follow-up should provide some form of value — for example, a helpful insight, resource, or lead magnet.



Both messages should feel natural, personalized, and specific to Marcus.



Generic outreach — or anything that sounds like it was written by ChatGPT — will be ignored.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (B2B – Valet Trash Services)
description:
Job Title:

Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (B2B – Valet Trash Services) – Long-Term Opportunity



**About Us:**

We are a growing U.S.-based company (MT Valet) providing valet trash, junk removal, and dumpster rental services. Our focus is working with apartment communities, property managers, and local businesses.



We are looking for a confident and results-driven cold caller who can generate qualified leads and book appointments.



This is a **long-term opportunity** 



**Your Role:**

You will be calling:



* Apartment complexes

* Property management companies

* Real estate investors

* Local businesses



Your goal is to:



* Start conversations

* Qualify prospects

* Book appointments for our team



You are NOT just reading a script — you should be able to think, adapt, and improve conversations.



**What We’re Looking For:**



* Fluent English (clear and confident speaking)

* Experience in cold calling or sales

* Friendly, persuasive, and confident on the phone

* Able to handle objections and keep conversations going

* Comfortable contributing ideas to improve scripts and results

* Focused on **booking appointments (not just making calls)**



**Work Details:**



* Work during U.S. business hours

* Start part-time, with potential to move to full-time

* Use Google Drive for tracking leads and activity



**Compensation:**



* $2–$5/hour (based on experience)

* Opportunity for long-term role based on performance



What We Offer:



* $2–$5/hour (based on experience and performance)

* Performance-based bonuses for booked appointments

* Paid PH holidays (for long-term team members)

* Hands-on training and ongoing support

* Long-term opportunity with growth potential

* Supportive, respectful, and professional team

* 100% work-from-home flexibility



**IMPORTANT – How to Apply:**

We only want serious applicants. To apply, you MUST include:



1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

2. A **mock cold call recording** (pretend you are calling a property manager to offer valet trash service and try to book an appointment)

3. Your previous cold calling experience

4. Your availability (hours per week)



Applications without these will NOT be considered.



**What Success Looks Like:**



* Consistently booking appointments

* Improving conversations over time

* Helping us generate real business opportunities



Growth Opportunity:

Opportunity to earn additional income through bonuses or commissions based on closed deals





If you’re confident on the phone and ready to help grow a real business, apply now.

title: Virtual Assistant — Platform Operations & Client Support
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support the day-to-day operations of our SaaS platform. You'll be the first line of defense for platform reliability, subscriber communications, and customer support — making sure our tools work, our
s go out on time, and our users feel heard.

This role is perfect for someone who thrives on consistency, takes ownership of recurring tasks, and communicates clearly with both clients and internal teams.



What You'll Do

• Platform Monitoring: Run daily platform health checks (calling, texting,
) and report status to the team.

•
 Operations: Build and schedule our Daily Insider
 each morning using Canva and Flodesk, and finalize the full week's schedule every Friday.

• Customer Support: Respond to incoming tickets in GoHighLevel, resolve standard issues, and log feature requests in Asana with the right priority and context.

• Weekly Reporting: Pull subscriber data from Stripe each week, build a clean report with analysis, and
 it to the team.

• Campaign Checks: Verify drip campaign delivery on the 1st and 15th of every month, and flag any delivery issues immediately.



What We're Looking For

• Prior experience as a VA, support agent, or operations assistant (1+ years preferred).

• Hands-on familiarity with at least some of the following: GoHighLevel, Flodesk, Canva, Stripe, Asana.

• Strong written English — you'll be writing customer replies and internal reports.

• Extremely detail-oriented — you double-check dates, times, and numbers before hitting send.

• Dependable schedule — able to complete daily checks Monday through Friday without prompting.

• Comfortable following SOPs exactly as written, and flagging anything that doesn't match expectations.

Nice to Have

• Experience triaging and categorizing customer feedback into product/feature backlogs.

• Basic understanding of SaaS subscription metrics (MRR, churn, net growth).

• Graphic design comfort in Canva (beyond template editing).



How to Apply

Send us a brief introduction, your relevant experience, and your available hours per week. Bonus points if you mention which of the tools above you've used before and for how long.

title: Content Creator (Instagram)
description:
Why This Role Exists

We are not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to post updates and monitor comments. We need a Content Architect and Growth Operator who understands the mechanics of virality and the leverage of a creator ecosystem.



This role exists to transform our organic social presence into a high-performance acquisition channel. You will bridge the gap between creative storytelling and algorithmic performance, ensuring our Reels, Shorts, and Creator partnerships aren't just "aesthetic"—they are engineered for reach, retention, and revenue. By building a scalable Creator Program, you provide the Founder and Marketing Team with massive leverage, turning our brand into a content powerhouse that operates far beyond the capacity of a traditional internal team.



What You’ll Be Responsible For (Outcomes)

Architect and execute a high-velocity short-form video strategy across Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn. You own the hook, the script, and the retention logic that forces the algorithm to distribute our content.

Design, launch, and scale our Creator Program from the ground up. This includes structuring incentive models, creating "Virality Playbooks," and building the infrastructure to manage a fleet of external voices.

Provide strategic input on high-level assets—including website headlines, campaign visuals, and landing page structures—ensuring a cohesive, conversion-focused narrative across all touchpoints.

Identify emerging cultural and platform trends early and translate them into our B2B niche before they become saturated, maintaining our position as a forward-thinking market leader.

Move beyond vanity metrics. You will analyze watch-time data and drop-off points to relentlessly iterate on formats, doubling down on what drives follower growth and pipeline velocity.

Requirements

What You’ve Done Before

You have a proven track record (and the case studies to prove it) of growing accounts and generating millions of views through strategic short-form video.

You have experience recruiting, onboarding, and managing creators or influencers, moving past one-off posts into long-term performance partnerships.

You are an expert in narrative tension and retention editing. You know how to stop the scroll in the first 1.5 seconds.

You understand how to make professional services "bingeable" without sacrificing brand authority or institutional trust.

Who You Are

You don't wait for a content calendar. You spot a gap in the market, script the solution, and coordinate the production autonomously.

You use metrics to validate your creative intuition, but you understand that "virality" requires a human touch that a spreadsheet can't always predict.

You don't think in "posts"; you think in "franchises." You build repeatable content formats that scale and compound over time.

You are constantly studying platform updates and creator psychology to find the next 1?ge in distribution.

Who This Is NOT for

The "Aesthetic" Curator: If your main focus is on color palettes and grid layouts rather than watch-time and shareability, this is not a fit.

The Task-Follower: If you need a script provided to you to start filming, you will struggle in this high-autonomy role.

The Generalist: If you treat Reels the same way you treat a static LinkedIn post, you won't achieve the scale we are looking for.

What Success Looks Like

Month 1: Comprehensive audit of current social performance; first "Viral Format" pilot launched; Creator Program incentive structure finalized.

Month 3: A consistent 2x–3x lift in organic reach via Reels/Shorts; first cohort of 5–10 creators actively producing content under your guidelines.

Month 6: Organic social is a primary driver of top-of-funnel awareness; our Creator Program is a self-sustaining engine providing a constant stream of high-quality assets for the marketing team.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: Lighting Designer / Lighting Design Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Lighting Designer / Lighting Design Engineer to support our UK-based lighting design team. We are open to candidates with a range of experience, from developing designers with strong CAD skills through to experienced lighting design engineers.



The salary is an auto guideline only from OnlineJobs and we welcome applications from all experience levels and salary expectations



About Us



We are a long-established UK lighting manufacturer with over 100 years of experience in the commercial and domestic lighting industry.



We combine technical expertise, product innovation and a strong commitment to customer service. Our values are centred around customer experience, teamwork, vision and passion, and these principles guide how we work with customers, partners and colleagues.



As the business continues to grow, we are looking to expand our lighting design capability with support from talented designers based in the Philippines.



About the Role



We are looking for a Lighting Designer / Lighting Design Engineer to support the creation of high-quality lighting layouts, calculations and specifications for customer projects.



This role may suit candidates at different stages of their career. We are open to speaking with people who already have strong lighting design experience, as well as candidates with solid CAD/design skills who are looking to develop further within lighting.

The successful candidate will work closely with our UK-based lighting design team, technical team and wider commercial 

departments to help deliver accurate, well-presented and practical lighting design solutions for customers.



Key Responsibilities



Depending on experience level, responsibilities may include:



• Creating lighting designs and layouts from customer briefs, drawings and project information.

• Producing CAD drawings of lighting layouts and ensuring designs meet customer specifications.

• Preparing lighting calculations and detailed plans using software such as Relux and/or Dialux.

• Supporting both internal and external lighting design requirements.

• Assisting with the preparation of finished design presentations and customer-facing project documents.

• Liaising with internal teams to discuss ideas, concepts, product options and alternative solutions.

• Working with the lighting design manager, technical lead and other departments to ensure projects meet required standards, regulations and compliance expectations.

• Helping to manage lighting projects from initial brief through to final design output.

• Reviewing project information carefully to ensure accuracy, attention to detail and technical consistency.

• Contributing ideas and solutions as part of a wider design and technical team.

• Supporting project administration, specifications and numerical information where required.



For more experienced candidates, the role may also include greater ownership of full projects, direct technical input, advanced design work and support in improving lighting design processes.



Skills and Experience



We are looking for candidates who can demonstrate some or all of the following:



Essential



• Experience using AutoCAD or similar CAD software.

• A good understanding of lighting fundamentals, layouts and specifications.

• Experience or strong interest in lighting design software such as Relux and/or Dialux.

• Strong attention to detail and the ability to produce accurate design work.

• Good numerical and organisational skills.

• Ability to manage project information, specifications and deadlines.

• Good written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to work collaboratively with remote teams.

• A proactive attitude and willingness to learn our products, processes and design standards.



Desirable



• Previous experience working in the lighting industry.

• Experience designing commercial, industrial, retail, warehouse, office, residential or external lighting schemes.

• Experience preparing customer-facing lighting design presentations.

• Knowledge of lighting calculations, lux levels, emergency lighting or building compliance requirements.

• Experience working with UK, European or international lighting projects.

• Ability to interpret technical drawings, customer briefs and product specifications.

• Experience working remotely with overseas clients or colleagues.

title: Studio Photographer for E-commerce business (apparel)

title: Shopify Product Lister · Full-Time · Remote
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company managing multiple online stores across different niches. We are looking for a dedicated Product Lister to join our team and help us keep our shops fully stocked, optimized, and ready to convert.



This is a remote, full-time position with long-term growth potential.



What you'll do:



- Upload and list new products across multiple Shopify stores

- Write clean, SEO-friendly product titles and descriptions

- Edit product images, pricing, variants, and tags

- Organize products into the right collections and categories

- Keep listings consistent across stores and aligned with brand tone

- Collaborate with the team through Slack, Trello, or similar tools

- Track your hours through Hubstaff (mandatory)



What we're looking for:



-  Proven hands-on experience with Shopify (must have)

-  Familiarity with Hubstaff or similar time-tracking software

- Strong attention to detail — we don't have time for typos or sloppy uploads

-  Fast worker who can list products at scale without losing quality

-  Fluent written English (this is our working language)

-  Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and ability to focus

-  Self-starter who delivers without needing constant follow-up

- Available to communicate during agreed working hours





Bonus skills (nice to have):



- Basic image editing (Canva, Photoshop)

- Experience with multiple Shopify themes

- AliExpress / supplier sourcing knowledge

- Copywriting experience for product descriptions



What we offer:



- Starting salary: $325/month

- Performance-based raises after the first month

- Long-term position with multiple stores = consistent workload

- Growth opportunities — top performers get promoted to senior roles

- Friendly, no-drama international team

- Clear processes and SOPs from day one

title: Content Repurposing & Distribution Operator
description:
We are looking for a Content Repurposing & Distribution Operator who understands one thing:



This is not a content creation role.



Your job is to take real ideas, insights, and conversations—and turn them into content that drives attention, engagement, and leads.



If you enjoy thinking strategically, spotting patterns, and turning simple ideas into powerful messages that make people stop and think… this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Turn existing ideas, ads, conversations, and insights into high-impact content

• Extract one core idea and repurpose it into multiple formats

• Create and publish:

     • LinkedIn posts

     •
 posts

     • Short-form videos (2–3 daily)

     •
 content (2–3 per week)

• Distribute content across platforms consistently

• Track performance (engagement, clicks, replies) and improve content over time

• Focus on content that drives conversations and leads—not just likes



What Success Looks Like

• You take one idea and turn it into 5–10 pieces of content

• Your content makes business owners think:

     ???? “I might be losing money right now…”

• You help turn attention into real opportunities and booked calls



Who You’ll Be Creating Content For



You will be speaking to:

???? U.S.-based home service business owners (HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, Roofing)



They:



• Are busy and overwhelmed

• Miss calls while working

• Don’t follow up consistently

• Are losing revenue without realizing it



They don’t want marketing.

They want:

???? More booked jobs

???? Control

???? Peace of mind



What We’re Looking For

• Strong written communication (clear, simple, and direct)

• Ability to think in ideas, not just words

• Comfortable using platforms like LinkedIn,
, and video tools

• Organized and consistent with posting and tracking

• Willingness to learn and follow a proven system

• Self-motivated and able to execute daily without micromanagement

• Someone who pays attention to instructions in detail

* to get started with the application process, reply with "CR&DO" only in the title block



What We DON’T Want

• Generic content writers

• People who “just post” without thinking

• Overly corporate or robotic communication

• Anyone focused only on aesthetics instead of performance



Why Join Us

• Clear system and SOP to follow

• Learn real-world content strategy, distribution, and performance marketing

• Be part of a growing team focused on results, not fluff

• Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles based on performance

title: Shopify E-Commerce Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive E-commerce Assistant to support the day-to-day management and growth of our online product catalogue across multiple platforms. This role is ideal for someone with a strong eye for presentation, an interest in interiors/design, and confidence using modern AI tools to enhance product listings and visuals.



You’ll play a key role in ensuring our products are presented to the highest standard, optimised for conversion, and consistent across platforms such as Shopify, Etsy, and other marketplaces.



Key Responsibilities

- Product Listings

- Create new product listings across Shopify, Etsy, and other sales channels

- Upload and organise product images, variants, and specifications

- Ensure all listings are accurate, consistent, and aligned with brand standards

- Content Creation & Optimisation

- Write compelling, conversion-focused product descriptions

- Optimise listings for SEO (titles, tags, meta descriptions, keywords)

- Continuously improve existing listings based on performance insights

- AI Tools & Visual Content

- Use AI tools to generate and enhance product imagery (e.g. lifestyle renders, backgrounds)

- Assist in creating clean, high-end visuals suitable for a premium brand

- Support with generating draft product copy using AI, then refining to brand tone

- Platform Management

- Maintain and update product information across all platforms

- Ensure pricing, stock, and product details are consistent

- Assist with launching new products and collections

- General E-commerce Support

- Monitor listing performance and suggest improvements

- Assist with seasonal updates, promotions, and campaigns

- Support with basic website updates and merchandising on Shopify



Requirements

- Experience working with Shopify (essential)

- Familiarity with Etsy and/or other online marketplaces

- Strong written English and ability to write persuasive product copy

- Good eye for design, layout, and premium presentation

- Comfortable using or learning AI tools for content and image generation

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively



Desirable (Not Essential)

- Experience in furniture, interiors, or luxury product sectors

- Basic image editing skills (Photoshop, Canva, etc.)



What We’re Looking For

- Someone who takes pride in producing high-quality work

- A self-starter who can take ownership of tasks

- Commercially minded – understands what makes a product sell

- Keen to learn and improve systems over time



What We Offer

- Flexible working hours

- Opportunity to work with a growing premium brand

- Potential to grow into a larger role over time

title: Customer Support Agent Ecommerce
description:
KittySpout is looking for a Customer Support Agent to join our team!

In your application/subject message to us put the word "KITTY" on your application, along with the video introduction as mentioned in the job post below, or you will be denied.



As our Customer Support Agent, you will be responsible for managing all customer interactions, resolving inquiries across multiple channels 
, Social Media, and Live Chat), and ensuring every cat parent has a world-class experience. You will turn frustrated customers into brand advocates by providing fast, empathetic, and effective solutions.



We are looking to hire someone with 3+ years of work experience in high-volume e-commerce support. The ideal candidate has prior experience with DTC brands, understands the importance of "first-contact resolution," and knows how to manage a heavy ticket volume without sacrificing quality or brand voice.



Who are we?

At KittySpout, we are transforming cats and their parents’ lives by developing products designed with the help of expert veterinarians to create products that make taking care of cats easier while also helping improve the health and happiness of cats around the world. We've scaled quickly to become a multi 8-figure brand in under 4 years through viral digital marketing. KittySpout has helped over 600,000+ cat owners in just 4 years since launching with a small (but mighty) core team of under 20 people — and we are looking to continue our growth by finding a great customer support agent to play a pivotal role in scaling!



What is our culture like & who is a good fit?

Culture-fit is our #1 factor when hiring! We have a genuine will-to-win. No work is beneath us if it moves us towards our goals. We utilize creativity to do more with less – and quickly. We use data to make decisions and live by the following four core values: work smart, overdeliver, speed is king, and better everyday. We love learning – every problem is an opportunity to grow.



If you want a stress-free corporate 9-5 job, this isn’t it.



If you want to challenge yourself and shape a fast-growing company, work directly with the founders, and see huge career growth by playing a big role in scaling it to $100m+… If you want to drive results with a group of passionate, smart, hardworking people, work in an environment without politics or corporate chicanery, and play a big part in our growth being hands-on and active, all while having a generous performance bonus structure — then you’ve come to the right place.



Key Objectives

Maintain a high volume of ticket resolutions (60-80+ tickets per day) while maintaining a friendly, helpful tone.

Apply problem-solving principles to resolve shipping, product, and technical issues autonomously.

Operate with a high degree of autonomy, managing your inbox efficiently to meet SLA (Service Level Agreement) deadlines without needing hand-holding.

Quickly learn and master new tools like Richpanel, Shopify, and shipping platforms as our tech stack evolves.

Ensure every interaction meets our quality standards, minimizing the need for customer follow-ups or escalations.

Maintain clear, proactive communication with the operations team to report recurring product issues or shipping delays.

Drive revenue by offering smart upsells or alternatives when a product is out of stock or being returned.



Requirements

Fully remote.

Fluent in English (Written and Spoken).

Proven experience in Customer Support for DTC e-commerce brands.

Proven experience with support software (Gorgias, Zendesk, or Richpanel) and Shopify.

Speed & Accuracy: Ability to type quickly and navigate multiple tabs/tools simultaneously.

No issue working overtime or on weekends if needed. You’re passionate about your work and excited by the idea of helping thousands of customers.

Excellent cultural fit as per our values above.

Excited to play a big role in scaling the company and work closely with the founders.



KPI’S you will own

Daily Ticket Quota: Consistent resolution of assigned tickets.

Average Response Time: Under 1 hour during shift.

CSAT Score: Maintain a 4.8/5.0 or higher customer satisfaction rating.



Accountabilities

Resolve customer inquiries across
, Chat, and Social Media DM’s.

Process refunds, replacements, and order cancellations according to company policy.

Tag and categorize tickets to provide data-driven feedback to the product team.

Update the internal Knowledge Base/FAQ as new customer pain points emerge.

Proactively identify and report "fire" situations (e.g., website bugs, mass shipping delays).



This Role Is Not For You If

You are a perfectionist who spends 20 minutes drafting a single
. With high daily volume, success in this role demands efficiency and the use of macros/templates combined with quick personalization.

You thrive in highly collaborative environments with frequent meetings. This is a high-autonomy, "heads-down" role where you will be working through the ticket queue independently for the majority of your shift.

You struggle with fast-paced changes. Our policies and promotions can change overnight, and you must be able to pivot and learn new protocols instantly without frustration.



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate

When hiring, we’ll work with you to define the KPIs you’ll be responsible for and set targets. This removes ambiguity around wondering if you’re doing a good job after you start.



To apply, please submit a short video introduction (max 2 minutes) telling us who you are and what you’re great at, along with your CV.



If you’re a strong match, we’ll invite you to a single, intensive interview covering both technical ability (via mock tickets) and culture fit

We move quickly and aim to hire the right candidate within 5–7 days. We pride ourselves on timely responses—we won't leave you hanging.



Salary Expectation

USD $1,000 – $1,500 per month (based on experience and expertise)

title: Video Editor — Facebook & Instagram Ads (Long-Term, Remote)
description:
Type: Full-time or part-time | Remote | Long-term

Schedule: Weekdays, flexible hours (overlap with CET preferred)

Salary: $600–$900/month depending on experience and speed

Start: Immediate — paid test project first



About Us

We run performance-driven e-commerce brands and produce 10–
 and Instagram ad creatives every week. Our ads are built on AI-generated content (Sora/VEO B-roll combined with Arcads talking head clips) and have a clear, proven structure. We are looking for one reliable editor to own this role long-term.

If you do good work and follow the process, there is always more work. We treat our tea
mbers with respect, pay on time every week, and invest in people who invest in us.



What You Will Be Doing

Every ad arrives as a complete package. You do not make creative decisions — everything is pre-specified in a briefing doc.

Each package includes:



Numbered video clips in stitch order (AI B-roll + Arcads UGC talking head)

A voice-over audio file (ElevenLabs, already synced to timing)

A briefing doc with exact shot order, overlay specs, and captions file



Your job is to assemble, caption, and export each ad in 3 ratios — 4:5, 9:16, and 1:1 — then upload to a shared Google Drive folder.

Typical ad structure:



0:00–0:03 — Hook clip

0:03–0:35 — Body (B-roll + talking head alternating)

0:35–0:48 — CTA

Total length: 30–50 seconds



Volume: 10–20 finished ads per week (3 ratios each = up to 60 exported files)

Turnaround: Maximum 60 minutes per ad once the full package is delivered



Requirements



Proficient in CapCut Pro, Adobe Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Experience editing social media ads — not vlogs, not YouTube content, actual paid ads

Able to export in multiple aspect ratios (4:5, 9:16, 1:1) without cropping key elements

Able to add burned-in captions: white text, black outline, bottom of frame

Available on weekdays with a response time within 4 hours

Strong English comprehension — all briefings are in English

Reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable with repetitive precision work



Nice to have:



Experience with AI-generated footage (Sora, VEO, Arcads, ElevenLabs)

Background editing for DTC brands or performance marketing agencies





How to Apply

Do not send a generic application. Answer these 3 questions:



What editing software do you use?

Share 2 examples of video ads you have edited — not vlogs, not YouTube, actual paid social ads

How long does it take you to assemble a 40-second ad from pre-delivered clips?



Applications without portfolio examples will not be reviewed.



Why Work With Us



Stable, recurring volume — this is not a one-off project

Clear briefings — no guessing, no creative ambiguity

Weekly payment via Wise or PayPal

Room to grow as we scale our ad output

A team that values reliability and rewards it

title: Ebook writer
description:
I’m looking for a skilled writer to create a high-quality digital ebook focused on the Mediterranean diet—specifically a 30-day reset system that includes meal plans, recipes, and clear structure.



This is not a generic blog-style project.

I need something that feels clean, practical, and professionally written—a product people would actually pay for.



Project Scope:



The ebook should be approximately 25–40 pages and include:



Introduction (clear, engaging, non-generic)

Explanation of the Mediterranean diet (simple, not overly scientific)

A structured 30-day plan

Weekly meal plans

10–20 simple recipes (quick, realistic, not overly complex)

Grocery lists (organized, easy to follow)

A concise “rules” or summary section



Tone & Style:



Clear and easy to understand

Minimal fluff

Practical and actionable

Should feel natural and human (not robotic or overly AI-generated)

Written for everyday people, not academics



Important Requirements:

1. You may use AI tools to assist, but the final product must be edited, structured, and polished by you

2. Content must be original and plagiarism-free

3. Strong formatting (headings, flow, readability)

4. Delivered in Word (.docx) format

title: EVERYTIME Philippines Student Operations Manager
description:
About Everytime

Everytime is a campus platform based in South Korea, designed to make university life more efficient, connected and engaging. Everytime aims to create an exclusive space for students by featuring three standout tools - Course Reviews, Easy Timetable Creation, and a Student Community Hub. We are currently providing services to over 400 universities across Korea and Vietnam.



Building on this success, we are now expanding to the Philippines.





About This Role



We are seeking a proactive Student Operator to lead our initial community building and execution in the Philippines. 



This is not a typical ambassador or supporter role. As a Student Manager, you will work closely with our team to lead early execution and build the foundation for Everytime in the Philippines. Beyond your own campus, you will support operations across different universities in the Philippines. (Note: Everytime is based in Korea and we do not have a separate entity in the Philippines.)



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Market Entry: Lead the initial setup and rollout of Everytime in the Philippines

2. Platform Marketing: Execute creative marketing strategies for Everytime across various social media and platforms (X, Instagram,
, etc.).

3. Insight Gathering: Actively collect and update essential university-specific information to keep our platform relevant and resourceful.

4. Champion Leadership: Recruit, organize, and manage a small group of "Champions" (Student Supporters) across different universities in the Philippines

5. Strategic Collaboration: Regularly participate in online sync-up meeting to share insights, report progress, and brainstorm new ideas.



Important Note: You are not expected to execute all these roles by yourself. This is going to be a joint effort between our team in Korea and you. 





What We’re Looking For



1. Currently enrolled in University of the Philippines, Diliman (UPD), Ateneo De Manila University (ADMU), Mindanao State University - Iligan Institute of Technology (MSU-IIT)

2. Previous experience in student leadership role with a deep understanding of campus culture and trends

3. Strong sense of ownership and responsibility

4. Ability to lead a team with high self-discipline and execution power

5. Agile and proactive mindset to navigate and solve challenges in an early-stage setup

6. Strong communication and organizational skills

7. Fluent in English (both written and verbal)

8. Basic proficiency in Google Workspace (Drive, Sheet)





Why Join Us?



1. Lead the journey of building Everytime’s presence in the Philippines from the very beginning.

2. Engage in high-level collaboration with a global team and contribute to strategic decision-making processes

3. Lead meaningful projects with complete ownership while enjoying a flexible and remote-friendly working style.

title: FULFILLMENT & INVENTORY COORDINATOR (MANDARIN SPEAKING - FILIPINO)
description:
FULFILLMENT & INVENTORY COORDINATOR (MANDARIN SPEAKING - FILIPINO)



We are looking for a high-performing Fulfillment & Inventory Coordinator who thinks in inventory, flow, and execution, not just tasks.



This role is critical. You will be directly responsible for keeping products in stock, ensuring smooth fulfillment operations, coordinating with suppliers, and preventing delays before they happen.



You don’t just monitor, you anticipate, act, and solve.



REQUIREMENTS (Strict - Non-Negotiable)

Fluent in Mandarin and English (spoken and written)

Filipino candidate ONLY

Proven experience in supply chain, procurement, or inventory management

Strong background in inventory forecasting and stock management

Experience coordinating with China-based suppliers

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Proactive mindset, you don’t wait, you act

Fast thinker with strong problem-solving skills

Takes full ownership of results (especially stock availability)



RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage inventory flow and stock levels across all SKUs

Perform inventory forecasting and demand planning

Communicate and coordinate with suppliers in China

Handle procurement and purchasing decisions

Track shipments and resolve delays or risks proactively

Manage order scrubbing and fulfillment coordination

Prepare and handle shipment documentation and declarations

Act as the main point of contact for supplier coordination

Ensure zero (or minimal) stockouts, full ownership required



WEEKLY OUTPUT EXPECTATIONS:

Report on SKUs at risk of going out of stock

Identify delayed or at-risk shipments

Provide actions taken to resolve issues

Present a clear execution plan for the following week



If you’re someone who enjoys solving problems, staying ahead, and keeping things running smoothly, this role is for you.



Excited to see your application! Make sure to provide your resume link.

title: Customer Service Manager (Phone Support) - Retention
description:
Fast hiring process! Apply only if you’re ready to start immediately and can fully commit.

If you have any existing clients, side jobs, or planned commitments (travel, events, etc.) within the next 3 months, do not apply.

If undisclosed and discovered at any point, even after getting hired, you will be automatically removed.



Fill out this form to apply:





REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

At least 3 years experience in Customer Support (Phone/Voice) within E-commerce or similar industries

Proven Managerial / Team Lead experience in a CS environment

Strong technical knowledge in telephony systems (dialers, routing, call flows, etc.)

Experience with or exposure to AI tools in customer support (automation, voice AI, etc.)

Strong background in:

- Call handling operations

- Escalations and customer resolution

- Performance tracking and QA

Proven ability to build, document, and optimize processes from scratch

Experience in team scaling and workforce planning

Strong written and verbal English communication

Fast, proactive, systems-driven thinker



WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO:

- Can build a Phone Support Department from the ground up

- Has strong technical understanding of call systems and infrastructure

- Is obsessed with process creation, mapping, and optimization

- Can create clear SOPs, workflows, and documentation

- Knows how to scale a team without breaking operations

- Is decisive, structured, and people-first

- Can balance team care + performance + efficiency



RESPONSIBILITIES

- Build and establish the Phone Support Department from scratch

- Design and implement call flows, routing systems, and support structure

- Create and document processes, SOPs, and workflows

- Manage and oversee daily phone support operations

title: Australian Tax Accountant Wanted
description:
Australian Tax Accountant Wanted

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Tax Accountant to join our growing Australian tax accounting firm.

This role is ideal for someone with solid experience in Australian tax compliance and a genuine passion for helping business clients stay on top of their obligations while identifying tax-saving opportunities.



Key Responsibilities

• Prepare and lodge quarterly BAS for multiple client groups

• Prepare financial statements and income tax returns for companies, trusts, partnerships, self-managed super funds, and individuals

• Ensure full compliance with Australian tax legislation and ATO requirements

• Utilise Xero Tax and BGL software efficiently and accurately

• Liaise with clients to gather information, clarify queries, and provide professional guidance



Requirements

• Minimum 2 years’ experience in an Australian tax accounting firm

• Strong understanding of Australian income tax, GST, CGT, and SMSF compliance

• Proficiency in Xero Tax, BGL, and Microsoft Office

• Excellent communication skills and strong attention to detail

• CPA or CA qualified, or currently working towards qualification (preferred)



Additional Attributes (Preferred)

• Experience managing budgets or client portfolios

• Prior managerial or team leadership experience

• A genuine interest in managing people and ambition to grow into a Team Leader role



If you are a proactive tax professional who takes pride in accuracy, compliance, and client service — and you are looking to grow within a progressive firm — we would love to hear from you.

title: Research & Outreach Assistant
description:
We are looking for a Research & Outreach Assistant who can help us identify high-value partnership opportunities and start meaningful conversations with decision-makers.



This is not a data entry job and not a sales role.



Your job is to:

???? Find the right companies

???? Identify the right people

???? Start real conversations



If you’re someone who enjoys research, thinking critically, and communicating in a natural, human way… this role is for you.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing



???? Research (Core Responsibility)

• Identify companies that already work with businesses generating leads (marketing agencies, SaaS, consultants, etc.) 

• Evaluate whether they are a strong potential partner (not just any company) 

• Find the correct decision-makers (Owner, CEO, Founder, etc.) 

• Document findings in a structured system 



???? You are expected to think about business fit, not just collect information 

________________________________________

???? Outreach (Conversation-Based)



• Connect with decision-makers on LinkedIn 

• Send short, natural messages to start conversations 

• Follow up when needed 

• Focus on opening conversations, not pitching 



???? The goal is to build familiarity and identify opportunity, not sell 

________________________________________

???? Tracking & Organization

• Keep all leads updated in the pipeline 

• Track stages (contacted, replied, interested, etc.) 

• Maintain clean, accurate data 

________________________________________

Who You’ll Be Targeting



You will be reaching out to companies that serve:

???? U.S.-based home service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, etc.)



These companies:

• Generate or manage leads 

• But don’t fully solve follow-up or conversion 



That’s where we come in 

________________________________________

What We’re Looking For

• Strong attention to detail 

• Ability to think critically (not just follow instructions blindly) 

• Comfortable researching companies and people online 

• Clear, simple written communication 

• Self-motivated and consistent 

• Willingness to learn and follow a structured system 

•       Someone who pays attention to instructions in detail

*      to get started with the application process, reply with "R&OA" only in the title block

________________________________________

What We DON’T Want

• People who copy and paste without thinking 

• Generic or robotic communication 

• Mass outreach mindset 

• “Just get it done” attitude without quality 

________________________________________

What Success Looks Like

• You consistently find high-quality partner opportunities 

• Your research includes clear reasoning (not vague answers) 

• Outreach messages feel human and thoughtful 

• Conversations start happening 

• Opportunities begin to form 

________________________________________

Daily Expectations

• Research: 15–25 companies/day 

• Qualified leads: 8–15 

• High-quality leads (score 4+): 5+ 

• Outreach: 20–30 connection requests + follow-ups 

________________________________________

Why Join Us

• Clear system and training provided 

• Learn real-world business development and partnership strategy 

• Work directly with a growing company focused on results 

• Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles 

________________________________________



If you’re someone who can spot opportunities, think strategically, and communicate like a real human…

We want to hear from you.

title: Cinematic Video Editor Commercials
description:
Here's a punchy job post for that:



Cinematic Video Editor – Camping Brand

About Us

We're a camping brand creating content that makes people want to get off the couch and into the wild. We need an editor who can make our footage feel like a feature film, not a YouTube tutorial.

The Role

We're looking for a cinematic video editor with commercial experience who can take raw footage and turn it into visually stunning, emotionally driven content. You should be just as comfortable cutting a tight 30-second spot as you are crafting a longer brand film.

What You'll Do



Edit commercial-quality video content for our camping brand across ads, social, and brand storytelling

Color grade footage shot in S-Log to achieve a rich, cinematic look

Craft pacing, transitions, and sound design that elevate the storytelling

Collaborate with our creative team on direction, revisions, and final delivery

Manage and organize project files and assets professionally



What You Must Bring



Proven experience editing commercial or brand content — outdoor/adventure industry a big plus

Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve (not just Final Cut Pro)

Expert-level color grading skills, specifically experience working with S-Log footage

A sharp cinematic eye — you understand framing, pacing, mood, and tone

A portfolio or reel that makes us say "we need this person"



Bonus Points



Motion graphics or After Effects capability

Experience with drone or action cam footage

Understanding of delivery specs across platforms (broadcast, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok)



To Apply

Send your reel or portfolio along with a brief note on your experience. If your work speaks for itself, we want to hear from it.

 / Instagram ads
