title: Growth Marketing Operator (Execution-Focused, Remote – Philippines)
description:
We are a fast-growing clean beauty brand looking for a highly execution-focused Growth Marketing Operator to help scale our digital marketing and influencer partnerships.



This role is focused on daily execution, not high-level strategy.



You will work directly with the founder to:



* Build a strong pipeline of creators (influencers)

* Support day-to-day ad execution (Meta & Google)

* Help launch and manage marketing campaigns



If you are organized, proactive, and enjoy getting things done consistently, this role is for you.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Creator Sourcing & Outreach (Primary Focus – 60–70%)



* Find 50+ relevant creators daily on Instagram (and then TikTok)

* Focus on:

    * Clean beauty

    * Non-toxic lifestyle

    * Skincare / haircare

    * Wellness, moms, lifestyle

* Track all creators in a spreadsheet:

    * Username

    * Platform

    * Followers

    * Engagement

    * Notes on fit

* Send outreach messages using provided scripts

* Follow up with creators

* Keep pipeline organized and updated



?



2. Ads Execution Support (Meta + Google) (20–30%)



* Upload new creatives into ad platforms

* Turn campaigns on/off based on instructions

* Adjust budgets using simple rules provided

* Monitor performance daily and flag issues



Note: You will execute, not define strategy.



?



3. Basic Creative & Asset Support (10%)



* Create simple static images using tools (Canva or AI tools)

* Assist with copy variations for ads

* Organize creative assets and files



?



4. Pipeline & Reporting



* Maintain clean tracking sheets for:

    * Creator outreach

    * Campaigns

    * Performance notes

* Provide a short daily update:

    * What was completed

    * Key updates

    * Any blockers



?



DAILY EXPECTATIONS



* Source 50+ creators/day

* Send 30–50 outreach messages/day

* Upload / manage ad tasks as assigned

* Keep all tracking clean and up to date



?



IDEAL CANDIDATE



* Strong written English (clear and concise)

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Comfortable with repetitive, execution-heavy work

* Proactive and reliable

* Fast learner and open to feedback

* Familiar with Instagram, TikTok, and basic ads platforms



?



NOT A FIT IF YOU



* Prefer strategy over execution

* Want to “manage” rather than do the work

* Dislike repetitive tasks

* Need constant supervision or are not okay with daily check ins 



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



To apply, complete the steps below. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



1. Start your application with the word: GREEN

2. Find 5 Instagram or TikTok creators in clean beauty / non-toxic lifestyle

3. For each creator, include:



* Username

* Platform (IG or TikTok)

* Follower count

* 1–2 sentences on why they are a good fit



4. Write a short outreach message you would send to one of them



Keep your answer clear and organized.



OFFER: Final offer and compensation will depend on skill level and test task performance. 



We move fast and value people who take ownership. If you’re someone who can execute without being asked twice and take pride in getting things done, you’ll do very well here.

title: Coloring Book Refinement Illustrator
description:
About the Project

We want to produce a series of easy, simple coloring books for adults. We use AI tools to generate initial concept compositions, and a human illustrator refines, redraws, and perfects each page into clean, print-ready line art. You are the the person who transforms rough AI concepts into polished, consistent, coloring-optimized illustrations that feel hand-drawn and warm.

This is an ongoing relationship. The right illustrator becomes our long-term creative partner.

Scope of Work

    • Receive 50 AI-generated concept images as compositional references (labeled "REFERENCE ONLY — NOT FINAL ART") 

    • Redraw, refine, or trace each page into clean, consistent line art following our Brand Style Guide 

    • Ensure all pages meet our technical specifications (line weight, zone count, print requirements) 

    • Create 3–5 original illustrations per book for key pages (cover centerpiece, opening page, signature scenes) where AI concepts are inadequate 

    • Deliver 50 final pages + 1 cover illustration as individual high-resolution files 

    • Complete revisions per page based on our feedback 

Required Qualifications

    • Portfolio demonstrating clean line art illustration (coloring book samples strongly preferred) 

    • Experience with print specifications (300 DPI, bleed settings, black & white interiors) 

    • Proficiency with digital illustration tools (Adobe Illustrator, Procreate, Clip Studio Paint, or equivalent) 

    • Ability to maintain consistent style across 50+ pages within a single book and across a multi-book series 

    • Comfortable working from AI-generated reference images (we will discuss this upfront, if you are philosophically opposed to working with AI references, this is not the right fit) 

    • Responsive communication — replies within 24 hours on business days 



Preferred Qualifications

    • Previously published coloring books 

    • Experience with the "Bold & Easy" coloring book style specifically 

    • Understanding of coloring ergonomics (zone sizing, line closure, marker-friendly design) 

    • Ability to deliver vector files (SVG/AI) in addition to PNG for future scalability 

How to Apply

Please provide:

    1. A link to your portfolio showing coloring book or clean line art work 

    2. Your per-page rate for refinement work and original illustrations 

    3. Your availability and estimated turnaround time for 50 pages 

    4. Confirmation that you are willing to sign a Work-for-Hire Agreement transferring full copyright to our company 

    5. (Optional) A brief note on your experience working from reference images





Thank you

title: Full-Time Shopify Store Designer (CRO-Focused, AI-Savvy)
description:
We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency building and launching multiple dropshipping & DTC brands every month.



We are looking for a full-time Shopify Store Designer who understands both design AND conversion (CRO).



This is not a basic “theme setup” role.

We want someone who can build stores that look premium and actually convert.



???? Your Role:

- Design and build high-converting stores on Shopify

- Create clean, premium, and conversion-focused layouts

- Optimize product pages, landing pages, and overall UX for sales

- Use AI tools (e.g. Nano Banana Pro or similar) to generate product images, banners, and creatives

- Work fast and efficiently to produce multiple stores per month

- Collaborate with our team to improve structure, flow, and performance



? Requirements:

- Strong experience designing Shopify stores (not just setting up themes)

- Solid understanding of CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization)

- Good design sense (layout, spacing, hierarchy, branding)

- Experience building DTC / dropshipping stores

- Able to use AI tools for image generation and creative design

- Fast execution and able to handle multiple projects at once

- Detail-oriented and takes ownership of work



? Do NOT Apply If:

- You only install themes without customizing properly

- You don’t understand CRO or what makes a store convert

- You cannot design clean, modern, high-end stores

- You don’t have a portfolio or past work to show



???? Must Provide (REQUIRED):

- Portfolio of Shopify stores you’ve designed

- Live store links (if available)

- Screenshots of your best work

- Brief explanation of your design approach



???? Hiring Process:

Shortlisted candidates will go through a trial task to assess design quality and speed.



???? Bonus If You:

- Understand winning product page structures (like Bleame / The Oodie style)

- Have experience with upsells, bundles, and CRO elements

- Can think like a marketer, not just a designer



???? How to Apply:



Start your application with:

???? “I design to convert”



Then include:

- Your experience

- Portfolio / past work

- Tools you use (Shopify apps, AI tools, etc.)

- Why you’re a good fit

title: Content Creator with Adobe & GHL skills
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Content Creator and Digital Marketing VA to support our growing UK-based marketing and consultancy agency. This is a multifaceted role requiring a blend of technical high-end visual content creation, CRM management, and administrative excellence.



ESSENTIAL SKILLS - Please do not apply if you do not match these specific criteria:

# English Proficiency: An excellent, provable C1 / C2 level of English. This must be a formal certification (e.g., IELTS, Cambridge, TOEFL); we cannot accept results from free online quizzes.

# GoHighLevel (GHL): Minimum 6 months of experience. You must be proficient in automations, sites, funnels, and general CRM management.

# Adobe Premiere Pro: Proficiency is essential. Note: You must have your own active Adobe subscription.

# Design Tools: Intermediate level in Adobe Photoshop (own subscription required) OR Canva.

# Social Media Marketing: Deep knowledge of best practices and trends for LinkedIn, Instagram, and
.

# Lead Generation: Experience with tools such as LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

# Client Communication: Confident, fluent video-conferencing skills for client-facing work.

# General VA Skills: High-level organizational skills and reliability.



DESIRABLE SKILLS - These are considered a bonus only if ALL essential skills are met:

# API & Automation: Knowledge of Make.com and n8n.

# AI Tools: Proficiency in GPT, Gemini, and Claude (utilizing AI to enhance workflow without being dependent on it).

# Web Development: Knowledge of Elementor, WordPress, and intermediate CSS.

# Audio/Video Tools: Experience with Descript.



ROLE DETAILS & REQUIREMENTS

# Hours: Starting at 10 hours per week, with the intention of moving to a full-time position for the right candidate.

# Portfolio: We require a comprehensive portfolio demonstrating your video editing and design work.

# Assessment: Please note there is a live skills assessment as part of the interview process.

# Verification: You will be required to provide proof of your English certification.



Who we are looking for:

We are a friendly and flexible agency, but we move fast. We need someone dependable, communicative, and ready to take ownership of content and systems.



STRICT REQUIREMENT: Do not apply if you have less than 6 months of GoHighLevel experience or if you do not hold a formal C1/C2 English certification.



Please send a link to your portfolio and we'd be happy to review it.  Ensure it has examples of your work in Adobe Photoshop and Premiere.

title: Growth Marketing Executive
description:
About MERRIA Digital

MERRIA Digital is a Singapore-based digital marketing and creative agency focused on helping SMEs grow through strategic marketing, content, and performance-driven campaigns.



We don’t believe in cookie-cutter strategies—we focus on results, growth, and real business impact.



We are currently expanding our team and looking for a Marketing Specialist who can drive performance, optimize campaigns, and support client growth.



Role Overview

As a Marketing Specialist, you will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing digital marketing campaigns across multiple platforms. This role is focused on lead generation, performance marketing, and measurable results—not just content posting.



You will work closely with the team to help clients increase visibility, generate leads, and improve conversions.



Key Responsibilities

Plan, execute, and optimize digital marketing campaigns (Meta, Google, LinkedIn)

Manage paid ads and track performance (CPL, CPA, ROAS)

Develop and implement lead generation strategies for clients

Analyze campaign data and provide actionable insights

Optimize landing pages and funnels for conversion

Work with the creative team for ad creatives and content direction

Conduct market and competitor research

Support strategy development for client campaigns

Provide weekly performance reports and recommendations

KPIs (Success Metrics)

Lead generation performance (cost per lead, volume)

Campaign ROI and conversion rates

Client growth and retention support

Funnel and ad optimization improvements

Qualifications & Requirements

Proven experience in digital marketing or performance marketing

Strong knowledge of Meta Ads, Google Ads, and/or LinkedIn Ads

Experience in lead generation and conversion optimization

Analytical mindset with ability to interpret data

Familiar with tools like Google Analytics, Meta Business Manager, etc.

Strong communication and reporting skills

Ability to work independently in a remote setup

Experience working with international clients (US/AU/ Singapore) is a plus

Preferred (Nice to Have)

Experience in agency environment

Knowledge in funnel building (Wix, Shopify, landing pages)

Basic understanding of SEO

Experience in CRM tools (HubSpot or similar)

Compensation & Benefits

Competitive salary (based on experience)

Opportunity to grow into a senior or leadership role

Work with international clients (Singapore, US, Australia)

Flexible remote working environment

Why Join MERRIA Digital?

Be part of a growing international agency

Work on real client projects with measurable impact

Opportunity for fast career growth

Collaborative and performance-driven culture

Direct exposure to strategy, execution, and business growth

How to Apply

Send your CV/Resume along with:

Brief summary of your experience in performance marketing

????
:

?

title: Funnel Builder (Shopify + Funnelish + Advertorial Funnels)
description:
We are looking for a serious and experienced funnel builder who can take full ownership of building high-converting eCommerce funnels.



This is not a simple page builder job.



We build advertorial funnels for health and consumer products using Shopify and Funnelish, and we need someone who understands direct response conversion funnels.



The goal is simple:



Build funnels that convert and can scale with paid traffic.



Your Responsibilities



You will be responsible for building and improving funnels from start to finish.



This includes:



• Building advertorial pages

• Creating high-converting Shopify product pages

• Connecting Shopify products and bundles

• Creating Funnelish flows

• Implementing upsells and downsells

• Connecting checkout links correctly

• Setting up bundle offers (1 / 2 / 3 / 5 pieces)

• Setting up Shopify variants and pricing logic

• Testing the entire funnel flow across devices

• Fixing technical issues quickly

• Improving funnel structure to increase conversion



You will often work from existing competitor funnels that need to be rebuilt and optimized.



Speed, accuracy and attention to detail are important.



Shopify Product Page Experience



You must also be comfortable building Shopify product pages designed for paid traffic funnels.



This includes:



• Structuring high-converting product pages

• Implementing bundle offers and variant pricing

• Setting compare-at prices correctly

• Adding trust elements (reviews, guarantees, FAQs)

• Optimizing layout for mobile conversion

• Connecting Shopify products correctly with Funnelish flows



This is not a standard Shopify store setup.



Our product pages are built specifically for conversion from paid traffic.



Important



This role focuses on direct response funnels, not traditional website development.



If your experience is mainly building corporate websites or design-focused landing pages, this role is not the right fit.



We are looking for someone who understands:



• conversion psychology

• advertorial funnels

• paid traffic funnels

• eCommerce bundles and checkout flows



How We Work



We move fast and build many funnels.



We are looking for someone who:



• communicates clearly

• works quickly and efficiently

• enjoys solving technical problems

• takes ownership of the funnel



If things go well, this can become a long-term position with consistent work.



Experience Required



You should have experience with some of the following:



• Shopify product setup and variants

• Funnelish funnels

• advertorial funnels

• direct response landing pages

• upsells and downsells

• bundle offers and pricing logic

• conversion rate optimization



Experience with health, supplement, or consumer product funnels is a strong advantage.



To Apply



Please answer the following:



1?? What funnels have you built before?

Please include links or screenshots.



2?? What platforms did you use?

Example: Shopify, Funnelish, ClickFunnels, Webflow, etc.



3?? What type of products were these funnels for?

Example: supplements, beauty, consumer products, etc.



4?? What was the funnel structure?

Example: Ad ? advertorial ? product page ? checkout ? upsell



5?? What was your role in building the funnel?



6?? Can you work daily if needed?



Applications without examples of previous work will not be reviewed.

title: Creative Strategist (Meta Ads) - Part-Time for a Scaling DTC Brand
description:
We’re looking for a Creative Strategist to join our team and help us scale our paid ads.



This is a part-time role for someone who is already working in a similar position and is looking to take on an additional high-impact opportunity.



You’ll be working closely with the founder and team to develop and test new creative ideas for Meta ads.



About Us



We are an eCommerce brand operating at a high level, focused on scaling through paid social.



We sell our own branded product, positioned as a gifting item, and are continuously testing new ways to market and scale it through creative.



We are sitting on a big opportunity. We want to move fast, test aggressively, and prioritize performance.





What You'll Do:

- Develop creative concepts, angles, and hooks that drive profitable customer acquisition

- Write ad scripts, headlines, and copy that convert

- Analyze performance data to understand what's working and why

- Brief video editors and designers on creative execution

- Manage the creative testing pipeline—always have winners in the queue

- Stay on top of creative trends, competitor ads, and market dynamics

- Collaborate with Media Buyers to understand what's scaling and what's not

- Build and maintain our creative knowledge base (what works for our brands)



What We're Looking For

- 2+ years of creative strategy experience in DTC/e-commerce

- Portfolio of ads you've created that scaled to significant spend

- Deep understanding of direct response principles

- Strong copywriting skills—you can write a hook that stops the scroll

- Data literacy—you can read a dashboard and extract insights

- Experience briefing creative teams (video editors, designers)

- Understanding of Meta's ad ecosystem and creative best practices



Compensation

 • $1000/month (part-time)

 • Earn 2%–5% commission on ad spend generated from your creatives

 • $100 bonus for each winning ad (ads that scale past £1,000 in spend with strong performance)



Top performers can earn $1,000–$1,500+ per month depending on results.



Why Join Us

 • Work directly with the founder

 • Be part of a high-performing team

 • Fast-paced environment with real testing and feedback

 • Opportunity to grow with the brand



How To Apply



Please submit the following:

 1. A short introduction about yourself and your experience

 2. Examples of ads or brands you’ve worked on

        3.     Write about what tools you have experience using, and the workflows you have using these tools to help you with creative strategy. (IMPORTANT)



P.S. Our best-performing ad ever was a simple concept that took 20 minutes to write. It's generated over $500k in revenue. If you understand why simplicity often wins, we should talk.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Street Interviewer – Women Life and Culture (Short-Term Test)
description:
Job Title: Street Interviewer – Women's Life & Culture (Short-Term Test)



Type: Temporary / Project (2 weeks, approximately 8 hours total)

Rate: $10-12 USD/hour

Location: Cebu City (or your target city)



About the Role (Short Version)

Shift Creative Media is testing a street interview series about Filipino women's daily life, culture, work, and traditions.

This is a 2-week test. We're shooting 8 interviews total (4 per week). If successful, the role becomes ongoing.

Shoot on your smartphone or camera (daylight is fine, no DSLR needed)

Use your own clip-on lav mic for clean audio

Send raw footage via Google Drive



Requirements:

Female (essential for trust/comfort with interviewees)

Outgoing, confident approaching strangers

Fluent English + Tagalog

Own modern smartphone or camera

Own clip-on lav mic (non-negotiable — audio quality matters)

Comfortable on camera (as interviewer, not subject)



How to apply:

Subject line: SCM Street Interviewer - [Your Name]

First line: "RK sent me"

Include in your message:

A 30-second video of you talking to anyone (friend, family, stranger) — show your personality

Your location (city/area)

Your equipment (phone/camera model + mic type)



Do NOT ask for the test task in your initial message. Only shortlisted candidates will receive the test task.



Test Task (For Shortlisted Candidates Only)

Shortlisted candidates will receive a paid test task ($15) via Fiverr: a 2-minute practice interview with a friend using provided questions.



— RK, Shift Creative Media

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: B2B Prospect List Builder
description:
Zero Risk Growth (ZRG) is a fast-growing B2B direct marketing agency that uses a multi-channel approach to book appointments for its clients. Our mission is to connect our clients with outstanding businesses in their target market. We win when our clients win.



Job Summary

Fuel Zero Risk Growth’s outbound engine by sourcing, enriching, and maintaining accurate B2B prospect lists across multiple client accounts. You’ll ensure every campaign starts with clean, targeted data. 



This role demands speed, precision, and a strong command of modern data tools as we process millions of contacts each month. If you’re fast with tools like Clay and Apollo, obsessed with data quality, and know what makes a great B2B prospect list, you’ll thrive here.



Core Responsibilities



Prospect Research & List Engineering

- Build targeted prospect lists matching ICP criteria (industry, geo, size, title, tech stack)

- Source, enrich, and verify data using Clay, Apollo, Findymail, MillionVerifier, etc.

- Maintain organized, accurate datasets that improve targeting and lead rates



Data Quality & Compliance

- Clean, dedupe, validate, and maintain deliverability across all datasets

- Manage blacklists, suppression lists, and compliance requirements

- Identify data issues and improve sourcing workflows



Operational Output

- Pull 250,000+ contacts/month across client accounts

- Work with campaign engineering to refine targeting and lead quality

- Maintain fast, reliable list turnaround to keep outbound moving



Qualifications 

- 2+ years in B2B list building, data sourcing, or lead gen

- Skilled with AI-driven enrichment workflows

- Experience with Clay, Apollo, Findymail, MillionVerifier, etc.

- Strong Excel/Sheets skills for data cleanup

- Marketing agency/team experience preferred

- Strong written and spoken English

- Flexible with US business hours

- This must be your only full-time role





Summary:

Job Type: Contract



Payment: $1600 Monthly Base ($2000 OTE)



Experience:

- B2B Prospect List Building: 2 years (Required)



Language: Fluent English (Required)



Location: Remote



Job Type: Full-time

title: B2B Outbound Sales Representative
description:
Join our expanding team! We're looking for driven and confident individuals with outbound sales experience to connect with potential B2B clients.



What You'll Do

Make B2B cold calls to potential clients.

Qualify customers using a script and criteria.

Identify decision makers and gather key info.

Handle basic objections confidently.

Send follow-up
s and log calls accurately.



What We're Looking For

6+ months outbound sales experience (B2B/B2C).

Strong, confident, and energetic communication.

Ability to follow a script while thinking on your feet.

Reliable internet and quiet workspace.

Willingness to learn our cold calling process.



What We Offer

Remote work.

Competitive pay.

Paid Training: 3 days at $12 total, then $3 per hour with ability to increase with VERY GOOD COMMISSION STRUCTURE.

Clear metrics and growth opportunities.

title: Client Support Coordinator (Inbound Calls and Emails, Remote Philippines)
description:
Overview



We are an established education company based in Australia. A large part of our work involves speaking with parents over the phone and responding to enquiries through
 and messaging platforms.



We are expanding our support team and hiring one remote Client Support Coordinators:

• 1 Part Time



This role is not sales focused. It is a communication focused, inbound support role.



What Matters Most in This Role



1. English Speaking Expertise

This is the single most important requirement.

You must be able to speak clear, confident, natural English and explain information smoothly over the phone.



Accent is not an issue. Clarity, confidence, and comprehension are.



2. Past Experience

Previous experience handling inbound calls, customer support, or client communication is strongly preferred.



If we find the right person, we are willing to train everything else.



Training and Long Term Commitment



If selected, you will go through a fully paid, structured 2 month training program.



This training covers:

• Our communication standards

• Call handling expectations

• Systems and workflows

• Common parent questions and responses



We are looking for candidates who want a stable, long term role, not short term freelance work.



Working Hours



We require phone coverage from 10:30 am to 7:00 pm WAST (Western Australia time), Monday to Friday and 8:30am to 5pm Saturday and Sunday.



• Part Time role will cover specific blocks, including weekends



Exact schedules will be finalised after shortlisting.



Key Responsibilities



• Answer inbound phone calls from parents

• Respond to
s and WhatsApp messages clearly and professionally

• Provide accurate information about programs, schedules, and enrolments

• Record call notes and follow ups correctly

• Escalate complex enquiries when required

• Maintain a calm, polite, and professional tone at all times



Essential Requirements



• Excellent spoken and written English

• Strong phone presence and listening skills

• Previous experience in customer support or inbound calls

• Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

• Comfortable working Australian time zones



Education industry experience is a bonus but not required.



Employment Type



• 1 Part Time role

Remote work from the Philippines



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A short written introduction



Your relevant customer support or call handling experience



Your availability in WAST



A short voice recording or Loom video introducing yourself (required)



Applications without a voice recording may not be considered.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a brief phone interview.

title: Educational Content Developer (Maths)
description:
About the Role

Key Responsibilities



Create original educational resources including worksheets, practice sets, study notes, and assessments for high school Mathematics (Algebra, Geometry, Calculus).



Write clear, detailed answer keys and step by step solutions that reflect how a good teacher would explain concepts to students.



Review, refine, and improve existing materials by removing unnecessary content and aligning resources with ACARA, WACE, or exam specific outcomes.



Collaborate closely with tutors to identify learning gaps and design new resources based on real student needs.



Maintain consistently high standards so every page is clear, structured, and useful at first glance.



Contribute ideas for new formats, topics, and improved teaching approaches, and take part in testing and iterative improvements.



Stay up to date with school syllabi and exam trends including NAPLAN, GATE, ATAR, and SAT style assessments.



Additional Information



The content you create will be actively taught, read, and used by students across the state.



You will have the opportunity to influence what materials are developed and play a meaningful role in the company’s growth.



You will work within a focused team that values quality, clarity, and high standards.



There is scope for career growth into leadership roles or subject specialisation, depending on your strengths and interests.



How to Apply



Please message us your answers to the following questions:



1. What does it feel like to be in love?



2. x³ + y³ + z³ = 33 ?



3. What relevant experience do you have that makes you a strong fit for this role?

title: Influencer / Affiliate Coordinator (ECOM)
description:
NOTE: Do not apply if you do not have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.



Job Description:



We are looking for a full-time Influencer / Affiliate Coordinator to support creator partnerships, affiliate relationships, and campaign execution for an ecommerce brand. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and confident managing outreach, follow-ups, gifting, creator communication, and affiliate coordination from start to finish.



Language: English

Availability: Full Time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: Flexible

Work Type: Remote

Niche: E-commerce

Payment: $1,000 to $1,500 per month



Responsibilities



Support day-to-day influencer and affiliate campaign execution across outreach, onboarding, follow-ups, and reporting

Research and identify relevant creators, affiliates, ambassadors, and niche partners aligned with the brand’s audience

Manage outreach pipelines and maintain accurate tracking for responses, negotiations, shipments, posting dates, and results

Coordinate product gifting, discount codes, affiliate links, briefs, content deadlines, and approvals

Build and maintain relationships with creators and affiliate partners through clear, professional communication

Track creator and affiliate performance including posts delivered, engagement, traffic, conversions, and code usage

Keep campaign trackers, CRM records, and reporting dashboards updated and organized

Work closely with internal tea
mbers on campaign priorities, product launches, and partner needs

Help ensure creators and affiliates receive the right information, links, products, and next steps on time

Flag top-performing partners and opportunities for scaling, re-engagement, or long-term collaboration



Must-Haves



At least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands

Experience supporting influencer marketing, affiliate coordination, ambassador programs, or creator partnerships

Strong written English and professional communication skills

High attention to detail and strong follow-through

Comfortable using spreadsheets, trackers, and project management tools to manage multiple moving parts

Ability to stay organized while handling outreach, partner communication, shipping coordination, and reporting

Proactive work style and ability to work independently in a remote setup

Comfortable managing repetitive tasks with consistency and accuracy



Nice to Haves



Experience using affiliate platforms such as Shopify Collabs, UpPromote, Refersion, Impact, ShareASale, or similar tools

Experience working with gifting campaigns, influencer seeding, or UGC partnerships

Familiarity with discount code tracking, affiliate links, and conversion attribution

Experience in beauty, wellness, fashion, lifestyle, or consumer product brands

Basic understanding of influencer performance metrics and ecommerce KPIs

Experience helping turn short-term creator relationships into ongoing partnerships



Benefits



Full-time remote role with stable monthly compensation

Opportunity to work closely on ecommerce growth through influencer and affiliate channels

Hands-on experience with creator campaigns, partner operations, and performance tracking

Clear ownership over an important acquisition and brand growth function

Fast-paced ecommerce environment with room to grow

Creator Manager / Creator Sourcer (ECOM)

title: Creator Manager / Creator Sourcer for DTC Ecommerce Brand
description:
We are looking for a full-time Creator Manager / Creator Sourcer to find, assess, recruit, and manage content creators for an ecommerce brand.



This role is ideal for someone who understands what makes a creator a strong fit for DTC content and can consistently source talent, manage communication, keep the pipeline organized, and help move creator campaigns forward.



If you are strong at identifying the right creators, staying organized, and keeping sourcing and follow-ups moving, this could be a great fit.



Language: English

Availability: Full Time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: Flexible

Work Type: Remote

Niche: E-commerce

Payment: $1,000 to $1,500 per month



What you’ll be doing



Source creators for UGC, paid social content, product seeding, and performance marketing needs

Identify creators that match the brand’s audience, tone, product category, and content style

Research creators across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, creator platforms, and other sourcing channels

Review creator profiles for content quality, communication, fit, and reliability

Reach out to creators and manage replies, follow-ups, and next steps

Coordinate onboarding, product shipment details, briefs, deadlines, and delivery expectations

Maintain an organized creator database with notes, rates, niches, status, and past performance

Help keep the creator pipeline full, updated, and easy to track

Work with the team to understand content needs, angles, and ideal creator types

Flag strong creators for repeat work or longer-term partnerships



Must-Haves



At least 1 year of experience working directly with DTC or ecommerce brands

Experience sourcing, vetting, onboarding, or managing creators for ecommerce content

Strong understanding of DTC and UGC content

Strong written English

Strong research skills and good judgment when evaluating creators

Highly organized with strong follow-up habits

Comfortable using Google Sheets, Airtable, Notion, or similar tools

Able to handle high-volume sourcing and communication without losing quality

Comfortable in a remote full-time setup

Reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented



Must-Have Skills



Creator sourcing

Creator vetting

UGC understanding

Outreach and follow-up

Google Sheets or Airtable

Written communication

Research

Briefing coordination

Database management

Ecommerce content support



Nice to Haves



Experience sourcing creators for paid social, Spark Ads, whitelisting, or UGC-style ad content

Experience in beauty, wellness, fashion, lifestyle, or consumer products

Understanding of creator briefs, hooks, usage rights, and content delivery workflows

Experience with nano and micro creators

Familiarity with creator platforms and sourcing workflows

Ability to identify creators who can produce performance-focused content, not just aesthetic content



Why this role is worth considering



Full-time remote role

Stable monthly pay

Clear ownership over creator sourcing and coordination

Direct involvement in building ecommerce content pipelines

Opportunity to grow deeper into DTC creator operations



How to apply



Please include:



The DTC or ecommerce brands you’ve worked with directly

How many years of relevant experience you have

Whether your experience is more in sourcing, managing, or both

Examples of the types of creators you’ve worked with

The tools you’ve used to stay organized

Why you think you are a fit for this role

title: Video Editor
description:
Remote Video Editor



We are a Dubai-based Real Estate company



We're looking for a self-driven video editor who doesn't need babysitting. You'll own post-production across YouTube and short-form (Instagram Reels + TikTok) for our team of real estate agents.



What you'll edit:

— YouTube: podcasts, vlogs, property tours, market commentary

— Short-form: Reels and TikToks repurposed from long-form + native vertical content

— Real estate / luxury lifestyle niche

— Vox-style documentary videos (Occasional)



What we need from you:

— Can work independently — you get a brief, you deliver, no hand-holding

— Creative eye — you bring ideas, not just execution

— Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, and retention

— Experience with AI editing tools (Opus Clip, Descript, Runway, etc.)

— Proficient in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and/or CapCut



Bonus if you bring high level motion graphics skills (After Effects — animated titles, lower thirds, data visualizations).



 Full-time | English required

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Content Creator / Remote VA (Talking Videos for TikTok & Hiring Brand)
description:
We are hiring a reliable remote VA/content creator to make short talking videos for our hiring/job platform.

This role is for someone who can speak confidently, explain things clearly, and create engaging short-form videos daily.



We do not care about:

* Age

* Looks

* Followers

* Fancy setup



We care about:

* Clear speaking voice

* Trustworthy presence

* Confidence on camera

* Good English communication

* Understands jobs / hiring / VA world

* Consistency and reliability



SCOPE:

* Record short TikTok/Reels style videos

* Explain job tips and remote work advice

* Show website features / point at screen

* React to hiring-related content

* Create simple daily content with personality



EXAMPLES:

* How to apply for remote jobs

* VA mistakes to avoid

* How interviews work

* Reacting to bad hiring advice

* Tips for getting hired faster



HOURS:

Full-time or part-time



PAY:

* Starting at $2 USD/hour

If performance is strong, we offer:

* Raises

* Bonuses

* Incentives based on video performance / views

* Long-term stable work



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

* Comfortable speaking on camera

* Can talk naturally and confidently

* Can work independently

* Hungry to grow with a company

* Reliable and consistent



TO APPLY, SEND:

* Short intro about yourself

* A sample video of you talking (phone video is fine)

* Why you’d be good for this role

* Your daily availability



We care more about skill and consistency than experience.

title: Phone Client Communication Specialist (Property Management, WFH)
description:
You are a capable, confident woman who takes pride in how you show up professionally: focused, reliable, and someone others can depend on.



You treat your work like it’s your own business.



You don’t just “answer calls.” You connect, influence, and move conversations forward.



You are sharp, quick-thinking, and confident speaking in English. You don’t rely on scripts to sound natural. You know how to build rapport with someone new.

• You can build rapport quickly - not robotic, not scripted, but natural and engaging.

• You are comfortable handling inbound sales inquiries and guiding warm leads toward clear next steps.

• You are resourceful and think on your feet - you don’t freeze when situations change.

• You are intelligent and proactive - you don’t wait to be told every step.

• You are comfortable influencing conversations - not aggressive sales, but confident guidance.

_____________________



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

• Night shift experience

• At least two years of work experience within the same company

• Executive assistant OR BPO experience

• Phone experience (ex: Phone customer support OR Phone sales experience)

_____________________



MINDSET REQUIREMENTS

• You take ownership - you treat the business like it’s yours

• You go the extra mile without being asked

• You are reliable, consistent, and professional every day

• You want long-term, possibly lifetime, stability - not job hopping every few years

_____________________



ABOUT US

• We value long-term tea
mbers who want stability and consistency 

• We recognize your hard work and reward you for your dedication and additional contributions 

_____________________



COMMITMENT

_____________________



FINAL NOTE

We are not looking for average. We are looking for a confident, capable woman who:

Wants to stay and grow long-term

This role involves:

Writing prompts for AI image generators and AI video animation tools

title: Social Media Content Creator (Part-Time | Remote)
description:
Locspec Building Services

At Locspec Building Services, we focus on building high-quality custom homes with a strong emphasis on detail, process, and long-term value. Our projects are design-driven and highly visual, and we’re looking for a Content Creator who can capture that properly — not just edit clips, but communicate the story behind what we do.

We’re a tight-knit team, not a high-volume content machine, and we’re looking for someone who wants to be part of that — not just complete tasks.



About the Role

This is a part-time remote position where you’ll be responsible for turning raw footage, photos, and on-site updates from our team into polished, on-brand content across our social platforms.

This role suits someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and brings ideas to the table — not someone who needs constant direction.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Editing video content (Reels, short-form, walkthroughs, before/after)

• Editing and enhancing project photos

• Creating social media posts for Instagram and

• Turning raw site footage into structured, story-driven content

• Assisting with content planning and scheduling

• Maintaining a consistent, clean, and high-end brand feel across all posts

• Working with the team to extract key 
nts from projects worth showcasing

• Supporting ad hoc tasks such as:

      - Updating website content and project uploads (Wordpress)

      - Assisting with SEO tracking and improvements (AIOSEO, RankMath, or Semrush)

      - Ensuring consistency of content across all platforms 



What We’re Looking For

• Proven experience in content creation and video editing

• Strong understanding of Australian social media trends and audience behaviour (must-have)

• Experience in construction, architecture, property, or similar industries (highly preferred)

• Confident and capable using content tools (not beginner level) including:

      - CapCut (or equivalent for short-form editing) 

      - Canva (for structured, on-brand posts) 

      - Adobe Suite — particularly Photoshop and InDesign 

      - Solid understanding of exporting, formatting, and optimising content for different platforms 

• Ability to take rough, unstructured input and turn it into polished, engaging content

• Strong eye for detail, pacing, and visual consistency

• Self-driven with initiative — able to suggest ideas, not just execute tasks

• Reliable and consistent — we value commitment and follow-through

• Open to feedback and multiple rounds of revisions to ensure content aligns with brand standards.

• Someone who wants to be part of a small, tight team, not a large agency environment

• We value ownership, consistency, and follow-through — this role suits someone who wants to be part of a team long-term, not just complete tasks project-by-project



Why Join Locspec

• Be part of a growing, quality-focused building company

• Work on real projects with strong visual outcomes

• Have genuine input into the direction of the brand — your ideas will be used

• Long-term opportunity for the right person who takes ownership of the role



To Apply

Please send:

• Your resume

• Links to your portfolio or past work (Carousels, Raw photos edited on Photoshop, reels)

• A brief note on your experience with Australian-based content

• Your availability



Please include the word “Process” in your application so we know you’ve read through the role.

title: If You Only Edit Short-Form… Don’t Apply (Long-Form Editor Needed)
description:
Most video editors can’t do this.



And that’s not an insult…



It’s just reality.





If your entire skillset is:



- Adding captions

- Zoom cuts every 2 seconds

- Throwing random B-roll on top of talking heads

- Matching words to text like karaoke



This is NOT for you.



Seriously… don’t apply.





Because what we’re building requires a completely different brain.





What we actually need (read this twice):



In short someone who can edit like this:


/watch?v=zIN5dGq5Wjs


/watch?v=D3lhrrXb4WI&t=92s



We’re looking for a long-form video editor who can:



Zoom OUT before they zoom in



Understand the point of a video before touching the timeline



Edit with intention… not decoration



Tie every cut, visual, and pacing decision back to a bigger narrative



This is NOT about making things “more engaging” with noise.



This is about making things more compelling with structure.





Here’s the problem we keep running into…



Editors who come from short-form think:



“More visuals = better edit”



So what happens?



- Every sentence gets a caption

- Every 3 seconds gets a cut

- Every idea gets drowned in unnecessary B-roll



And the final product?



Feels busy… but empty.



Looks edited… but not thought through.



We don’t want that.





What great looks like to us:



You watch a 20-minute video…



And you’re not thinking about transitions or effects…



You’re locked into the story.



Everything feels intentional.



Every cut earns its place.



The pacing breathes.



And when it ends…



You remember the message.





This role is for you if:



You’ve edited long-form content (10+ minutes) like:



- YouTube videos

- Podcast videos



And more importantly…



You think in:



- Narrative arcs

- Retention flow

- Emotional pacing

- Information hierarchy



Not just:



- Effects

- Presets

- Templates





Damaging truth:



This kind of editing is slower.



It takes more thinking.



More rewatching.



More restraint.



BUT…



The end result is 10x more powerful…



And that’s what we care about.





What you’ll be responsible for:



Taking raw long-form footage and shaping it into a cohesive, compelling story



Making editing decisions based on the goal of the video… not habits



Enhancing clarity, flow, and retention without over-editing



Knowing when to add… and when to leave things alone





What we don’t care about:



- Fancy transitions

- Overused editing tricks

- How fast you can pump out clips





What we DO care about:



- Taste



- Judgment



- Restraint



- Storytelling ability



PS. You should be able to handle basic color grading inside DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut.



Nothing crazy…



But enough to make footage feel clean, consistent, and intentional.





How to apply (this is important):



Do NOT send us short-form edits.



We will ignore them.



Instead, send:



2–3 long-form projects (10+ minutes) you’ve edited



And tell us:



- What was the goal of the video?

- What editing decisions did you make to support that goal?

- What did you intentionally choose NOT to do… and why?





If you read this and thought:



“Finally… someone gets it.”



We want to see your work.





If you read this and thought:



“This seems like overthinking editing…”



This is not for you.





If this feels obvious to you…



You’re probably who we’re looking for.



Send your portfolio.

title: Customer Service Manager
description:
Hello Future Employee,



Who are we?



We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating Shopify brand stores across the USA and beyond, generating consistent 6-figure monthly revenue. We specialize in emotionally-driven direct response advertising.



We are hiring a Customer Service Manager to bring structure, systems, and accountability to our backend operations. The right candidate is a builder, someone who walks into a fast-moving operation, identifies what's broken or unorganized, and installs the SOPs, dashboards, and processes that make the machine run. You will report directly to the co-founder and be the main point of contact for backend operations across the business.



**Responsibilities:**



- Build out systems and SOPs across the Customer Service, Supply Chain and Disputes/Chargebacks departments (the operation isn't very organized right now, this is your starting point)

- Own KPI tracking and accountability for each backend department: Disputes, Customer Service, and Supply Chain

- Hire and onboard tea
mbers for those departments (with co-founder support in the beginning)

- Identify bottlenecks, design the fix, document the process, and train the team on it

- Manage performance: make sure each department actually hits the KPIs you set



**You are the perfect fit if you have these qualities:**



- Demonstrable experience building workflows or systems from scratch in an e-commerce or operational environment — you can show us specific examples of processes you've designed and rolled out

- Hands-on familiarity with Shopify backend operations (orders, fulfillment, refunds, disputes, customer service workflows)

- A strong operator mindset: you see chaos and your instinct is to map it, document it, and systematize it

- Comfortable hiring, training, and holding tea
mbers accountable to KPIs

- Self-directed — you take a goal and run with it, you don't wait for step-by-step instructions

- Strong written communication for SOPs, briefs, and team comms



**To apply, please include:**



- 2–3 examples of prior workflows, SOPs, or systems you've personally built (screenshots, Loom walkthroughs, Notion links, or written descriptions are all fine)

- A short note on the team size you've managed and the KPIs you owned

- Your experience with Shopify and any e-commerce backend tools (Gorgias, Reamaze, ClickUp, dispute platforms, etc.)

- Include **"COF"** at the top of your application to confirm you've read the full post



**What we offer:**



- 100% remote work setup

- Starting salary of $750/month with performance-based bonusses.

- Direct mentorship from the co-founder

- Real ownership over backend operations from day one

- Long-term growth potential as the team scales



If you are an operator at heart, thrive on bringing order to chaos, and want to own a backend from the ground up, we'd love to hear from you.



Best Regards,

Heritage And Hearth LLC

title: Seeking Writers For Books-related Content
description:
I am looking for an experienced English writer to write multiple articles in the "Books" niche.



The articles would mostly cover book news, such as new releases and adaptations. But I also need listicles on "best books" and "author books in order."



Requirements:



- You must be a book reader, obviously. I need someone who loves reading and wants a job that lets them read more books.

- You need to be up-to-date with the latest book releases and new book announcements.

- Independent writers (not company or team)

- Native in English, excellent grammar, no spelling errors.

- You need to be able to write 2-4 news articles daily (these will be short articles, not super long) and at least one long listicle.

- You need to deliver articles on time. (If you can't due to some reasons, then you should infor
 beforehand.)

- I will have ownership of all the articles.



Article requirements:



- The articles MUST be unique and original, and the content must not be copied from any other sites. It will be thoroughly checked.

- These articles should be written in natural language. It's a plus if the articles are SEO-optimized so they can rank naturally in search results as well.



To get you started, I will provide you with the article titles and the book titles you need to cover, as well as a template you can follow when writing articles.



But it will be a huge plus if you are up to date on the latest book announcements and can write articles as soon as the news breaks, without my input.



*** NOTE: This is an urgent project. Please apply only if you can start writing within the next two weeks. ***



Please let me know if you have any questions.



*** If you can't accept the above requirements, then this job is not for you ***



Please start your application with the word TRISOLARIS so that I know you have read and understood what is required. Any application that starts without it will be automatically rejected.

title: Senior bookkeeper
description:
We are an Australian CFO advisory and accounting practice working with a growing portfolio of small to medium businesses across multiple industries. Our team delivers bookkeeping, tax, compliance, and strategic CFO advisory services to clients who rely on us for accurate, timely financial management. 

This is not a junior data entry role. We are looking for an experienced bookkeeper who can work independently, take full ownership of their client base, and be trusted with complex accounts from day one.

What You Will Be Doing

Client Bookkeeping — Day to Day Execution

• Perform weekly bank reconciliations in Xero across multiple client accounts

• Match and process transactions using Hubdoc — review, code, and attach supporting documents

• Code transactions accurately to correct accounts using client chart of accounts

• Handle exceptions — suspense coding, personal expenses, unidentified transfers — following firm SOP

• Maintain the exceptions log and flag items requiring partner review

• Ensure Xero unreconciled transactions at end of each weekly cycle

Quality and Compliance

• Ensure all work follows the firm’s documented Standard Operating Procedures

• Maintain GST coding accuracy across all client accounts

description:

The Role

The role requires judgment, structure, and independence. You will act as a close partner to the CEO, ensuring priorities are managed, information is organized, and execution keeps pace with decision-making. Due to the level of trust required, this role demands full professional focus and availability.

- Strong written and spoken English with a professional business tone

title: Shopify Theme Designer
description:
Location: Remote

Type: Freelance / Contract / Full-Time (flexible)



About the Role:



We are looking for an experienced Shopify Theme Designer who can create beautiful, user-friendly, and high-converting Shopify stores. The ideal candidate is not just technically skilled with Shopify, but also has a strong design sense and understands how to blend aesthetics with performance.



Your job will be to design custom Shopify themes (or heavily customize existing ones) that look visually stunning, match brand identity, and most importantly, are optimized for conversion and sales.



Responsibilities



- Design and develop Shopify themes that are visually appealing and mobile-friendly.

- Create layouts that balance beauty with functionality for seamless user experience (UX).

- Ensure designs are conversion-focused, including product page layouts, landing pages, and checkout flow optimization.

- Customize Shopify themes with HTML, CSS, Liquid, and JavaScript where needed.

- Collaborate with our team to translate business goals into design-driven solutions.

- Stay up to date with the latest Shopify design trends and eCommerce best practices.



Requirements

- Proven experience designing Shopify stores (please provide portfolio examples).

- Strong design skills with a keen eye for typography, spacing, and modern aesthetics.

- Deep familiarity with Shopify ecosystem (themes, apps, integrations).

- Experience creating high-converting eCommerce stores (understanding CRO principles is a big plus).

- Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and deliver polished results.



Nice to Have



- Knowledge of UX/UI best practices in eCommerce.

- Experience with graphic design tools (Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop, etc.).

- Understanding of A/B testing and conversion optimization.

- Previous work with premium or niche brands.



What We’re Looking For

We’re not just looking for a developer, and not just a designer. We want someone who understands both sides—who can make a Shopify store not only look amazing but also perform exceptionally well in terms of conversions.



If you are passionate about designing beautiful, high-converting Shopify stores and have the portfolio to prove it, we’d love to hear from you!

title: B2B Growth Specialist / Cold Caller
description:
## **Job Title: B2B Growth Specialist / Cold Caller**

**Company:** Pylon Partners



Pylon Partners is looking for a relentless "Hunter" to onboard businesses into our ecosystem. We specialize in providing Automated Lead Capture and Nurture systems for the Home Care and Home Services industries. 



We provide the tech, the scripts, and the leads—you provide the voice that closes the gap between a business owner’s problem and our solution. This is a purely performance-based role designed for someone who wants to build a massive **residual income** stream.



---



### **The Value Proposition**

You aren't just selling a service; you are selling **time and growth.** You will be calling business owners in the Home Care and Home Services sectors (HVAC, Roofing, Plumbing, etc.) to show them how Pylon Partners automates their lead capture and follow-up so they never miss a customer again.



---



### **Job Responsibilities**

* **Outbound Prospecting:** Execute high-volume cold calls to business owners and decision-makers in the home services and home care sectors.

* **Lead Qualification:** Identify pain points in a business's current lead handling and present our automation as the definitive solution.

* **Onboarding & Closing:** Manage the full sales cycle from the initial cold call to onboarding the business into the Pylon Partners system.

* **Pipeline Management:** Maintain an organized follow-up system to ensure no potential partner falls through the cracks.

* **Relationship Retention:** Act as the primary point of contact for your onboarded businesses to ensure they remain active (protecting your monthly residual).



---



### **The Compensation: Uncapped Residual Growth**

We pay for the **lifetime value** of the client. As long as the business you onboard stays with Pylon Partners, you get paid.



* **$300 USD Monthly Residual:** For every business you onboard, you receive $300 every single month they remain a client.

* **$1,000 USD Stackable Base:** For every 5 active clients you maintain in a month, you unlock a $1,000 USD base pay.



**Potential Earnings:**

* **5 Active Businesses:** $1,500 (Residuals) + $1,000 (Base) = **$2,500/mo**

* **10 Active Businesses:** $3,000 (Residuals) + $2,000 (Base) = **$5,000/mo**

* **20 Active Businesses:** $6,000 (Residuals) + $4,000 (Base) = **$10,000/mo**



---



### **What We Provide**

We handle the technical heavy lifting so you can focus on the conversation.

* **Proven Systems:** You are selling an automated lead nurture engine that works.

* **Full Sales Kit:** Access to battle-tested B2B scripts, strategies, and phone lists.

* **Total Autonomy:** No set hours. If you deliver results, you manage your own day.

* **Loyalty:** If you take care of the growth, Pylon Partners will take care of you with the best care possible.



---



### **The Requirements & Performance Clause**

* **B2B Grit:** You are comfortable speaking to business owners and handling objections.

* **Output-Driven:** You understand that **no output = no pay.**

* **The 30-Day Rule:** We move fast. **If one month passes and zero businesses are onboarded, you will be laid off immediately.**



---



### **How to Apply**

Send your application to
  

remove spaces on the

To be considered, you **must** submit:

1. **Resume.**

2. **Cover Letter.**

3. **1-Minute Voice Recording:** Explain your past experience in B2B cold calling and why you’re the right person to represent Pylon Partners.

Experience building with Closebot AI bots

Experience building with Make, Zapier, n8n

Experience running paid ads on Meta or Google through HighLevel

A proactive, can-do attitude and love for learning new things



We've worked with talented tea
mbers from the Philippines before and value flexibility — as long as the work is done with care and quality, we trust you. Most of our clients are based in the US, so you must be able to work 9 AM – 5 PM EST.



You'll also be supported by other full-time HighLevel consultants on our team who can help you get ramped up.



How to Apply:



Fill out our Google Form and make sure to include the keyword "OCTOPUS" in your response to the first question: "Where did you hear about this position?" Only applications that include the keyword and are submitted via the Google Form will be considered.



Apply here:



We're excited to learn more about you and (hopefully!) welcome you to the team!

title: AI Video Specialist
description:
Background

We’re a fast-growing social media agency producing high-performing short-form content across Instagram,
, YouTube, and more.



We’re looking for a full-time AI Video Specialist to create AI-generated clips and turn them into polished, high-retention videos using our internal workflows.



This is an execution-focused role, not strategy.



You’ll be working from clear briefs, proven systems, and step-by-step SOPs for every task.



If you haven’t used every tool in our stack yet, that’s completely fine. We’ll train the right person.



What You’ll Do

- Video Editing

- Turn raw footage into engaging short-form content (Reels, Shorts)

- Add captions, overlays, transitions, sound design, and B-roll using CapCut

- Follow brand guidelines and client briefs with precision

- Incorporate feedback quickly and accurately

- Deliver consistent daily output, on time

- Maintain consistency across multiple client accounts



AI Clip Generation

- Create AI video assets using tools like Veo3 and HeyGen

- Execute SOPs exactly (prompts, settings, and formats are predefined)

- Review all outputs for quality (accuracy, artifacts, exports) before submission

- Flag issues and suggest improvements to workflows

- Keep all assets organized and clearly labeled for handoff



General

- Manage multiple client projects without missing deadlines

- Maintain clean, structured file systems

- Communicate proactively about progress, timelines, and blockers



Requirements

- Must-Haves

- Proven experience editing short-form content (portfolio required)

- Strong English communication skills (written and spoken)

- Solid proficiency in CapCut

- Start your application with the word “hook” so we know you’ve read the full job description

- Comfortable following structured SOPs (execute first, refine second)

- High attention to detail and quality

- Ability to manage multiple projects at once

- Reliable internet and a dedicated workspace

- Minimum 2 hours of timezone overlap with the team (based in the US & Canada)

- Coachable, adaptable, and quick to learn new tools



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience with AI video tools (Veo3, HeyGen, etc.)

- Background in an agency or content production environment

- Understanding of short-form performance (hooks, pacing, retention)

- Familiarity with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar tools

- Access to a VPN with a dedicated IP



What We Offer

- Stable, full-time remote role with consistent workload

- Clear systems and SOPs — no guesswork

- Training on AI tools for the right candidate

- Direct communication and fast feedback

- Growth opportunities as we scale

- Performance bonuses (up to 50% of monthly pay, dependent on performance)

- Access to all required tools



How to Apply:



Include all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed:

- Portfolio or reel (Drive, Notion, or direct links)

- 2–3 talking head edits

- AI-generated video samples (if available)

- Short answer (3–5 sentences): What do you do when an SOP is unclear?

- Your timezone + working hours



No portfolio = no review.
