title: Junior Account Manager
description:
Employment Type: Full-Time (part-time trial period possible)

Reports to: Senior Account Manager (Ophelia), with a direct line to the Director (Marcel)



About King Henry

At King Henry, we help businesses Rule HubSpot Like Kings! We're a bold, fast-growing HubSpot Platinum Solutions Partner studio based in Melbourne. Our clients trust us to make HubSpot actually work for them, and our team is small, sharp, and growing fast.

We're hiring our first Junior Account Manager to work alongside our Senior Account Manager and Senior Solutions Architect. This is a foundational role: you'll be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks, every action item lands in our project management system, and our clients feel looked after at every step. If you do this role well, you'll have an enormous impact on the entire business.



Role Overview

The Junior Account Manager is the operational backbone of our client delivery function. You won't own client relationships in the way our Senior Account Manager does, but you will be the engine that keeps everything moving behind the scenes.

You'll be:

- reviewing meeting transcripts

- populating our project management system, ‘Teamwork’, with tasks

- chasing the team for project updates

- triaging Help Desk tickets

- following up with clients on outstanding inputs

- monitoring budgets and timelines

- keeping our CRM data clean.



Your job is to ensure that the Senior Account Manager and Senior Solutions Architect can spend their time on strategy and delivery, not on admin.

This role suits someone who genuinely loves the satisfaction of a tidy system, a closed loop, and a checklist with all boxes ticked. You'll be highly proactive, technologically curious, and quick to learn. You'll be working in modern tools every day (HubSpot, Teamwork, Fireflies, Slack, Notion, Gmail) and using AI as a daily accelerator.



Key Responsibilities Below:



Meeting & Action Item Management

- Review every client meeting transcript in Fireflies after the meeting ends.

- Audit transcripts for action items, agreements, risks, and commitments that need to be logged somewhere.

- Create clear, actionable tasks in Teamwork for every action item, with descriptions detailed enough that anyone on the team can pick them up and run.

- Flag agreements made on calls (commitments, deadlines, scope shifts) so the Senior Account Manager can review and confirm them with the client where needed.



Teamwork & Project Hygiene

- Populate Teamwork tasks, sub-tasks, due dates, and assignees based on strategy documents, meeting outputs, and direction from the Senior Account Manager.

- Maintain Gantt charts and project timelines, keeping start dates and due dates accurate as projects evolve.

- Monitor every active project weekly for movement, blockers, and missed dates. Surface issues to the Senior Account Manager rather than acting unilaterally.

- Help the team keep their time logs up to date by sending friendly reminders, flagging missing logs, and assisting where reasonable.



Internal Chasing & Follow-Through

- Chase internal tea
mbers for project updates to ensure nothing is ever overdue or not communicated to our clients.

- Send concise update requests via Slack or Teamwork comments and consolidate responses for the Senior Account Manager to review when issues emerge.

- Ensure no client goes more than a defined window without a check-in or update.



Help Desk Triage

- Monitor the King Henry help desk inbox throughout the day.

- Triage incoming tickets: assign categories, tag urgency, route to the correct tea
mber, and flag anything genuinely urgent to the Senior Account Manager, Senior Solutions Architect or Director immediately.

- Identify tickets that have been sitting too long without a response and escalate them.



Client Follow-Up Support

- Make short, friendly follow-up calls or send follow-up
s to clients on behalf of the Senior Account Manager. These could be chasing pending inputs, confirming receipt of deliverables, scheduling of meetings or reminding clients of upcoming sessions.

- These are the small five-minute tasks that the Senior Account Manager doesn't have time for, but which collectively make a huge difference to client experience and project velocity.

- Always work from a script or template provided by the Senior Account Manager and never make commercial commitments, scope decisions, or strategic recommendations to clients.



Budget & Timeline Monitoring

- Review project budgets and timelines weekly using HubSpot & Teamwork reporting.

- Flag projects that are tracking over budget, behind schedule, or have other potential risks, to the Senior Account Manager, with enough context that they can act fast.

- You will not make commercial decisions or have direct conversations with clients about budgets. You're the early warning system; the Senior Account Manager and Director own the response.



CRM Data Hygiene

- Keep our HubSpot CRM clean: deduplicate records, fix formatting issues, ensure properties are populated where required, and tidy up associations between contacts, companies, and deals.

- Maintain data quality across our Teamwork project data too: correct project names, accurate budget fields, up-to-date deliverable lists.

- Run regular data audits and surface inconsistencies for review.



Continuous Improvement

- Help us build SOPs as you go. Every recurring task you do should have a documented process by the time you've done it three times.

- Suggest improvements where you see them. We're a small team that listens, and good ideas from anyone get acted on quickly.



Success Metrics

- Action item capture rate: % of meeting action items that make it into Teamwork within 24 hours of the meeting ending.

- Task quality: % of tasks created with complete descriptions, due dates, assignees, and time estimates.

- Help desk responsiveness: % of help desk tickets triaged and routed within target SLA.

- Project visibility: Senior Account Manager can answer any question about any client's status within 30 seconds.

- Time log completeness: % of team time logs filled in on time each week.

- CRM data quality: Reduction in duplicate, missing, or malformed CRM records over time.

- Things that didn't fall through the cracks: Measured qualitatively by the Senior Account Manager. Has anything important been missed?



What You Bring to the Table

We're looking for someone who is genuinely a fit for our team. This is more than a checklist of skills.

- Wacky, bubbly personality. We're a small, fun team with strong personalities. You should be the kind of person who lights up a Slack channel and brings energy to every call.

- Hard-working and fast. You move quickly. You don't sit on tasks. When you finish something, you go looking for the next thing rather than waiting to be told.

- Incredible attention to detail. You notice the typo, the missing field, the date that doesn't quite line up. Details are not negotiable in this role.

- Excellent written and spoken communication. You write clean, friendly, professional English using Australian English spelling. You can pick up a phone and have a quick warm conversation with a client without needing a script.

- Proactive and takes initiative, safely. You don't wait to be told. You spot things, raise them, and propose solutions. You also know where the line is: you check in before doing anything that affects clients commercially or strategically.

- AI-curious and AI-capable. You already use AI tools daily (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar). You're excited to learn how to use them better and to build on the AI tooling we're rolling out internally.

- Technologically capable. You can pick up new SaaS tools quickly. You're comfortable in CRMs, project management tools, ticketing systems, and you'd happily poke around in a HubSpot workflow editor or a Teamwork report to figure out how something works.

- Time zone overlap. Our working hours are 9am to 5:30p
lbourne time and require your work hours to fit within these constraints.



Nice to Have

- Previous experience in an agency, consulting studio, or customer success environment.

- Any familiarity with HubSpot, Teamwork, Fireflies, Slack, Notion, Claude or Gmail.

- Previous usage of the CRM HubSpot is highly desirable, but we will teach you regardless.

- Experience supporting a remote team across time zones.

- A genuine interest in CRM, marketing operations, or revenue operations.



Why This Role Matters

- You'll free up our Senior Account Manager to focus on client strategy and relationships, not admin.

- You'll free up our Senior Solutions Architect to focus on client delivery, not admin.

- You'll be the reason that clients never feel forgotten, even on quiet weeks.

- You'll be the reason that nothing important slips through the cracks.

- You'll have a direct, measurable impact on King Henry's quality of service and profitability.



Why Join King Henry?

- Work with a small, supportive, ambitious team that values your growth.

- Fully remote with flexibility around how and when you work.

- Be part of one of the fastest-growing HubSpot Solutions Partners in Australia.

- Work in a business that takes AI seriously. You'll be using and helping shape internal AI tools every day.

- Real career progression. As we grow, this role grows with you. We're explicitly hiring this as a foundational position, not a dead-end admin role.



Where Can You Grow?

- Build out the Account Management playbook alongside the Senior Account Manager.

- Take on more direct client relationship work as you build trust and HubSpot knowledge.

- Move into a full Account Manager role over time, with your own portfolio of clients.

- Help shape and run the onboarding Program for future Junior Account Managers as we scale.

- Become a HubSpot certified professional, fully funded by King Henry.

title: Paid Media & Funnel Specialist
description:
PAID MEDIA & FUNNEL SPECIALIST

Company: BellaFina Outdoors



Employment Type: Independent Contractor / Retainer



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring a Paid Media & Funnel Specialist who can build, launch, and optimize a full lead generation system — not just run ads.



You will be responsible for turning paid traffic into:

• Qualified leads

• Booked appointments

• Real business growth

If your experience is limited to boosting posts or basic ad setup, this role is not a fit.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Paid Media Campaigns

• Launch and manage Meta and Google Ads campaigns

• Target U.S. audiences (contractors + homeowners)

• Optimize for cost per lead and booked appointments

2. Funnel Building (Critical)

• Build funnels: Ad ? Landing Page ? Lead Form ? Booking

• Improve conversion rates and user flow

3. Landing Pages & CRO

• Create or guide high-converting landing pages

• A/B test headlines, offers, and CTAs

4. Tracking & Reporting

• Set up Meta Pixel and Google tracking

• Integrate with CRM (GHL or similar)

• Weekly reporting on CPL and performance

5. Retargeting & Optimization

• Build retargeting campaigns

• Improve lead quality over time



REQUIREMENTS

• 3–5+ years paid media experience

• Proven lead generation results

• Experience with Meta Ads & Google Ads

• Strong understanding of funnels and conversions



PREFERRED

• U.S. client experience

• Construction / home services / real estate experience

• CRM familiarity (GHL preferred)



COMPENSATION

• Monthly retainer to be negotiated



WHAT WE ARE NOT LOOKING FOR

• Social media-only managers

• No funnel experience

• Basic ad boosters



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:

1. Campaign examples (platform, budget, results)

2. Average cost per lead and industries worked in

3. Answer: How would you generate leads for a U.S.-based outdoor design center?



IMPORTANT FILTER

Applications without specific campaign results will not be considered.

title: Staff Accountant (QuickBooks Online) – Immediate Opening (Remote)
description:
We are a U.S.-based fractional CFO firm working with growing service-based businesses. We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Staff Accountant who takes ownership of the books and keeps everything clean, current, and accurate.



This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who already knows what they’re doing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Weekly transaction categorization (must stay current, no backlog)



Bank and credit card reconciliations (core part of the role)



Maintaining clean, accurate QuickBooks Online files



Supporting a fast and accurate month-end close (by the 10th)



Identifying and fixing discrepancies before they become issues



Working directly with the founder and team on financial workflows



What Success Looks Like

Transactions are categorized weekly



Reconciliations are clean and up to date



Month-end is closed by the 10th consistently



Minimal errors, minimal follow-up needed



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



US Accounting Experience



2–3+ years of hands-on QuickBooks Online experience



Strong reconciliation experience (you’ve done this consistently)



Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time (9am–5pm EST)



Reliable, fast internet (we are on calls regularly)



Strong written and spoken English



Excellent communication, proactive updates



Self-starter, you manage your work without constant direction



What We’re Looking For

Someone who takes pride in clean, organized books



Someone who is timely and consistent, not reactive



Someone who communicates clearly and follows through



Someone dependable, no chasing, no excuses



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience

Paid twice monthly via Wise or Paypal



To Apply (Read Carefully)

Your earliest start date (we are hiring immediately)



A short 2–3 minute video introduction covering:



Your QuickBooks Online experience

Qualifications:

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail

- Excellent communication and customer service skills

- Ability to multitask and manage competing priorities

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote environment

- Experience with AppFolio is a strong plus

- Must be willing to work full-time within US Central business hours



Apply here:

title: Guest Experience Representative - Food Service Account
description:
Now Hiring: Guest Experience Representative - Food Service Account (PH-based)

Shift: 10 AM – 10 PM Pacific Time (Night Shift PH)

100% Remote | 50+ hours/week



We’re on the lookout for a Guest Experience Rep to join a fun, fast-moving U.S. food brand. You’ll be part of the team that keeps our customers happy and our operations running smoothly. If you're someone who communicates well, loves solving problems, and can stay cool under pressure—we’d love to work with you!



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Respond to guest questions and concerns through
, SMS, and occasional calls

- Help with live delivery issues, working behind the scenes to make things right in real time

- Coordinate with our kitchen and service teams to ensure everything goes off without a hitch

- Keep every guest experience smooth, quick, and friendly



What We're Looking For:

- 3+ years in customer support, eCommerce, or client-facing roles (especially with U.S. brands)

- Background in hospitality or food service is a big plus

- Experience using delivery platforms (like UberEats, DoorDash, etc.)

title: CRM & AUTOMATION SPECIALIST
description:
Company: BellaFina Outdoors (U.S.-based Outdoor Design Center)

Schedule: Flexible (some overlap with U.S. hours preferred)



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a CRM & Automation Specialist to clean up, structure, and optimize our CRM system (Go High Level or similar). This role ensures leads are properly captured, tracked, and followed up to support business growth.

This is a build + optimize role, not just maintenance.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. CRM Cleanup & Structuring

• Audit current CRM setup

• Fix
 routing and lead capture issues

• Organize pipelines, stages, tags, and segmentation

2. Lead Capture & Routing

• Ensure all leads (website, ads, forms) flow into CRM correctly

• Set up proper lead tracking and assignment

3. Automation Setup

• Build workflows including:

  - New lead SMS +
 confirmation

  - Follow-up sequences (Day 1, 2, 3, 7)

  - Appointment confirmations and reminders

  - No-show recovery

• Connect landing pages to CRM

• Support tracking from ad ? lead ? booking

REQUIREMENTS

• 2–4+ years CRM and automation experience

• Experience with Go High Level (GHL) or similar platforms

PREFERRED

COMPENSATION

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

WHAT WE ARE NOT LOOKING FOR

title: Social Media Manager — Jewelry Brand Remote | Part-time (20 hrs/week) | $5–$8/hr
description:
**About the Role**



We are a jewelry brand looking for a creative and self-driven Social Media Manager to take full ownership of our social media presence. This is a remote, part-time role (20 hrs/week) open to candidates based in the Philippines.



You will be responsible for planning, creating, and publishing content across all social media platforms — no hand-holding. We need someone who can work independently, think like a brand, and consistently deliver quality content.



All hours are tracked via Time Doctor. You must be comfortable installing and using it before your first shift.



---



**Responsibilities**



- Manage and grow all social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok,
, Pinterest, etc.)

- Independently create content — graphics, captions, Reels/Shorts — aligned with brand aesthetics

- Develop and execute monthly content calendars

- Research trending topics, hashtags, and competitors in the jewelry/fashion space

- Monitor and respond to DMs, comments, and community engagement

- Track analytics and submit monthly performance reports

- Coordinate with influencers or UGC creators when needed

- Stay current with platform algorithm changes and best practices



---



**Requirements**



- 2–3years of social media management experience

- Experience with jewelry, fashion, or lifestyle brands

- Strong visual design skills (Canva, Adobe Photoshop/Illustrator)

- Proficient in creating Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts

- Solid understanding of hashtag strategy and organic reach

- Familiar with analytics tools (Meta Business Suite, Instagram Insights, etc.)

- Experience with content scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, or similar)

- Basic knowledge of product photography and jewelry styling

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Stable internet connection

- Comfortable using Time Doctor for time tracking



---



**Nice to Have**



- Experience with influencer outreach or UGC coordination

- Adobe Premiere or CapCut video editing skills

- Pinterest strategy experience



---



**Job Details**



- Hours: 20 hrs/week

- Pay: $5–$8/hr depending on experience and portfolio

- Time tracking: Time Doctor required during all working hours

- Contract type: Independent contractor

- Start date: ASAP



---



**Hiring Process**



1. Application review — We review your resume, portfolio, and links to accounts you have managed.

2. Sample work — Shortlisted candidates will be given a short sample task (e.g., 2–3 sample posts or a mini content calendar for a jewelry brand).

3. Interview — Candidates who pass the sample work stage will be invited to a short video interview.

4. Offer — Successful candidates will receive an offer with onboarding and Time Doctor setup details.



---



**How to Apply**



Please send the following:

- Brief introduction and summary of your relevant experience (resume)

- Portfolio or links to social media accounts you have managed

- Your availability and expected hourly rate



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. We are looking for someone who truly understands the jewelry and fashion aesthetic and takes initiative without being asked.

title: Graphic Designer — Apparel and Print
description:
God Ain't Petty But I Am® is a politically bold, unapologetically progressive apparel brand based in Phoenix, AZ. We drop new statement designs multiple times per week and need a designer who can take written statements and turn them into bold, print-ready t-shirt graphics.



What you will do: Receive written statements from the founder, design bold print-ready t-shirt graphics, upload finished designs to Shopify, and coordinate with our operations team on product listings. All designs must be returned the same day they are assigned.



What we need: Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, or Kittl. Strong typographic instincts. Our designs are text-forward, and the typography has to hit. Experience with apparel or print design preferred. Reliable same-day turnaround. This is non-negotiable. If you cannot commit to same-day delivery, please do not apply.



Important: We are a human design studio. We do not use AI image generation tools such as Midjourney, Ideogram, or similar platforms. Please do not apply if your process relies on these tools.



Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test project of 3 t-shirt designs for $20. You will also be required to submit a screen recording of yourself completing the test project using Loom or any screen recording tool. This confirms the work is your own. The test project must be completed on the same day to be considered.



To apply: Send your application with at least 3 examples of apparel or typographic design work. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Short Form Video Editor — Daily Same Day
description:
God Ain't Petty, But I Am® is a politically bold, unapologetic apparel brand based in Phoenix, AZ. We create 2+ short form videos daily for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, and need a fast, reliable editor to receive raw footage and return finished files the same day.



What you will do: Receive raw vertical video footage from the founder daily, add captions, edit for pacing and flow, format finished files for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, and return all completed videos the same day they are received.



What we need: Proficiency in CapCut or Premiere Pro. Strong experience editing short-form vertical video, 30 to 60 seconds in length. Ability to add accurate captions. Reliable same-day turnaround. This is non-negotiable. All raw footage submitted by 8 am Phoenix time (MST) must be returned by 1 pm Phoenix time. If you cannot commit to this schedule, please do not apply. Consistent daily availability Monday through Saturday.



Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test project of 2 to 3 short-form video edits for $15. You will also be required to submit a screen recording of yourself completing the edit using Loom or any screen recording tool. This confirms the work is your own. The test project must be completed on the same day to be considered.



To apply: Send your application with at least 3 examples of short-form vertical video edits you have completed. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Social Media & Content Producer
description:
About Hair Clubs

Hair Clubs is a B2B SaaS loyalty platform that helps ambitious salon owners retain clients and grow their business without doing any marketing — by turning their clients into the marketing team. We’re building a brand that looks and feels like nothing else in the hair industry. Think run club meets hair. The creative bar is high. The pace is fast. 



The Role

You are the person who can drive content ideas, structure it into a calendar rhythm and turn it into a published, designed, edited, captioned post — without needing three people in the middle. Right now our content pipeline has too many handoffs. We need one person who can collapse that chain for the daily output.



You’re not replacing our Art Director. She sets the brand world, leads campaigns, and produces the high-end creative. You’re the daily engine — the person who keeps the grid alive, the stories running, the comments answered, and the content flowing without bottlenecking anyone else on the team. 





The most important thing: you think about what happens after you post. Every post exists to create a response, and when that response comes, someone needs to be on the other end. That someone is you. Additionally, you think of how we capture people’s information from socials and move it into our database and you’re not afraid to ask the engineers to build an automation to do that.



Content Production (60%)

 • Design social assets in Photoshop — tiles, carousels, EDM graphics, cover tiles, thumbnails

 • Edit short-form video for Reels, Stories, and TikTok (CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci)

 • Create reel cover tiles independently without needing the Art Director for every post

 • Build and maintain reusable templates for recurring content formats

 • Produce EDM creative (graphic design)

 • Repurpose long-form content (podcast episodes) into short-form clips

 • Work with the Art Director on brand-level creative when needed, but own the daily output independently

 • create copy 



Social Media Management (40%)

 • Own the Hair Clubs, YSS and CWGL  Instagram end-to-end — ideation, creation, posting, engagement

 • Write captions and CTAs that connect into the customer journey

 • Respond to every comment and DM same-day

 • Run Instagram Stories and maintain Highlights

 • Manage the Hair Clubs broadcast channel

 • Schedule and repost existing show content to secondary channels

 • Default to collaboration on all tagged/co-created content

 • Drop a weekly social media report every Friday



Required Tools & Skills

 • Adobe Photoshop — intermediate (layers, masks, text, export for web, template adaptation)

 • Video Editing (CapCut / Premiere / DaVinci) — intermediate (cuts, transitions, text overlays, audio sync, vertical format)

 • Claude — you already use AI in your workflow 

 • Instagram / Meta Business Suite — confident (scheduling, insights, collab posts, stories, highlights)

 • Slack, Notion, Google Workspace — working proficiency



You’ll Thrive Here If

 • You’ve run a brand’s Instagram end-to-end and can show growth, engagement, and creative range

 • Your portfolio shows design and video work, not just strategy decks

 • You’re the kind of person who sees a competitor’s post and immediately thinks “we should do our version of that”

 • You can take a 45-minute podcast and turn it into 5 reels without being given timestamps

 • You treat every post like it’s a conversation starter, not a checkbox

 • You’re comfortable working in a small, fast team where everyone sees everything





Salary negotiable





Take a look at our instagram for creative

title: Qualified Accountant / Financial Controller with UK experience 3 years plus
description:
Please only apply for this job if you have at least 3 years plus experience working for a UK company



We are a UK Property Company turning over £4 million with assets of £40 million

We need a qualified Accountant to act as a Financial Controller performing a number of internal financial roles. The right person will be familiar with UK Company Accounts and Taxation and have experience working for a UK company in a similar role. 

We operate as a group with 12 different UK Property Companies, a UK Management company and a UK Building Company. All our accounts are in Xero so Xero expertise is essential. We use excel to store our main data so excel expertise is also essential

The main roles will be as follows

1. To prepare cashflow forecasts for the Group Companies and to monitor their performance month by month and to advise the Directors how to ensure we keep in budget

2. To prepare individual budgets for the many building works we carry out and to ensure jobs are carried out on time and on budget

3. To co-ordinate planned expenditure to ensure it is affordable by each individual Property Company

4. To monitor rent allocations into Xero.

5. To monitor expenditure and to ensure that all queries raised by our bookkeeper regarding missing invoices are answered. As part of that role to look at the systems we are using to ensure that monies spent are linked to the relevant invoice. So for example when we pay bills to utility suppliers by direct debit ensuring that the relevant invoice can be found and posted

6. To monitor the activities of our bookkeeper and Accountant in the preparation of monthly accounts and yearly accounts and tax returns. 

7. To advise on tax payments due and ensure funds for payment are available

8. To advise generally on managing our various bank accounts and getting best returns from surplus funds

9. To advise the Directors on all financial matters relating to the group

Key Requirements

1. Experience working with UK companies in a similar role. Work with US or Australian companies will not qualify for this job

2. Formal Accounting qualifications

3. Xero Expertise

4. Excel Expertise

5. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English

6. Experience advising UK Companies on financial matters and the ability to give practical advice on financial problems that arise from time to time

7. The ability to monitor staff. You will be responsible for a team of 4 people which we are expecting to expand

If this is you please apply with a detailed CV

title: SPECIALIST : Google Veo3/Capcut  [Full time]Ambitious Talent

.

- Repurpose long-form content into scroll-stopping short clips.

- Bring ideas to life in fun and creative ways.

- Synthesia – Avatar and presenter-style videos

- Adobe Premiere Pro – Professional video editing

- CapCut – Social media short-form content

, Behance, or Canva. Nothing else required!

Show us your creativity and let your videos speak for themselves!

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving online company.

title: PPC Strategist
description:
Hey! We’re Dilate, a result driven digital marketing agency with an impressive, diverse client list and a world-class, global team.



It’s our mission to do great marketing, for great businesses, ethically and in a way that benefits us all. We want our clients to win, their customers to win, and our employees to win. 



We’ve got pretty ambitious growth plans and we’re looking for a PPC Strategist to join our team.



We are looking for someone with an in depth knowledge of Google Ads &
 ads would be ideal, a keen eye for detail, focused on ROI and strategic thought. Ideally you will have experience running a range of low to high budget CPA based campaigns for businesses on the agency side. 



This opportunity is remote working from home, full-time Monday to Friday 9-5 pm (AWST) as we are an agency located in Perth, Western Australia. 



So, the job...



* Develop and manage PPC campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads, ensuring they meet the target KPIs.

* Analyse performance data and adjust strategies to increase campaign efficiency and ROI.

* Understanding of Google Analytics to monitor and report on campaign performance.

* Stay updated with PPC and SEM trends, tools, and best practices to implement in campaigns.

* Provide strategic recommendations on data-driven insights.

* Manage budgets effectively, ensuring all campaigns are delivered within the allocated budget.



Your skills:



* Excellent written and spoken English

* Certified in Google Ads with a deep understanding of paid search, display, and video performance metrics.

* Experience with Google Analytics, capable of interpreting and reporting data to inform decision-making.

* Proven track record in managing successful PPC campaigns, with a strong understanding of optimisation practices for both search and display advertising.

* Good instincts for understanding of conversion rate optimisation & making the most from our websites.

* Ability to propose and write persuasive ad copy if needed.

* Strategic thinker with the ability to generate innovative ideas and translate them into actionable plans.

* Proficiency in managing
/ Instgram Ads, including segmentation, targeting, and ad creation.

* Ability to work independently and as part of a team, with a proactive approach to problem-solving.

* Hungry for knowledge, learning and personal development. 

 * At least 3mbps of stable internet connection (with a backup internet)

* MUST have a mid-level performance desktop or laptop (good for multitasking)

* MUST have a working mic & webcam



This is a huge opportunity to be a part of a fast growing agency.



If you feel that this is the job for you, we would love to hear from you! Please include your resume and cover letter.



Thanks for your time,

The Dilate Digital Team

title: Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)
description:
Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)



You live and breathe Amazon Ads. You've scaled accounts from 6 to 7 and 8 figures. You don't just "manage PPC" – you build strategies that crush the competition.



If that sounds like you, keep reading. If not, this role is not for you.



About Us

We are Fox Performance, an Amazon PPC agency founded in 2018. We work mainly with German clients, but also serve international brands across Europe and the USA. Our clients come from every industry you can imagine – supplements, beauty, home & living, pet, electronics, fashion, baby products, and more.



We are obsessed with Amazon. We test everything, read every update, break down every new beta feature, and push our clients to results they didn't think were possible. No autopilot. No "set and forget". No agency BS.

Now we are looking for a Senior Amazon PPC Manager – someone who can take full ownership of a portfolio of accounts, think strategically, and mentor junior tea
mbers along the way.



Who We Are NOT Looking For

Let's be direct. Do not apply if:



You are looking for a short-term gig or just a "bridge job" until something else comes up.

You are working multiple jobs in parallel and trying to squeeze us in on the side. We need your focus. Period.

You don't want to grow, learn, and push yourself every single week.

You want to clock in, clock out and never go beyond the bare minimum.

You see Amazon PPC as "just a job" instead of a craft you want to master.

You can't take direct, honest feedback without taking it personally.



We're not for everyone – and that's okay.

Who We ARE Looking For

We are looking for a true A-Player. Someone who:



Wants to go full throttle and be one of the best in the game.

Treats client accounts like their own business.

Is hungry, curious, and obsessed with getting better.

Wants to grow with us long-term and build a real career.

Brings energy, ideas, and ownership to the table every single day.



If that's you – we'd love to meet you.



What You'll Own



Full Account Ownership: manage a portfolio of premium client accounts end-to-end – from strategy to execution to client communication.

Advertising Strategy: build PPC strategies across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display – and where relevant, Amazon DSP and AMC.

Launch & Scale: from new product launches to aggressive scaling of existing winners – you know when to push and when to defend.

Advanced Optimization: bid strategies, placement optimization, SKU-level profitability, TACoS management, dayparting, portfolio structuring – you go way beyond dashboard-level.

Account Audits & Strategic Planning: diagnose weaknesses, identify opportunities, build 30/60/90 day roadmaps for every account.

Client Communication: lead client calls, present results, push back when needed, be the trusted expert clients rely on.

Mentorship: help our Junior PPC Managers and Assistants grow – share your playbook, review their work, develop the next generation.

Process Development: help us build better SOPs, templates and internal tools – your experience shapes how we operate.

Stay Ahead: test new Amazon features, evaluate new tools, and bring fresh ideas to the team.





What You Must Know (Non-Negotiables)

These are the things you absolutely need to have under your belt as a Senior:



Deep mastery of all Sponsored Ads formats: Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands (incl. Video & Brand Store), Sponsored Display (incl. Audiences & Custom Creatives), and how they interact.

Campaign architecture: SKAG, single-keyword, theme-based, performance-based – you know which structure works when and why.

Advanced bidding strategies: dynamic bids, placement modifiers, top-of-search optimization, bid by placement, bid hijacking defense.

Keyword research & targeting: Helium 10 (Cerebro, Magnet, Frankenstein), Brand Analytics, Search Query Performance Report (SQP) – you can pull insights most managers miss.

TACoS vs ACoS: you understand the difference, when to optimize for which, and how to communicate it to clients.

Search Term Reports & Negative Mining: you build clean, performance-focused accounts without keyword cannibalization.

Brand Defense & Conquesting: you protect your client's branded search and attack competitors strategically.

Organic & Paid Synergy: you understand how PPC influences organic ranking (and vice versa) – BSR, indexation, halo effect.

Listing Fundamentals: you know that even the best PPC can't fix a bad listing – and you can identify what needs to change.

Reporting & Storytelling: you don't just deliver numbers – you tell the story behind them.

Bulk File Operations: you can edit, optimize and upload bulk files like a surgeon.

Tool Stack: Helium 10, Brand Analytics, Pacvue / Perpetua / Adtomic / Sellerboard or similar – at least one professional ad management tool you've worked with hands-on.

Bonus (high value): Amazon DSP, AMC (Amazon Marketing Cloud), Vendor Central, international marketplaces (US, UK, DE, FR, IT, ES).



If you read this list and thought "yes, that's me" – continue. If half of these are unfamiliar, this role is not the right fit yet.



What You Bring



4+ years of hands-on Amazon Advertising experience (agency or in-house), ideally managing multiple 6- and 7-figure accounts.

Proven track record of scaling Amazon accounts profitably – with real case studies you can walk us through.

Expert-level data analysis skills – Excel / Google Sheets is your playground; pivot tables, XLOOKUP, conditional logic are second nature.

Strategic mindset – you think in frameworks, not just dashboards.

Excellent English (spoken and written). German is a big plus, but not required.

Strong communication – confident in client calls, clear in writing, direct but professional.

Ownership mentality – fully accountable, no excuses.

Stable internet and a professional remote work setup.





What We Offer

You already know the foundation we offer (100% remote, MacBook, full-time, long-term, competitive USD salary, after one year: 13th month pay, 20 days PTO, paid sick leave, Philippine holidays...).





Ownership & Growth



Clear path to Team Lead / Head of PPC – we are growing, and senior hires are who we promote from.

Voice in strategy – you help shape how the agency operates.

Direct line to leadership – no middle management, no politics.

Conference & event budget – Amazon Unboxed, PPC events, industry conferences – we send you.

Annual learning budget – courses, certifications, books, coaches – you choose.



Time & Space to Do Great Work



Flexible hours – core overlap with German business hours (2–3 hours/day), the rest is yours.

Deep Work culture – no unnecessary meetings, no micromanagement.

Real team culture – weekly team calls, virtual coffee, and annual team events.



If you read the full text start your message with "HI WOLF"

title: Inside Sales Agent — Warm Lead Caller (Remote, LATAM)
description:
We're a U.S. marketing agency that runs growth systems for high-end home remodeling contractors — kitchens, baths, additions, ADUs. Our clients are doing $2M–$15M+ a year and they hire us to keep their sales teams busy with qualified appointments.



Your job is the first call. Homeowners fill out a form on
 or Instagram saying they want a remodel quote. You call them back inside 5 minutes, qualify them, and book the appointment with the contractor.



"This is not a script-reading job. We hire people who can have a real conversation with a 55-year-old homeowner about their kitchen and make them feel like calling back was a great decision."

What you'll actually do

Call new Meta leads within 5 minutes of submission (this is non-negotiable)

Run our qualification framework — budget, timeline, decision-maker, project scope

Book qualified appointments directly into the contractor's calendar

Follow up with no-shows and unresponsive leads on a structured cadence

Log every call, every outcome, every objection in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

Show up to a 15-minute team standup every day on video

Who we're looking for

Native or near-native English — neutral accent, easy to understand for older U.S. homeowners

2+ years phone sales experience — real estate ISA, solar, home services, or insurance preferred

You like talking to people. Not pretending to. Actually liking it.

Comfortable being recorded and coached — daily call reviews are part of the job

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, real headset (not earbuds)

Available Monday–Friday, with at least one 4–8 PM CST shift block

title: Revit Modeller (MEP/Irrigation)
description:
We are seeking a skilled and experienced Revit Modeler with a primary focus on irrigation systems. The ideal candidate will have a minimum of 3 years of experience, preferably with a background in irrigation design. title: Drainage Design Engineer (Civil 3D / Revit)
description:
About Us

Water Design Engineers is an independent engineering consultancy focused on solving water in the landscape. Our work includes drainage and SuDS design, irrigation design, water feature design, constructed wetlands, water treatment coordination, and wider water infrastructure input across a range of projects.

We work closely with landscape architects, architects, developers, and other consultants to deliver practical, coordinated, technically robust design solutions.

 

The Role

We are looking for a Drainage and Water Infrastructure Design Engineer to join our team. Drainage will be the primary focus of the role, so we are looking for someone with solid experience in drainage and SuDS design who can contribute confidently to live projects from the outset.

This role is not limited to traditional drainage work. You will also support the wider team on projects involving water infrastructure, landscape-led water management, wetlands, irrigation interfaces, and related civil design coordination. We need someone who is technically capable, practical in their thinking, and willing to get involved wherever needed to help move projects forward.

We are ideally looking for someone with around 4 to 7 years of relevant experience, although strong applicants outside this range will also be considered where they can demonstrate the right technical capability, software skills, and attitude.

 

Key Responsibilities

Undertake drainage and SuDS design as the primary part of the role

Prepare drawings, design information, calculations, and technical support documents

Develop coordinated drainage layouts and levels-based solutions from available survey and design information

Use Civil 3D for drainage-related design and modelling work

Work in Revit to support model-based project coordination and design development

Coordinate with internal and external project teams including landscape architects, architects, and other consultants

Support wider water infrastructure and civil design elements where required across the company’s project portfolio

Identify technical risks, clashes, missing information, and design dependencies early

Contribute to a practical, team-focused design environment with a positive and proactive attitude

 

What We’re Looking For

Degree in Civil Engineering or similar relevant discipline

Strong drainage design experience, ideally gained over around 4 to 7 years in practice

Good working knowledge of SuDS and or external works drainage design

Proficient in Civil 3D

Able to work in Revit for design coordination

Good understanding of levels, flow paths, site constraints, and buildable design solutions

Strong communication skills and a practical, solutions-led mindset

Someone with a can-do attitude who is willing to contribute to a range of project types, not just stay in a narrow discipline box

 

Desirable

Experience working on landscape-led or multidisciplinary projects

Experience supporting drainage strategies, flood-related infrastructure, or wider water management design

Understanding of how drainage interfaces with broader external works and water infrastructure systems

 

Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to join a growing consultancy with a strong technical focus and a clear specialism in water-related design. You will be part of a team working on varied and interesting projects, with the chance to contribute beyond standard drainage design and help shape integrated water solutions across the landscape.

 

To Apply

Please send your CV at 
 and a short covering note outlining your relevant experience.

title: Outbound Sales Closer | $3,000-$6,000/mo Realistic | US SaaS Startup | Hiring Now
description:
HIRING THIS WEEK: Outbound Closer for US SaaS Startup. Commission-Heavy. No Cap.



I'm Maya. I run Vault. We help contractors stop losing money from missed phone calls.



When a contractor is on a job site and misses a call, Vault texts the customer back in 15 seconds. Simple product. Obvious value. The data sells itself.



I need one person who can get on the phone, offer something free, and close when the numbers do the talking.





THE JOB



You make two types of calls.



Call 1 is the easiest call you'll ever make. You're offering contractors a free 7-day audit that tracks every call they miss and calculates how much money they're losing. Free. No commitment. Takes them 30 seconds to set up. You're not selling anything on this call. You're giving them something valuable for free.



Call 2 is where you get paid. After 7 days the audit spits out a report. "You missed 26 calls last week. That's $94,000 a year walking out the door." You call them, walk them through their numbers, and ask if they want to keep it running for $149/month. The data is so brutal that most contractors say yes on the spot. You're not convincing anyone. You're just showing them their own money disappearing.





WHAT'S ALREADY DONE FOR YOU



You are not sourcing leads. You are not building lists. You are not cold
ing. You are not doing any admin work.



Every morning you get a fresh call list with the contractor's name, phone number, city, Google rating, and a note telling you exactly what to say. Power dialer is loaded with a US local number. Voi
 drop is recorded. SMS templates are ready to send. You open your laptop, put on your headset, and dial. That's your entire job.





PAY



$2/hr base. $75 per customer who pays. No cap. Ever.



Here's what that actually looks like:



2 closes per day: $166/day, $3,320/month

3 closes per day: $241/day, $4,820/month

4+ closes per day: $316+/day, $6,320+/month



Weekly pay through Wise or PayPal. I have never paid late and I never will.



Hit 15 paying customers in your first month and two things happen: your base goes to $3/hr permanently, and you become the sales lead. When I hire the next caller, you train them and earn overrides on their closes. This is a ground floor role at a company that is scaling fast.





WHO I'M LOOKING FOR



You've done outbound before. BPO, call center, remote sales, freelance, whatever. You've made 200+ dials in a day and it didn't faze you. You hear "commission-heavy" and you get excited because you trust your own ability. You don't need someone checking on you every hour. You show up, you dial, you perform.



Your English must be clear with a neutral or American-passing accent. You are calling US contractors. If they can't understand you or if you sound like you're in a call center overseas, they hang up. This is non-negotiable.





DO NOT APPLY IF



You've never done outbound calling.

You need a high base salary to feel safe.

200 dials/day sounds like a lot to you.

You're going to ask me for training on how to make phone calls.





SCHEDULE



8 hours/day, Monday through Friday. 8am to 5pm US Mountain Time with a 1 hour break. 200+ dials per day minimum.





HOW TO APPLY



Do all 3 or I won't read your application.



1. Record yourself saying this out loud. Not reading it. Say it like you're actually on the phone with a contractor named Mike and you're delivering his report:



"Hey Mike, your Vault report just came in. Over the last 7 days you missed 26 calls. Based on your average job value, that's about $94,000 a year in lost revenue. The good news is Vault caught every one of those and texted your customers back within 8 seconds. Want to keep it running? It's $149 a month."



Upload or link the recording. This is how I evaluate your accent and delivery. If you sound natural and confident, you're probably getting hired. If you sound like you're reading, you're not.



2. Tell me about your outbound experience. Where you worked, how many dials per day, what you were selling, and roughly what your close rate was.



3. Tell me when you can start.



I'm hiring this week. First qualified person who applies and sounds great on the recording gets the trial.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Here's a clean job post ready for OnlineJobs.ph:



TikTok Clipping VA — Skiing & Snowboarding App (Full-Time)

We are hiring a full-time TikTok Clipping VA for Shredder, a skiing and snowboarding social app based in the US. You will run three TikTok pages, edit short-form clips daily, and help grow our brand to a massive audience.



What You'll Do

You will manage three TikTok clipping pages dedicated to skiing and snowboarding content. Each month, you are responsible for posting 300 videos across those pages, generating at least 1,000,000 combined views, and maintaining a consistent standard of quality across every post. This is a full-time role — expect to produce roughly 10 videos per day.

You will source clips from videos we provide, edit them into engaging short-form content, add our branding, and post daily on TikTok. Instagram and YouTube are handled automatically through a tool we set up together — your only manual posting platform is TikTok.



Requirements



Proven experience editing short-form video content (TikTok, Reels, or Shorts)

Strong eye for what makes a clip engaging — pacing, music, transitions, and hook

Ability to produce high output without sacrificing quality

Reliable internet connection and the ability to work full-time hours

Familiarity with TikTok and how the algorithm rewards consistency

Attention to detail — branding, formatting, and posting standards must be followed exactly





Nice to Have



Interest in skiing, snowboarding, or action sports

Experience with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar editing tools

Prior experience running multiple social media pages





What We Offer



$1,000 USD per month, paid at the end of each 30-day period

Full-time, fully remote position

Clear expectations — we provide the content, you handle the editing and posting

A fast-growing brand with real traction (100k+ downloads, 60M+ organic views)





Payment Terms

Payment is issued in full each month when all three requirements are met: 300 videos posted, 1,000,000+ combined views, and consistent video quality. We track performance transparently and will communicate with you throughout the month.

title: Virtual Assistant — Luxury Property & Client Relations
description:
JOB POSTING



Virtual Assistant — Luxury Property & Client Relations

ABOUT THE ROLE

title: Full-Time Outbound Caller + Closer for US SaaS Company (Commission-Heavy, High Earners Only)
description:
We're Vault, a US SaaS company. We help contractors recover lost revenue from missed calls. We need one experienced, full-time outbound caller + closer. You must have outbound calling experience . You already know how to dial, pitch, handle objections, and close.



WHAT'S ALREADY BUILT FOR YOU:

- Power dialer loaded and ready (you press call, it dials)

- CRM with full pipeline management

- Lead lists loaded weekly (you never source leads)

- Automated audit system that runs 7 days and generates reports

- US phone number provided

- Word-for-word scripts (you can adjust based on your style)



YOUR 3 JOBS:



1. OUTBOUND — 200+ dials per day minimum:

Call contractors from the power dialer. Offer a free 7-day trial that monitors their missed calls and shows them how much revenue they're losing. You walk them through a 30-second setup on their phone. You're offering something free. Easy yes.



2. FOLLOW UP — report delivery calls:

After 7 days, a report auto-generates showing how many calls the contractor missed and how much money they lost. You call them. Walk them through the numbers. The data is brutal — contractors see $20,000-$100,000/year walking out the door. The report does the convincing.



3. CLOSE — ask for the sale:

After delivering the report you ask: "Want to keep this running? $147 a month." Most say yes because the math is obvious — $147/month to save $50,000+/year. You handle any remaining objections and get the card.



YOU SHOULD APPLY IF:

- You've worked outbound in a BPO, call center, or remote sales role

- You've made 200+ dials/day before and it doesn't scare you

- You know how to handle objections without freezing

- You've closed deals over the phone before (even small ones)

- You don't need someone holding your hand

- You hear "commission-heavy" and get excited, not nervous



DO NOT APPLY IF:

- You've never done outbound calling

- You need extensive training on how to make calls

- You're looking for a high base salary with no performance pressure

- 200 dials/day sounds like a lot to you



PAY STRUCTURE (commission-heavy — designed for closers):



Base: $1.50/hour ($12/day, $250/month floor)



Commissions:

- $10 per free trial you set up and get running

- $75 per trial that converts to a paying customer ($147/month)

- $150 per customer that upgrades to $499/month (happens after a few months, easy upsell)



NO CAP. EVER.



DAILY EARNINGS AT 200+ DIALS:



Solid performer — 6 trials/day, 2 closes/day:

$12 base + $60 trials + $150 closes = $222/day = $4,440/month



Strong performer — 8 trials/day, 3 closes/day:

$12 + $80 + $225 = $317/day = $6,340/month



Animal — 10 trials/day, 4 closes/day:

$12 + $100 + $300 = $412/day = $8,240/month



Weekly pay via Wise or PayPal. Never late.



THE PRODUCT SELLS ITSELF:

The first call is offering something free. The second call is delivering data that shocks them — "you missed 28 calls worth $94,000 last year." You're not convincing anyone of anything. You're showing them their own numbers and asking if they want to keep making money. This is the easiest close you'll ever make.



SCHEDULE:

8 hours/day, Monday-Friday

US business hours (8am-5pm Central, 1-hour break)

200+ dials per day is the minimum expectation. Non-negotiable.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Minimum 6 months outbound calling experience (BPO, call center, remote sales, freelance — any counts)

- Clear English with neutral or American-passing accent

- Quiet workspace, fast internet, quality headset

- Comfortable with power dialers and CRMs

- 200+ dials/day is your normal, not your stretch goal

- Reliable. On time. Every single day.

- Hungry. You see uncapped commissions and you want to destroy your targets.



THIS IS A GROUND-FLOOR ROLE. We are scaling fast. First person in the door who performs becomes the sales lead and builds the team. That means higher base, override commissions on your team's closes, and leadership title. But you earn it with results first.



HOW TO APPLY — ALL 4 REQUIRED:



1. Record yourself reading this script naturally (not robotic, not reading — deliver it like you're actually on the phone with a contractor):



"Hey Mike, your Vault report just came in. Over the last 7 days you missed 26 calls. Based on your average job value, that's about $94,000 a year in lost revenue. The good news — Vault caught every one of those and texted your customers back within 8 seconds. Want to keep it running? It's $147 a month."



2. Attach the recording



3. Tell me your outbound calling experience — where you worked, how many dials/day, what you sold, what your close rate was



4. Tell me when you can start



No recording = automatic rejection. I'm hiring this week.

description:
We are actively looking to add a Lead Manager to our real estate investment firm.



This role involves speaking with both new and existing leads, with the primary goal of qualifying prospects and setting appointments for our acquisitions team to present offers.



Responsibilities include calling inbound and outbound leads using RingCentral and Wayv Dialer, following and internalizing a proven script, taking detailed notes during and after each conversation, and accurately categorizing and updating leads in our CRM (GoHighLevel). You will also be responsible for handling a high volume of calls, consistently following up with leads, and hitting daily KPIs and performance targets.



This position is ideal for someone who has strong English communication skills, confidence on the phone, a willingness to learn and improve daily, and a results-driven mindset. This is a performance-driven role where consistency, effort, and communication directly impact your success and income.



We offer a base salary along with performance-based bonuses for each contract signed and deal closed. This position will begin as part-time, with the opportunity to transition into a full-time role in the coming months based on performance and company growth. There is also clear potential for advancement into acquisitions or leadership roles for top performers.



We are a fast-paced, results-driven team focused on growth and continuous improvement, and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long term.

title: LinkedIn Outreach Assistant — 24-Day Project, ~5 Min/Day
description:
WHAT'S THE WORK?



We're hiring 40+ part-time assistants for a 24-day LinkedIn outreach campaign starting late April 2026. The work is 100% copy-paste: open a candidate's LinkedIn profile, paste a pre-written InMail message, send, mark complete in a tracking sheet.



- ~5 minutes per day

- ~3.5 hours total over 24 days

- 100% scripted — no message writing, no replies, no decisions

- Pre-prepared queue delivered to you daily

- You will NOT respond to candidate replies — you forward them to our internal team

- Skip days are fine. Weekends, family stuff, sick days — your queue rolls forward, just keep up roughly with the daily pace overall





WHAT YOU EARN



$0.35 per message verified. About 75 messages over the campaign = $26.25 total.



Choose how you get paid:



- WEEKLY PAYMENTS via USDT (Solana network), bank transfer, or mobile top-up — paid every Friday

- OR SINGLE PAYMENT at the end of the campaign + $5 completion bonus = $31.25 total



Top performers also get first invitation to Phase 2 and Phase 3 of this campaign over the following 60 days (additional ~$30-50 each, not guaranteed).





WHAT YOU NEED



1. A LINKEDIN PROFILE IN ONE OF THESE FIELDS: recruiting, talent acquisition, HR, executive search, executive/personal assistant, or virtual assistant. Profiles in unrelated fields (graphic design, marketing, sales/SDR, lead generation, software development, healthcare, customer service, etc.) will not be considered — even if your past work history includes some recruiting experience. Your current LinkedIn headline matters most.



2. A LinkedIn account at least 1 year old, with a professional photo and (ideally) 50+ connections.



3. YOU HAVE NOT USED A LINKEDIN SALES NAVIGATOR FREE TRIAL IN THE PAST 12 MONTHS (we'll verify with a 2-minute screenshot check before hiring).



4. ~5 minutes most days for ~24 days.





ABOUT US



We're Obsidian Global, a business group running this campaign for three companies. Our coordinator Piumantha is your main point of contact.



We pay every freelancer who completes the work, on time, in full, via your chosen method. Weekly payments option exists specifically for freelancers who prefer regular payouts.





HOW TO APPLY



Reply with:



1. A SCREENSHOT OF YOUR LINKEDIN PROFILE (showing photo, headline, current role, connection count)



2. Confirmation: "I have NOT used a Sales Navigator trial in the past 12 months"



3. ONE SENTENCE ANSWERING THIS: What is our policy on responding to candidate replies?



Piumantha responds to qualified applicants within 24 hours during weekdays.

title: Customer Success Manager (HubSpot Specialist)
description:
We are a specialized delivery consultancy implementing HubSpot for high-growth businesses. We’re looking for a proactive, relationship-driven Customer Success Manager (CSM) who lives and breathes client ROI and platform adoption.



In this role, you aren’t just "managing accounts"—you are a strategic partner. You will bridge the gap between technical configuration and business outcomes, ensuring our clients don’t just use HubSpot, but thrive because of it.



What You’ll Be Doing



Strategic Advisory: Partnering with high-growth clients to align their business goals with HubSpot’s capabilities, moving them from initial implementation to long-term maturity.



Adoption & Retention: Monitoring platform health and usage metrics to proactively identify risks and opportunities for deeper tool integration.



Solution Mapping: Translating business pain points into strategic roadmaps, collaborating with our technical team to ensure configurations deliver real-world value.



Client Enablement: Leading workshops and training sessions to ensure client teams are confident, competent, and getting the most out of their HubSpot investment.



Account Growth: Identifying opportunities for upsells, cross-fills, and renewals by consistently demonstrating the "why" behind the "how."



What We’re Looking For



Experience: 3+ years in Customer Success, Account Management, or Consulting, specifically within the SaaS or CRM ecosystem.



HubSpot Literacy: A strong understanding of the HubSpot suite (Marketing, Sales, Service, and Operations Hubs). You don't need to be a developer, but you must know what the platform can do.



The "Guide" Mindset: An empathetic communicator who can simplify complex technical concepts and lead clients through change management.



Data-Driven: Comfortable analyzing KPIs and reporting on ROI to prove the value of our consultancy's work.



Commitment: This is a full-time employee position. We are looking for a dedicated partner to become the face of our client relationships.



The Opportunity



Competitive Salary: A stable, full-time base salary that reflects your relationship management expertise.



Payment Terms: Remuneration is paid in AUD only.



High-Impact Work: Manage a portfolio of diverse, high-growth companies where your guidance directly influences their scaling journey.



Professional Growth: Stay at the forefront of the HubSpot ecosystem with a consultancy that prioritizes the platform's latest features.



Modern Culture: Join a team that values technical excellence, precision, and collaborative problem-solving.



How to Apply



Ready to drive growth for the next generation of businesses? Please send us a message and a brief summary of a successful client outcome you’ve led.



Note: This is a permanent, full-time employee role. Please ensure you are comfortable with the payment structure in AUD before applying.

title: Senior Accountant
description:

This full-time position, based on PST (Pacific Standard Time), offers substantial opportunities for career advancement based on demonstrated ability and knowledge.



- Generate monthly and quarterly financial reports as required

- Produce financial statements, conduct detailed variance analysis, and reconcile general ledger accounts for individual entities

- Perform bank reconciliations and journal entries

- Ensure accuracy in general ledger, manage accounts payable, payroll, and cash flow

- Prepare journal entries with supporting documentation across all entities

- Assist in budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis

- Maintain invoice tracking, ensuring approvals and alignment with PO systems

- Reconcile year-end payroll tax reports and oversee issuance of W2’s and 1099s

- Establish and enforce internal controls

- Contribute to enhancements of accounting systems

- Assist in creating and updating process documentation



Required Skills:



- Strong commitment to timeliness and high-quality work

- Ability to organize and prioritize tasks with minimal supervision

- Proficient in GAAP and financial reporting

- Exceptional work ethic with a goal-oriented mindset

- Advanced skills in Microsoft Office and Excel

- Experience with accounting systems; familiarity with AppFolio is advantageous

- Preference for candidates with prior real estate industry experience



Education:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy or related field



About Us:

title: Senior Personal & Executive Assistant
description:
Senior Personal & Executive Assistant (Remote | Full-Time)



We are seeking a highly experienced, proactive Personal & Executive Assistant to support a Melbourne-based couple across multiple businesses and personal commitments.



This role is best suited to someone who operates at a senior, executive level—you will be trusted to manage priorities, make decisions, and keep both business and personal life running seamlessly with minimal direction.



This role is not suitable for entry-level virtual assistants.



About the Role



You will act as a central coordination point across business and personal responsibilities, ensuring everything runs efficiently and nothing is missed.



Business Support

Administrative support for an established building management business

End-to-end diary and calendar management across multiple schedules

Inbox management (Outlook) – triaging, prioritising, and drafting responses

Drafting clear, professional
 communications on behalf of founders

Tracking key tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups

Assisting with payment tracking and reminders (no processing required)



Events & Property Management Support



Managing enquiries and bookings for an events space and short-term rental (Airbnb-style) property

Coordinating bookings, availability, and scheduling

Liaising with cleaners, suppliers, or service providers as required

Ensuring smooth pre- and post-booking processes



Personal & Family Support

Coordinating children’s schedules and logistics

Liaising with schools, activities, and external providers where required

Travel coordination (flights, accommodation, basic itineraries)

General personal administration and life organisation



What We’re Looking For



10+ years’ experience as a Personal Assistant or Executive Assistant

Proven experience supporting senior executives or founders

Experience handling client/customer enquiries or bookings (hospitality, property, or events is highly regarded)

Ability to operate autonomously and make sound decisions

Exceptional organisational and time management skills

Strong written English with the ability to draft
s in a professional, polished tone

High level of discretion and confidentiality

Comfortable managing both business and personal responsibilities

Calm under pressure and able to manage competing priorities

Strong attention to detail with a proactive mindset



Tools & Communication



Outlook (primary
 and calendar management)

WhatsApp (day-to-day communication)

Booking platforms (e.g. Airbnb or similar) – or ability to learn quickly



Working Style & Expectations

Strong responsiveness and communication

Compensation

Performance-based increases over time

title: Research & Opportunity Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
I am looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant with strong intuition to support deep online research and actionable data collection.



This role involves the researching and identifying opportunities such as grants, programs, internships, and relevant people. Information, and in some cases data, will need to be collected, organized, and presented clearly to support effective decision-making. Clear and accurate English writing is necessary, the ability to phone call is good, but I do not require it.



Research will primarily focus on opportunities in Canada, the United States, India, and China.



Initiative and slightly unconventional thinking are strong assets. I am looking for someone who can go beyond basic search results and identify opportunities that are not immediately obvious. Comfort using AI models is expected, but they should be used thoughtfully (helpful for initial research and exploration, but final details and verification should come from reliable sources and your own judgment).



Example task:

“Identify 4 individuals connected to high levels of government in India who have a history of developing foreign talent, and determine the most effective way to contact them.”



This is the type of thinking and output I am looking for.



This is a part-time, long-term role with the potential to increase hours and pay based on performance. The role will begin at approximately 3 hours per day, with an increase to 4 hours per day once a consistent system and workflow are established.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a paid test task.



To apply, include the word Monk at the top of your message.

title: Social Media Influencer Creator UGC Sourcing
description:
We are looking for support with sourcing video creators on TikTok. We are looking for young, social media savvy, ambitious individuals to join our team. In order to apply for this role you need to complete two tasks.



1. Send a Loom or Video to my WhatsApp introducing yourself and why you would be good at this role.

2. Complete the below task to prove your ability.



TASK 



ABOUT THE APP

Lockt is an app that locks distracting apps and screen time until the user hits their daily step count.

The content angle is phone addiction, frustration, self-awareness, walking, and a
 self-improvement.



We mainly want creators / people who can film short iPhone videos for us.

In most cases, we post the videos from our own accounts, we are not looking for influencers with large followings, the opposite, we need low cost UGC video creators.



THE TASK

Build a small first-pass talent list for Lockt.



We do NOT want you to only find obvious UGC creators. Think wider.



We're interested in 2 buckets:



1. people already making content who are strong on camera

2. normal students / young people on TikTok or Instagram who may be cheap, teachable, and naturally good for this



Please submit:



PART 1 — 10 creator / talent leads



For each lead include:

1. name or handle

2. platform

3. profile link

4. which bucket they belong to:

   - existing UGC / creator

   - normal student / non-obvious talent

5. why they fit Lockt in 1-2 sentences

6. whether they seem:

   - good on camera

   - articulate

   - cheap enough to test

7. your estimated price bucket:

   - under $15

   - under $20

   - probably above $20

8. which Lockt hook angle they match best

9. whether they are better for:

   - raw-file UGC for our own channels

   - creator-posting deal on their own channel

   - both



PART 2 — your top 3 picks

From the 10, choose your top 3 and explain:

- why they are the strongest

- which one is the cheapest scalable option

- which one is the best pure on-camera talent

- which one is the best "non-obvious" pick



PART 3 — outreach

Write 5 short outreach messages to 5 of your chosen leads. (You don't have to actually send them, just draft them.)

They should feel specific, natural, and not spammy.



PART 4 — teaching angle

Pick 2 of your leads who are not polished UGC people.

Write 3-5 bullet points on how you would teach them to make good Lockt videos if they said yes.



FORMAT

Put everything into one Google Doc or PDF and send it to my WhatsApp

title: Technical Sales Engineer - Laboratory Materials and Equipment
description:
MSE Supplies LLC is seeking a highly driven Technical Sales Specialist to lead and expand our Materials Science and Life Sciences teams. This role will represent consumables such as Engineered Ceramics, Crystals and general lab supplies including but not limited to; tissue culture, liquid handling, cold storage, blood collection, microscopy, histology, PCR/qPCR and others. In addition, the product portfolio will offer a full capital expenditure equipment portfolio including arc melters, melt spinners, coating equipment & PVD systems. 



This role is designed for a business-oriented professional who is passionate about bridging scientific innovation with commercial success and working in fast moving team environment. As a key member of the sales team, you will influence the direction of our product strategy, drive sales growth, and support global customers in achieving breakthrough research outcomes and be well compensated for all responsibilities. 



Responsibilities

•	Execute strategic territory and sales plans, actively managing a robust pipeline and maintain accurate opportunity tracking within CRM systems to support forecasting and consistently achieve or exceed revenue targets 

•	Own commercial performance for a defined portfolio of laboratory products, driving revenue growth, margin expansion, and market penetration 

•	Serve as the technical sales expert for assigned product lines (e.g., advanced materials, chemicals, lab equipment, instrumentation), aligning solutions to customer applications 

•	Drive consultative, solution-based sales, positioning MSE Supplies as a preferred partner for both standard and customized solutions 

•	Develop and expand key customer relationships, engaging decision-makers to identify opportunities, negotiate agreements, and grow share of wallet 

•	Proactively manage inbound and outbound sales opportunities, converting qualified leads into revenue through structured follow-up and closing strategies 

•	Deliver high-impact technical presentations, product demonstrations, and application-driven discussions to accelerate customer decision-making 

•	Provide pre-sales technical support and commercial guidance, ensuring alignment between customer needs and product capabilities to drive conversion and retention 

•	Collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Product Management, and Operations to align go-to-market strategy and execution 

•	Act as the voice of the customer, capturing market insights, competitive intelligence, and unmet needs to inform product development and commercial strategy 



Qualifications and Skills



•	Bachelor’s degree in Chemistry, Materials Science, Biology, Chemical Engineering, or a related technical field required; equivalent industry experience with a proven track record of sales success in scientific markets may be considered in lieu of a degree

•	3+ years of experience in technical sales, applications, or customer-facing roles within scientific markets 

•	Demonstrated success in achieving sales targets and managing a pipeline within life sciences, advanced materials, semiconductor, energy, or industrial R&D markets 

•	Strong understanding of laboratory products, workflows, and customer applications 

•	Proven ability to translate technical expertise into commercial value through consultative selling 

•	Experience using CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce) for pipeline management, forecasting, and activity tracking 

•	Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills with the ability to engage both technical and business stakeholders 

•	Strong organizational and territory management skills, with the ability to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously 

•	Results-driven, self-motivated, and capable of operating effectively in a field-based or hybrid sales environment 



Benefits:

• PTO (Paid Time Off) & Sick Time



Come join us to enable innovations for scientists and engineers worldwide. In this position, you will play a key role in working directly with our large customers base and helping customers purchase the products they need to Enable Innovation. MSE Supplies LLC has built a winning track record of ~100% annual growth rate over the past 5 years. Our company is on a path to accelerated growth. Along the way we will all have a lot of fun celebrating successes together. Come join us!



Company Overview



Trusted by research labs and innovative companies worldwide, MSE Supplies LLC is a U.S.-based leading supplier of high-quality materials, lab equipment, materials characterization analytical services and customized solutions for both research and production. With a global customer base of more than 2,000 research universities, government labs, as well as Fortune 500 companies and technology start-ups, we support scientists and engineers worldwide to accelerate their innovations. As a fast-growing company, we are constantly looking for talented and ambitious people to join our team and develop your successful career.



Our Products and Services (Both Standard and Customized)

• (A to Z) Single Crystals, Wafers and Substrates

• Arc Melting, Melt Spinning and Quenching Equipment (made in Germany by Edmund Buhler)

• Ball Milling Equipment and Accessories (mills, jars, grinding balls, milling media and microbeads)

• Biotech Lab Supplies

• Conductive Oxide (FTO, ITO, AZO) Substrates

• Customized Sputtering Targets

• FAST / SPS / DCS Sintering Presses (made in Germany by Dr. Fritsch)

• Gallium Nitride (GaN) and Silicon Carbide (SiC) compound semiconductor substrates and wafers

• High Purity Inorganic Chemicals

• High Purity Lab Crucibles

• Lithium Battery Materials and Tools (solid electrolytes, anodes, cathodes, battery research consumables and tools)

• Materials Characterization Analytical Services

• Metal Powders for Additive Manufacturing (3D printing)

• Monolayer Graphene Films and Graphene Oxide

• Shakers and Lab Equipment (made in Germany by Edmund Buhler)

• Sintering Furnaces (muffle furnaces, tube furnaces, etc.)

• Pellet Pressing Dies and Presses

• and more...
