title: AI Systems Engineer / Head of AI
description:
POSITION: AI Systems Engineer / Head of AI

TYPE: Full-Time, Remote



ABOUT US



We are a DTC fitness equipment brand selling directly to customers online. We are a lean, distributed team and we have been building a serious AI-driven operation across every department including customer support, operations, marketing, and finance.



We are not looking for someone to introduce us to AI. We already have live, production AI agents running every day. We need someone to take full ownership of what we have built, unify it into one coherent system, and make it significantly better.

This is a senior, strategic role. You will report directly to the founder and work alongside a small team of people who are already using AI daily in their work.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS ABOUT



Right now we have people across different departments each building and maintaining AI systems in their own lane. One person handles reporting automation. Another handles customer support automation. Another handles marketing. Another handles operations and finance. These systems are only partially talking to each other. No single person is responsible for looking across all of it and asking: is this actually the best way to do this?



That is what you are here to do.



Even if we think what we have is the best, something better probably exists. Your job is to find it and lead us toward it.



THE INFRASTRUCTURE YOU ARE WALKING INTO



Everything runs on an on-premise brain computer connected to an always-on Cloudflare Tunnel for external access. There are no cloud servers. Two cloud surfaces sit above it: Firebase Hosting for our dashboards and the Anthropic API for model calls.



We do not use one AI model. We route per job based on cost, speed, and task:



---> Claude Opus (Anthropic) for complex reasoning and primary agent work

---> Claude Sonnet (Anthropic) for CS draft generation, auto-tagging, faster workloads

---> Claude Haiku (Anthropic) for cheap classification and triage jobs

---> Gemini Flash and Pro (Google) for our fitness program generation pipeline, some report narration, and image generation

---> GPT-4o and GPT-5 (OpenAI) for a legacy CS keyword classifier kept on OpenAI for historical reasons

Model selection is intentional. You will be responsible for setting and enforcing model selection standards across all builds, and for maintaining the internal cost-routing system (max_router.py) that routes some API calls through subscription accounts to control cost.



The team accesses AI through the Claude Desktop App via remote desktop on the shared Mac, through
-hosted bots for team-facing interactions, and through Slack for some agent triggers and outputs. We previously used an OpenAI-based system (OpenClaw) built by a technical partner; some legacy CS and ops automations still live there and need to be audited and migrated.



WHAT IS ALREADY BUILT



You are not starting from zero. These are live systems running in production:

---> REPORTING AND ANALYTICS AGENT: Pulls live data from our e-commerce platform, marketing analytics tool, and customer support platform daily. Auto-populates our CEO command dashboard. Runs CS performance reports, sales and marketing reports, cash position summaries, and inbound ticket counts. Triggered via Slack or runs on a morning schedule.

---> SLACK-FACING ASSISTANT: Handles CEO task briefings, inbox scanning, team status updates, and time-off requests with auto-deny logic for policy violations.

---> CS AUTOMATION LAYER: Auto-tags incoming support tickets using a keyword classifier. Generates AI-drafted responses for CS agents. Early-stage at-risk customer flagging that escalates cancel and return signals to priority. Currently limited by API timeout issues at large ticket volumes.

---> FITNESS PROGRAM GENERATOR: Fully automated pipeline. Customer fills out a form, submission triggers an API call to Claude with a large knowledge base system prompt, the AI generates a personalized 10-week training program, and it gets
ed to the customer as a PDF on a randomized morning schedule. Cost is roughly $0.01 per program.

---> CEO DAILY DASHBOARD: Hosted on Firebase. Tabs covering today's tasks, cash position,
 metrics, team status, video pipeline, and SaaS spend. Fully AI-populated, no manual data entry.

---> MARKETING AND OPS DASHBOARD: Built using Claude Code. Includes P&L, customer insights pulling from multiple platforms, and a marketing accountability layer.

---> CASH POSITION MODULE: Python script pulling from our accounting platform and cash flow tracker, parsing Slack for payment data via AI.

---> INTERNAL COST ROUTING SYSTEM: Routes API calls between paid API and subscription accounts based on job type to manage costs.

None of these systems are connected to each other. That is the core problem you are solving.



WHAT YOU ARE HERE TO BUILD



UNIFIED AI ARCHITECTURE

Map all existing systems, identify the gaps and redundancies, and build the connective layer so everything functions as one system instead of several disconnected ones.

HOLISTIC BUSINESS AI LAYER

The founder wants to be able to ask any business question in real time and get an answer. Example: what percentage of support tickets about order status lead to a return, and if those customers were moved to priority, what is the projected cash flow impact? Nobody can build that end to end right now. You will.

FIX THE CS AT-RISK SYSTEM

Resolve API timeout issues at large ticket volumes. Train pattern recognition on historical ticket data. D
 whether to keep the legacy keyword classifier on GPT or rebuild it on Claude, and justify the decision. Connect the drafting bot to historical data so quality improves over time.

STABILIZE THE SLACK INTEGRATION

The Claude-to-Slack integration was tested but is not in production. Build it properly so tea
mbers can get AI assistance without leaving Slack.

OWN API USAGE GOVERNANCE

Tea
mbers currently hit usage limits mid-workflow with no structure managing it. Build and enforce: model selection standards, usage monitoring, key rotation, cost controls, and maintenance of the cost-routing module.

LEAD TEAM AI TRAINING

Systematically upskill every tea
mber from CS agents to marketing to finance. Run a weekly AI knowledge-share call where primary AI users each teach one new thing per week. The goal is to make every person on the team significantly more effective so we never need to grow headcount just to get more done.

AUDIT AND MIGRATE LEGACY SYSTEMS

Full audit of remaining OpenClaw dependencies. D
 what gets rebuilt on Claude, what stays on OpenAI, what gets retired. Document and execute the migration plan.





REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE



TECHNICAL:

---> Deep proficiency in Claude specifically: Claude Projects, Claude API, Claude Code, system prompt architecture, tool use and MCP integration, prompt engineering for structured output and reasoning, context window management at scale, multi-agent orchestration

---> Strong judgment on model selection: knowing when to use Opus vs Sonnet vs Haiku vs Gemini vs GPT, and how to make cost vs quality tradeoffs at production scale

---> Python and scripting: the entire agent stack is Python-based with Google Apps Script integrations; you must be able to read, debug, and extend it

---> REST API integration: connecting external platforms without a full engineering team; our support, e-commerce, analytics, and accounting platforms all need to stay wired into the AI layer

---> Agentic AI architecture: multi-agent setups, memory management, tool chaining, session management, cost routing; you need to build agents that are reliable in production, not just in demos

---> Firebase and cloud hosting: dashboards run on Firebase; you need to understand deployment and the Cloudflare Tunnel setup on the Mac Mini

--->
 bot infrastructure: team-facing bots run through
; you need to be able to build on that layer

---> OpenAI and legacy system familiarity: some systems still run on OpenAI; you need to audit and migrate intelligently



LEADERSHIP:

---> Can look at multiple disconnected department-level AI systems and see the unified architecture underneath them

---> Communicates clearly with non-technical teammates across CS, ops, marketing, and finance

---> Pushes back when the current approach is not the best approach; we want and expect this

---> Teaches and elevates the team, not just builds systems for them

---> Works independently across a remote, distributed team without needing close supervision

---> Owns the weekly AI knowledge-share call and is accountable for the team's AI progress over time



FULL TOOLS AND PLATFORMS LIST

AI and Model Layer:

---> Claude (claude.ai, Claude API, Claude Code, Claude Desktop App)

---> OpenAI (GPT-4o, GPT-5)

---> Google Gemini (Flash and Pro)

---> OpenClaw (legacy OpenAI-based agent system)

Infrastructure and DevOps:

---> Mac Mini (on-premise compute)

---> Cloudflare Tunnel

---> Firebase Hosting

--->
 (bot interface layer)

---> Python

---> Google Apps Script

---> SSH (remote access)

---> session-commander and max_router.py (internal cost routing tooling)

Business Platforms (all require or have API integrations):

---> Shopify (e-commerce and orders)

---> Richpanel (CS ticketing and automation)

---> Triple Whale (marketing analytics)

---> ShipHero (fulfillment)

---> Flexport (freight and logistics)

---> Xero (accounting)

---> Gusto and Paychex (payroll)

---> Klaviyo 
 marketing)

---> Postscript (SMS marketing)

---> KnoCommerce (post-purchase surveys)

---> JudgeMe (product reviews)

Productivity and Collaboration:

---> Slack (team comms, agent triggers, bot outputs)

---> Google Workspace (Sheets, Forms, Drive, Gmail)

---> Asana (project and task management)

---> Claude.ai Projects (knowledge base and system prompt hosting)

Dashboards and Reporting Surfaces:

---> CEO Daily Dashboard (Google Sheets and Firebase)

---> Marketing Dashboard (Google Sheets and Firebase)

---> CS Dashboard (Firebase)

---> Cashflow API (Firebase)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

By 30 days: Full audit of all existing systems completed. Architecture map delivered. Top priorities identified and approved. Cost routing fully understood and documented.

By 60 days: CS at-risk flagging live and reliable. Slack integration stable in production. Cost governance enforced. Weekly AI call running. Team upskilling underway.

By 90 days: The unified AI layer is live. The founder can query the business holistically. All department systems are connected. Legacy system audit complete with a clear migration plan. The 6-month AI roadmap is on the table.



HOW TO APPLY



Send an
 with the subject line: "Head of AI Application" to 

Your
 must include all five of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. YOUR RESUME 

Attach your updated resume as a PDF or Word document.



2. BRIEF BACKGROUND SUMMARY

In a few sentences, tell us who you are and what you have been doing. What kind of work have you been doing, what type of teams or businesses have you worked with, and what brought you to this kind of role.



3. YOUR AI EXPERIENCE

Give us a specific breakdown of your AI experience. Do not speak in generalities. We want to know:

---> Which AI tools and models you have worked with and at what depth

---> Whether you have built with the Claude API, OpenAI API, Gemini API, or others

---> Whether you have built multi-agent or agentic systems and what they did

---> Any experience with on-premise compute, tunneling, cost routing, or API governance

---> Any experience training or upskilling teams on AI tools and workflows



4. DEMO VIDEO OF YOUR WORK

Submit a screen recording or video walkthrough of an automation or AI project you built yourself. This is the most important part of your application.



We want to see:

---> Something you actually built, not a tutorial you followed

---> How it works end to end, including the prompt logic, data connections, or agent architecture involved

---> The problem it solves and why you built it the way you did

---> Any tradeoffs you made during the build and what you would improve

Upload the video to Google Drive, Loom, YouTube (unlisted), or any shareable link and include it in your
. There is no required length; show us what is necessary to understand what you built.



5. YOUR COMPREHENSIVE 30-DAY PLAN - sent as a pdf or word document

Based on everything described in this job posting, write a detailed plan for what you would do in your first 30 days. This is not a general onboarding plan. We want a specific, technical plan that covers:

---> How you would audit the existing AI systems and what you would look for

---> How you would approach unifying the disconnected systems into one architecture

---> Which optimizations or fixes you would prioritize first and why

---> Any changes you would plan to make to the current model routing, cost structure, or agent architecture

---> How you would approach getting up to speed with the team and the existing codebase



There is no right or wrong answer here. We are evaluating how you think, how specific you get, and whether your plan reflects a genuine understanding of what we have built and what we need.



This role is for someone who has already done this work at this level. Incomplete applications will not be considered. If you are the right person, your application will show it.

title: Outreach & Sales Support Executive VA
description:
Overview 



We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Outreach & Sales Support Executive to support a UK functional beverage brand’s growth in contract catering and adjacent channels. This role is dedicated to converting major listings into site-level traction by engaging site managers, driving product trials, and coordinating sampling activity.



The core of this role is manual, high-attention outreach. Unlike high-volume automated campaigns, this work requires careful handling of contacts, thoughtful communication, and strong follow-up discipline.



Work Structure:

10 hours per week - UK Timezone 



Key Responsibilities

• Reach out to site managers and decision-makers via
 and LinkedIn in small, manual batches.

• Personalize outreach while maintaining professional, upbeat, and commercially effective messaging.

• Keep the CRM fully updated with contact details, outreach status, and detailed notes.

• Manage high-volume follow-up sequences without losing track of timing or context.

• Write and adapt outbound sales
s that feel human and worth replying to.

• Coordinate sample drops and tasting sessions, confirming dates, addresses, and materials.

• Follow up before and after sampling sessions to maximize conversion and 
ntum.



Required Skills & Experience

• Strong written English and proven ability to write outreach that generates responses.

• Highly organized and comfortable managing a large volume of contacts and follow-ups.

• Experience using a CRM and keeping sales pipelines clean and updated.

• Confident using AI tools for drafting support while keeping final output human and on-brand.

• Previous experience in sales support, lead generation, SDR, or outreach roles.

• Knowledge of food, beverage, FMCG, or hospitality is a plus, but not essential.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative (SDR) VA
description:

20 hours per week - UK Timezone

 campaigns, including A/B testing of messaging.

title: Executive Assistant & Business Support Coordinator VA
description:
Overview 



We are a fast-growing US "better-for-you" chocolate brand reinventing traditional chocolate bars with clean, simple ingredients. With in-house manufacturing in Texas and multiple new product launches ahead, we are looking for a highly capable Executive Assistant & Business Support Coordinator to help create structure and reduce founder admin load. This is a highly cross-functional role designed for someone who thrives in fast-moving, founder-led environments and enjoys wearing multiple hats across sales, operations, and brand support.



Work Structure & Requirements

20 hours per week - Central Timezone



Key Responsibilities

• Executive Support: Manage inbox triage, draft routine replies, coordinate complex calendar scheduling, and prepare meeting agendas/notes.

• Trade Show & Event Logistics: Coordinate behind-the-scenes logistics for events, including shipping requirements, booth materials, and sample inventory tracking.

• Customer & Partner Communication: Respond to inbound customer and retailer messages, manage support requests, and coordinate wholesale interest follow-ups.

• Business Support & Admin: Organize internal digital filing systems, assist with reporting workflows, and build SOPs for recurring tasks.

• Sales & Ops Support: Assist with sample request coordination, maintain CRM hygiene, and support EDI-related admin workflows.

• Marketing Coordination: Handle routine community engagement on social channels and coordinate inbound content assets.



Required Skills & Experience

• Proven experience as an Executive Assistant, Founder’s Associate, or Operations Coordinator.

• Previous experience working within the CPG (Consumer Packaged Goods) space is strongly preferred.

• Exceptional written and verbal English communication.

• Exposure to operational functions such as accounting, EDI, or supply chain management is highly valuable.

• High ownership with the ability to balance recurring admin with ad hoc business support.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2-3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Real Estate Content Creator (Viral Growth Focus)
description:
We’re looking for someone who knows how to create attention — not just content.



This role is for someone who understands how to make videos that stop the scroll, generate engagement, and drive inbound leads. If your idea of content is just posting listings with music, this is not the role for you.



**What You’ll Do:**



* Create short-form video content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

* Develop hooks, scripts, and concepts designed to go viral

* Film/edit content (or direct filming if needed)

* Analyze performance metrics and double down on what works

* Stay on top of trends and adapt them to real estate

* Turn listings, market updates, and daily life into engaging content



---



**What We’re Looking For:**



* Proven track record of viral or high-performing content (show examples)

* Strong understanding of attention, hooks, and storytelling

* Ability to move fast and test content frequently

* Comfortable being direct, creative, and pushing ideas

* Bonus: Experience in real estate or local market content



---



**Compensation:**



* Base + performance bonuses tied to views, engagement, and leads

* Opportunity for long-term growth with the brand



---



**To Apply:**

Send:



1. Examples of content you’ve created (links required)

2. Your best-performing video + why it worked

3. 3 content ideas you would create for a real estate brand

title: TikTok Shop & E-Commerce Lead VA
description:
Overview 

We are seeking a senior, execution-focused leader to own and scale our TikTok Shop and broader e-commerce ecosystem. This role encompasses Shopify, TikTok Shop, Amazon, 
, Faire, and other wholesale platforms. We are not looking for someone to learn TikTok on the job; you must join as an expert with a proven track record of driving revenue through TikTok and be prepared to extend that expertise across all other digital channels.



Work Structure

Full Time, Monday to Friday 9 am - 6 pm EST



Key Responsibilities

1. TikTok Shop Ownership

• Manage TikTok Shop end-to-end, including product listings, pricing, promotions, and storefront management.

• Drive revenue through both organic content and paid advertising.

• Scale creator and affiliate programs with a strict focus on sales rather than just content output.

2. Multi-Channel E-Commerce Management

• Launch, manage, and optimize paid ads across TikTok, Amazon, Walmart Marketplace, and Google Adwords.

• Expand successful learnings from TikTok into Shopify, Amazon, Faire, and other wholesale platforms.

• Optimize product listings across all platforms for maximum conversion and discoverability.

3. Performance & Logistics

• Monitor and improve key performance metrics, including conversion rate, AOV, CAC, and ROAS.

• Identify opportunities for bundling, merchandising, and pricing optimization to increase profitability.

• Manage inventory flow across all channels to prevent stockouts or overages.

• Analyze performance data to provide clear, actionable strategic recommendations.



Required Skills & Experience

• TikTok Expertise: A proven track record of managing TikTok Shop with measurable, high-growth revenue results.

• Strategic Knowledge: Deep expertise in content strategy, creator management, affiliate programs, and paid ads within the TikTok ecosystem.

• Multi-Platform Experience: Hands-on experience scaling at least one additional platform such as Amazon or Walmart Marketplace.

• Analytical Mindset: Data-driven with a strong performance marketing background and the ability to iterate quickly.

• Adaptability: Comfortable operating in a fast-paced environment without established processes.



What Success Looks Like

• TikTok Shop becomes a meaningful, predictable, and growing revenue channel.

• Consistent improvement in ROAS, CAC, and conversion rates across all platforms.

• Successful expansion of TikTok strategies into broader e-commerce channels.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Marketing & Email Marketing Specialist
description:
Marketing &
 Marketing Specialist

Joelle Uzyel Interior Design • Remote • Part-time (15–20 hrs/week) with full-time potential



About the role

I'm Joelle Uzyel. I run a luxury interior design practice in Los Angeles and an editorial content site at 
. I'm hiring my next marketing and
 marketing person, and I'm being specific about what I need so we both save time.

This is a hands-on operator role, not a strategist sitting on top of execution. You'll build the sheets, run the merges, write the copy, and ship the campaigns. If your previous role was "managing the agency that did the work," this isn't your job.

What you'll own

Outbound
 marketing. You'll run daily YAMM campaigns targeting real estate market.  Build the tracking sheet, research the contacts, send the merge, work the follow-up sequence, and report what's converting. 



Klaviyo lifecycle marketing. You'll own the editorial content site's
 program end-to-end. Welcome series, weekly newsletter, segmentation, abandonment flows, A/B tests, performance reporting. Both campaigns and flows.

Contact research. using LinkedIn, ZoomInfo, Apollo, RocketReach, and websites. You know domain pattern shortcuts. You don't give up after one search.

SOPs and process. If you're doing it twice, it should be documented. I expect you to build and maintain the playbooks for the work you own.

What you must have



2+ years of hands-on
 marketing experience

Direct experience with YAMM (Yet Another Mail Merge) or a comparable tool — Mailmeteor, GMass, Lemlist

Direct experience with Klaviyo — flows, segmentation, campaigns, reporting

Strong contact research skills (LinkedIn, ZoomInfo, Apollo, RocketReach)

Excellent written English. You'll be writing copy that goes to luxury real estate brokers and design publication editors. The standard is high.

Must know how to use and operate claude ai

Self-managed. I'll set the targets and the deadlines. You manage your own time and report what got done.



Nice to have



Landing page design (Webflow, Framer, Figma, or similar)

Experience in luxury, design, real estate, or lifestyle verticals

Familiarity with SEO and content distribution

Affiliate marketing experience (ShopMy, RewardStyle, Amazon Associates)



How to apply

No initial Zoom calls. If you want to be considered, send me a 1–2 minute video introducing yourself. Loom, YouTube unlisted, or any shareable video link works. In the video, cover:



Who you are

Your most recent role and why you left

One specific
 marketing campaign you ran — what it was, what it produced

Your top three professional strengths

Confirm you've used YAMM and Klaviyo, and briefly describe how you used each



 your video link to 
 with the subject line:


 Marketing — [Your Name]"

I respond to candidates whose videos move me to the next round. Written cover letters and résumés without a video will not be reviewed.

Compensation

Competitive, based on experience. Starting as part-time (15–20 hrs/week) with potential to grow into full-time as the role expands.

title: Video Editor
description:
Dear,



We’re a fast-growing e-commerce brand on track to hit 8 figures this year, and we’re looking for a high-level Video Editor to join our creative team.



This is not a beginner role. We want someone who understands direct response, performance marketing, and how to edit ads that generate revenue — not just views.



If you know how to turn raw footage into scroll-stopping, high-converting video ads, keep reading.



To prove you’ve read this, apply with the word “cranberry” at the start of your application.



What you’ll do:

- Edit high-converting video ads for Meta 
/Instagram)

- Turn UGC + b-roll into compelling direct response creatives

- Create multiple variations for testing and scaling

- Implement strong hooks, pacing, captions, and retention-focused edits

- Collaborate with our team on new angles, concepts, and iterations

- Deliver fast, consistently, and at scale



Requirements (Must):

- Proven experience editing video ads for e-commerce brands

- Strong understanding of direct response advertising

- Ability to create high-retention, high-converting creatives

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut or similar

- Fast turnaround and ability to produce multiple variations

- Highly responsive and reliable



Preferred:

- Experience with 6–7 figure Shopify brands or agencies

- Understanding of CTR, CPA, hooks, and performance metrics



To apply, answer:

- Have you edited video ads for e-commerce brands?

- Have you worked with 6–7 figure brands?

- Share 3–5 video ads you’ve created (with links)

- If available, include performance metrics (CTR, CPA, ROAS)

- What makes a video ad convert, in your opinion?

- What software do you use?

- Are you available full-time and responsive daily?



FULL SOPs + winning creative references provided

Paid test required for shortlisted candidates

Fast-paced environment with room to grow into a senior role



If you can create ads that actually drive revenue, we want to hear from you.



Best regards,

Romeo

title: New Virtual Assistant
description:
Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Operations & Admin)



Company: 30A Window Washing

Type: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

Remote | Long-Term Position (Currently only hiring males)

If you meet the qualifications and think you might be a good fit after reading this message ---------- on whatsapp with your name and why you think I should consider you for the position.



About Us



30A Window Washing is a fast-growing, high-standard service business serving homeowners along Florida’s Emerald Coast. We’re building a real company, not a side hustle — systems, standards, and excellence matter here.



We’re looking for a reliable, sharp, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help run the day-to-day backend of the business so the owner can focus on growth.



If you like structure, checklists, clear expectations, and being part of a winning team — keep reading.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



You will work directly with the owner and act as a key support role in daily operations.



Primary Responsibilities:



Answer and manage customer texts, calls, and
s professionally



Schedule jobs and manage the calendar



Send invoices, follow up on payments, and track job completion



Update CRM / job management system with notes and photos



Handle customer follow-ups, confirmations, and review requests



Assist with simple bookkeeping and organization



Manage internal checklists and SOPs



Support marketing follow-ups (texts,
s, reminders)



Keep things organized, clean, and on time



You are the glue that keeps operations tight.



Who This Is For



This role is for someone who:



Is extremely organized and detail-oriented



Communicates clearly and professionally in English



Follows instructions exactly



Is proactive — you don’t wait to be told twice



Can handle repetitive tasks without losing quality



Is dependable and consistent (this is HUGE)



We care more about reliability and character than fancy resumes.



Requirements



Strong written and spoken English



Stable internet and quiet work environment



Comfortable with:



Google Docs / Sheets



Scheduling tools



CRM systems (or willing to learn fast)



Available during U.S. business hours



Willing to sign a confidentiality / non-disclosure agreement



Looking for a long-term, full-time role



Pay & Growth



Competitive full-time pay (based on experience)



Performance-based raises



Long-term growth opportunity as the company scales



Stable workload with clear systems and expectations



This is not a “gig.” We want someone who grows with us.



How to Apply



When applying, include:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience as a virtual assistant (if any)



Send a talking video explaining why you believe you’d be a good fit for this role



Your availability (hours per week & time zone)



Applications that don’t follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Facebook Group Posting Specialist
description:
Facebook Group Posting Specialist

Hiring Standards + SOP (For VA Recruitment)

Role Title




munity Posting Specialist



Core Objective



Generate inbound leads for local home service companies by posting authentic, conversational content in local
 groups from the client’s personal profile.



The role focuses on:



Joining groups



Tracking group posting rules



Posting organic content



Responding to comments

title: Remote Sales Associate
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a Remote Sales Associate (U.S. Pacific Time) to join our car detailing and cleaning service. The ideal candidate is confident in making calls, engaging with people, and helping us grow our client base. This role combines sales (cold calling, lead follow-up, and appointment setting) with admin support to keep processes organized.

You will receive a generous salary and potential to earn bonuses.



We want someone who aligns with our core values, thrives in a competitive environment, and enjoys beating records. You should be comfortable working independently, contributing ideas, and helping us continuously improve.



We'd love to hear from you. Kindly fill out this form if you're interested: 



** Passion for cars or experience in the car industry is a big plus**





What You’ll Do

Make 30+ daily sales calls (B2B and B2C).

Respond to inbound leads from campaigns, forms, calls, and social channels.

Convert leads into bookings and upsells.

Use a CRM to track leads, notes, and tasks.

Build strong client relationships with follow-ups, feedback requests, etc.

Build and maintain lists of prospects.

Attend weekly tea
etings.





What We’re Looking For

3+ years of sales experience (inbound/outbound, lead gen, or appointment setting).

Proven success in B2B and B2C cold calling.

Fluent English speaker.

Someone quick on their feet.

Strong objection-handling and relationship-building skills.

Proficient in Google Workspace, MS Office, and using a CRM.

Highly motivated and works well without being micromanaged.

Stable internet and reliable work from home setup.



Benefits

Competitive Salary

13th Month Pay

10 Paid Leave Days (Used for sick days, vacations, etc.)

Paid Time Off During U.S. Holidays (Easter, Christmas, New Year, 4th of July, Thanksgiving)

Stable internet connection

Quiet workspace

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google & Meta Ads)
description:
I. Position Overview

We are seeking a highly analytical and performance-oriented Performance Marketing Specialist to manage, optimize, and scale paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta 
 & Instagram) platforms.

This role plays a key part in driving qualified leads, customer acquisition, and revenue growth through strategic planning, hands-on execution, and ongoing performance optimization.



II. Key Responsibilities

Plan, execute, and manage paid media campaigns across Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max) and Meta Ads platforms.

Conduct audience research, keyword analysis, and competitor benchmarking to improve campaign performance.

Monitor, analyze, and optimize campaigns to achieve KPIs such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPC, and conversion rate.

Collaborate with creative and content teams to develop and test high-performing ad creatives and messaging.

Allocate and manage advertising budgets effectively to maximize ROI and scale successful campaigns.

Implement and maintain accurate tracking systems using Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and other tracking tools.

Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable insights and optimization recommendations.

Stay updated on industry trends, platform updates, and emerging performance marketing best practices.

Work cross-functionally to align paid media strategies with overall marketing and business objectives.



III. Qualifications & Requirements

1–3+ years of hands-on experience in Paid Media or Digital Advertising.

Proven experience managing campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads platforms.

Strong analytical skills with a data-driven decision-making approach.

Experience with performance tracking, analytics, and reporting tools.

Ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously and meet deadlines.

Excellent communication and teamwork skills.



IV. Preferred Qualifications

Experience in lead generation and/or e-commerce performance campaigns.

Knowledge of A/B testing, remarketing strategies, and funnel optimization.

Experience managing medium to large advertising budgets.



V. What We Offer

Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

Opportunity to work with diverse industries and fast-growing brands.

Dynamic and fast-paced performance marketing environment.

Continuous learning and professional development opportunities.

Clear career progression pathways.



VI. How to Apply

Please submit your CV to: 

Subject line: Paid Media Specialist – Full Name

title: Looking for an On-Camera Host for Exercising Youtube Channel
description:
Hello, we are looking for a person, male or female, who is comfortable doing basic stretches & exercises on camera.



The exercises will be easy, as it will be targeted towards seniors.



Example of the content we'll create: 
 



Requirements:

- Physically fit. No extreme physique required like 6 pack abs, but you cannot look out of shape.

- Comfortable appearing on camera

- Good camera quality (Iphone is fine)

- Clean background for recording (a gym, outside, in your house is fine.)

- Gym clothing (t-shirt, shorts, tank tops. No jeans, sweaters, etc).



Job Details:

You will be given a list of exercises to do. All you have to do is record yourself doing them. 



For clarifcation, we DO NOT do sexual content nor plan to. Your facial appearance DOES NOT matter, only your physique does. All recordings will only be used for educational purposes on Youtube.



You won't be speaking often, perhaps few sentences like "like and subscribed" related. 



Average recording length may be from 15 minutes to 60 minutes long.

The rate is $50 to $100 USD per recording.



If you are interested in working with us, please apply and submit a video in a google drive link, that records you doing basic stretches & say hello to the camera.



*This will help me check for 1.) good recording background 2.) camera quality 3.) physical appearance

title: Branch Support Specialist For A Home Care - Starting At $1000/Month
description:
Company Summary



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in the U.S. We believe in true partnership where our virtual assistants act as an extension of the care team. Our goal is to ensure a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for clients and families alike. 



About The Role



The Branch Support Specialist (BSS) is a member of the operations team under the supervision of the Regional Vice President of Operations. The BSS is responsible for assisting Care Coordinators within their assigned region with scheduling caregivers with clients and ensuring an outstanding client experience. The BSS works directly with our clients and their families to coordinate care services. This position promotes and supports the Company’s core values of Compassion, a positive Attitude, Respect and Excellence.



Job Responsibilities



- Cover early morning calls/Nexa messages

- Assist assigned branches in daily operations; can be reassigned as needed

- Placement of caregivers with clients based on needs and preferences

- Manage client relations within assigned branches

- Maintain cases and update schedule in system with all changes and additions

- Place confirmation calls to appropriate responsible parties regarding schedule

- Proactively reach out to clients to build relationship and identify ways to create optimal experience for clients

- Assist recruiters with maintaining caregiver credentials and expiration dates and ensuring proper and current credentials are on file for all field personnel assigned

- Collaborate with Care Support staff by providing daily communication reports and transfer of phone coverage

- Maintain caregiver/client online record information and notify Payroll as appropriate

- Review and update billing rates and pay rates; confirm mileage reimbursements

- Maintain and audit client files per regional requirements

- Ensure each client has a signed Service Agreement

- Document caregiver and client i
 and complaints and follow up with the operations management and/or supervisory nurse as appropriate

- Check and follow up on caregiver telephony

- Review and respond to weekly reports

- Maintain an up-to-date caregiver availability list daily

- Follow up with caregivers who have not worked with the Company within the last month

- Document and follow up on caregiver tardiness, call-offs, and other issues as appropriate in system; Notify operations leader for guidance on escalated issues

- Support office operations and collaboration by responding to call volume, colleague absences and project implementations

- Other duties as assigned



Requirements



- College degree preferred

- Minimum of one year experience in the employment placement field preferably in the health care industry; or two years administrative experience may substitute for employment placement experience

- Excellent client/customer service skills

- Previous computer experience, proficient with MS Office products

- Proficient in problem solving, organization, and multitasking

- Comfortable working collaboratively in cross-functional teams

- Ability to communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with all levels of the organization



Benefits



Competitive Base Pay:  Among the highest in the homecare industry.

Make a Difference: Help ensure clients receive the best care possible.

Growth Opportunities: Room to advance and learn as we grow.

Supportive Team: We value collaboration, compassion, and a good laugh.

Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with your own reliable device and stable internet connection.





Ready to Be a Hero?



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated, have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! 



To apply, click this link and submit your resume. 



We can't wait to welcome you to the team and together we make a difference!

title: Operations & Sales Growth Executive Assistant
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission is helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

This is not a "task-taker" role; this is a high-level partnership. As the Executive Assistant, your primary mission is to protect Lisa’s time, energy, and focus. You are the gatekeeper of the brand and the architect of the founder's daily life. 



While you handle high-level EA duties, you will also manage the "backend" systems (GoHighLevel & ClickUp) and AI automations that keep the 7-figure engine running smoothly behind the scenes. You are the bridge between brand exposure and revenue.



---



1. Primary Responsibility: Executive Support & Gatekeeping



Zone of Genius Protection: You own Lisa’s calendar. You don’t just book meetings; you architect her week to ensure "Deep Work" for software development and high-level sales is never interrupted.

Inbox Zen & Triage: You are the first line of defense. You filter, label, and respond to 80% of incoming communication so Lisa only sees what truly requires her eyes.

High-EQ Representation: Whether in the DMs or via
, you represent a premium brand. You interact with high-level clients and partners with warmth, professionalism, and absolute precision.

The Digital Housekeeper: You ensure Lisa’s digital environment (Google Drive, Slack, Inbox) is organized, clutter-free, and optimized for speed.





2. Secondary Responsibility: Systems & AI (Behind the Scenes)



ClickUp Command Center (Non-Negotiable): You manage the team’s workflow. You ensure the Creative Architect, Tech Guy, and Developer are on track, using ClickUp Automations to move tasks through to the "Wednesday Drop."

GHL Pipeline Mastery (Non-Negotiable): You ensure the CRM is 100?curate. You manage lead tags and nurture sequences, ensuring no "Golden Opportunity" ever falls through the cracks.

AI Integration: You leverage AI to make the business faster. This includes using AI for meeting transcriptions, instantly turning "voice notes" into formatted SOPs, and overseeing AI-driven lead responses.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Who You Are



The Proactive Partner: You think three steps ahead. You solve problems before the founder knows they exist.

Systems-Minded: You get a dopamine hit from a clean CRM, a perfectly structured ClickUp board, and a zero-inbox.

Owner Mentality: You don't wait for a to-do list. You see a gap in the business and you build a bridge.

Flawless Communicator: Your written English is impeccable, persuasive, professional, and polished.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Qualifications & Skills



2–3+ Years as an EA or Ops Manager for a high-ticket coach, consultant, or agency.

GoHighLevel (GHL) Proficiency: Experience managing leads, pipelines, and workflows.

ClickUp Experience: Ability to build and manage complex project boards and automations.

AI Literacy: Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Otter, etc.) to automate repetitive admin tasks.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Application Requirements



Please provide the following to be considered for Phase 1:

1.  Resume: A brief history of your experience in operations and sales support.

2.  DISC Profile: Please include your results (D% I% S% C%).

3.  Rate your proficiency (1–10) with ClickUp, GoHighLevel, and AI tools.

4.  Tell us about one specific time you "saved the day" for a founder by fixing a system or managing a chaotic inbox.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Work Arrangement & Compensation



Remote: 9am – 5pm AEDT (Australian Eastern Time)

Hours: 40 Hours / Week

Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month (Full-Time)

title: Senior AUD Tax Accountant
description:
About the Role



We are seeking an experienced tax accountant with a strong background in Australian taxation and proficiency in Xero. The ideal candidate will have at least five years of experience in Australian tax and accounting and will be responsible for preparing financial statements and tax returns for various entity types, including companies, trusts, partnerships, and individuals.



Key Responsibilities



• Prepare financial statements and tax returns for companies, trusts, partnerships, individuals and SMSFs.

• Ensure compliance with Australian tax laws, including income tax, GST, and BAS reporting.

• Reconcile accounts and manage general ledger entries.

• Work with Xero & BGLSF360 (optional) to process transactions, maintain records, and generate reports.

• Assist in tax planning strategies and provide general tax advice as required.

• Communicate with the team to ensure deadlines and client expectations are met.

• Looking at implementing and providing Advisory information to the Director

• Assist the Director with initial reviews of financial statements, tax returns, and supporting workpapers.

• Identify basic errors, inconsistencies, and missing information prior to final review.

• Support the team by helping improve accuracy and completeness of work before submission to the Director.



Key Requirements



• Minimum 5 years of experience in Australian tax and accounting.

• Strong English literacy and speaking skills

• Proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360 (negotiable) and cloud-based accounting software.

• Strong knowledge of Australian taxation, including company tax, trust distributions, BAS, IAS, and GST.

• Experience preparing tax returns and financial statements for various entity structures.

• Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage workloads efficiently.

• Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.





What We Offer



• Competitive salary based on experience.

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunity to work with a growing Australian accounting firm.

• Ongoing training and development to enhance your skills.

• Long-term career growth potential.



If you meet the qualifications and are looking for a long-term opportunity in an Australian accounting firm, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Junior Civil Engineer w/ US Experience
description:
We are seeking a Civil Engineer with US experience ,you will be working with civil engineering and surveying firm supporting land development and infrastructure projects, including data center assignments across due diligence, design, and construction support phases.



This is a true civil engineering production role — not a generalist drafting position. The ideal candidate will bring solid expertise in Civil 3D, grading and drainage design, stormwater/hydraulic analysis, and utility/site development work. This person should be detail-oriented, responsive, and thrive in a structured engineering environment where quality, follow-through, and collaboration are paramount.



Job Responsibilities:

-Support civil engineering design production for land development and site development assignments.

-Prepare grading plans, drainage plans, utility layouts, and related civil engineering drawings.

-Assist with stormwater and hydraulic analysis tied to active projects.

-Develop plan sets and engineering documents using AutoCAD Civil 3D.

-Support project work across due diligence, preliminary design, permitting, and construction documentation phases.

-Work closely with the Senior Civil Engineer to execute assigned design tasks and maintain project 
ntum.

-Incorporate technical markups, review comments, and revision requests accurately and efficiently.

-Maintain organized design files, plan updates, and project documentation across multiple assignments.

-Produce accurate work with strong attention to detail and consistency across all deliverables.

-Help reduce production bottlenecks by completing assigned work with minimal follow-up required.



Qualifications:

-5+ years of civil engineering experience.

-US-based project experience is a MUST.

-Experience supporting land development engineering projects.

-Prior involvement in civil site design, drainage, grading, and utility-related work.

-Proficiency in AutoCAD Civil 3D.

-Working knowledge of grading and drainage design and stormwater/hydraulic analysis.

-Strong attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple tasks across active projects.

-Strong written and verbal communication skills.

-Nice to have: familiarity with EPANET, HydroCAD, or WaterCAD; experience with water line design or data center/commercial site development work.



Requirements:

-Updated Resume/CV.

-Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

-Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

-UPS/battery backup to ensure continuity during power interruptions.



Benefits:

-Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

-WFH set-up

-Opportunities for career advancement.

-HMO coverage for employee and immediate family members.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines!

title: Onboarding Specialist
description:
I am looking for an experienced, detail-oriented, and diligent Onboarding Specialist to join my in-house team.



Responsibilities:



***New Hire Onboarding

- Guide new hires through the onboarding process, ensuring all steps and compliance requirements are met.

- Prepare onboarding materials, such as contracts, policies, etc.

- Conduct orientation sessions and answer any questions from new hires.



***Regular Communication with New Hires



- Establish regular check-ins with new hires to address queries, ensure satisfaction, and escalate any concerns.

- Serve as a point of contact for new hires, providing ongoing support throughout their tenure.



***Data Entry & Record Keeping



- Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of onboarding activities, check-ins, and other events and documents in the system.

- Input and track data related to new hire performance and account status in the system.



***HR & Admin, Training, and IT



- Assist in the development and implementation of HR & admin policies and procedures.

- Assist in the creation of training materials as well as coordinate training sessions and certifications.

- Coordinate with the IT team regarding technology, equipment, and data concerns.



***Collaboration with Recruitment Team



- Work closely with the recruitment team to ensure a smooth transition from candidate selection to the onboarding process.

- Gather information on open requirements to include in internal communications.



***Continuous Improvement



- Identify areas for improvement in the onboarding process and propose solutions to enhance new hire experience and client satisfaction.

- Stay updated on industry trends and legal requirements that may affect new hire onboarding procedures.



Qualifications:

- Prior experience in new hire onboarding is strictly required

- Prior experience in regular communication with employees and other departments

- Must be familiar with other HR processes

- Excellent communication, time management, and organizational skills

title: SEO Specialist (GoHighLevel Website Builder)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an SEO Specialist who doesn’t just build websites—but drives measurable growth through them. In this role, you will play a key part in turning GoHighLevel (GHL) websites into high-ranking, lead-generating, and conversion-focused assets.



Your work will directly impact our clients’ visibility, lead flow, and revenue by ensuring every website is strategically built and optimized for both search engines and user experience.





What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Build and optimize GoHighLevel (GHL) websites that rank on search engines and convert traffic into leads

- Turn keyword research and competitor insights into strategic website structures and content direction

- Continuously improve website performance, ensuring fast load speeds, mobile responsiveness, and strong UX

- Implement technical SEO that ensures websites are properly indexed, crawlable, and competitive in search rankings

- Analyze performance data and translate insights into actionable improvements that increase traffic and conversions

- Conduct regular audits to identify opportunities for growth, optimization, and scaling results

- Collaborate with the team to ensure SEO efforts align with overall marketing and business goals



The Value You Bring

- You build websites with purpose—every page is designed to rank, engage, and convert

- You understand that SEO is not just traffic, but revenue and business growth

- You are proactive in identifying opportunities to improve performance and stay ahead of competitors

- You take ownership of results and continuously look for ways to scale what’s working

- You combine technical skills with strategic thinking to deliver long-term, sustainable SEO success



What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Websites that consistently increase in organic traffic and keyword rankings

- Higher-quality leads generated through optimized pages and funnels

- Improved conversion rates across landing pages and websites

- Faster, high-performing websites that meet SEO and UX standards

- Clear, measurable contribution to client and company growth



Qualifications

- Proven experience in SEO and website optimization

- Hands-on experience building and managing websites in GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Strong understanding of on-page, technical, and performance SEO

- Experience with tools like Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar

- Ability to interpret data and make results-driven decisions

- Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS is a plus

- Strong communication and ability to work independently

title: Sales Admin Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Onboarding & Documentation

Own the full client onboarding lifecycle — from intake through KYC/AML documentation, compliance review, and account activation — ensuring every file is complete, accurate, and audit-ready before submission.

Prepare and coordinate all onboarding documentation including subscription agreements, client questionnaires, and regulatory forms, working closely with the compliance and operations teams to meet applicable standards.

Proactively track onboarding status for all active clients, following up on outstanding items and escalating blockers to avoid delays in the activation timeline.

Maintain a structured, version-controlled onboarding repository that can withstand internal or regulatory audit at any point.



Client Relationship Support

Serve as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing timely, professional responses and managing expectations on resolution timelines.

Coordinate all client-facing logistics — meetings, product demonstrations, webinars, and review calls — ensuring preparation materials, agendas, and follow-up notes are managed without requiring senior tea
mbers to chase.

Maintain accurate, current client records in the CRM; flag data anomalies, contact changes, or missing information proactively rather than reactively.

Support the relationship management team in preparing client update materials, periodic reports, and tailored communications.



Sales & Administrative Support

Support the sales team with scheduling, calendar management, CRM maintenance, and preparation of pitch materials and proposals.

Maintain internal trackers and action logs for client interactions, onboarding milestones, and sales pipeline activity.

Identify and flag opportunities to streamline administrative workflows using available technology tools.



Requirements:

3–5 years of experience in client onboarding, client servicing, or relationship support within financial services, fintech, or asset management

Hands-on experience managing KYC/AML documentation and compliance-driven onboarding processes end-to-end — not just assisting

Strong proficiency in CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot) and Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

Excellent written English communication skills; able to draft professional client-facing correspondence independently and accurately

Structured, detail-oriented approach to documentation management with a track record of maintaining audit-ready files

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple concurrent client onboarding workflows without supervision

Comfortable working remotely and independently, aligned to Singapore / KL business hours (SGT/MYT)

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday

title: Brand & Content Designer (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Job description



At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health and improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain and discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain and distress others have to endure.



We’re seeking a full-time Brand and Content Designer to lead the creative direction of our brand across packaging, offline marketing, and digital platforms. This role is ideal for a strategic, hands-on creative who can own both design and content production, from ideation to execution, while supporting our expansion across Southeast Asia and global markets.



As a key member of the team, you'll be responsible for producing compelling visuals and content that reflect the heart of our brand and connect meaningfully with consumers, healthcare professionals, and distribution partners.



Key Responsibilities:



-Brand Development & Creative Direction-

*Lead development of visual identity for new and existing brands, including logos, packaging, brand guidelines, typography and brand story

*Propose and implement creative directions from Pantone color palettes to iconography, font systems and photography guidelines

*Establish and maintain consistent branding across all physical and digital touchpoints, while ensuring all brand assets are stored and updated in an organized, easily accessible database



-Graphic & Marketing Design-

*Design high-impact materials such as product packaging, brochures, point-of-sale displays, in-store visuals and Continuing Medical Education (CME) event collaterals

*Develop pitch decks, sales presentations and brand kits for internal and external stakeholders

*Create visuals for promotions, campaigns, and trade shows for greater awareness and conversion



-Content Creation & Copywriting-

*Collaborate with the team to develop content ideas and messaging for various platforms (digital ads, social media, web,
)

*Write and edit marketing copy as needed, including taglines, brand messaging, product descriptions, and promotional materials

*Contribute to storytelling, campaign ideation, consumer education initiatives, and customer loyalty initiatives



-Digital & Multimedia Content-

*Produce digital assets for ecommerce platforms, social media ads, newsletters, and display ads (Google Ads Meta, TikTok)

*Edit videos and animations for campaigns, tutorials, events, and educational content using tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

*Repurpose content across multiple formats and languages when applicable



-Cross-Functional Collaboration-

*Work closely with marketing, sales, pharmacists and leadership to turn strategic goals into compelling creative output

*Participate in product launch discussions and brand development brainstorming sessions

*Coordinate with external freelancers or vendors as needed



-Regional Support & Market Expansion-

*Adapt assets for regional markets including Singapore, Malaysia, Mainland China & Hong Kong and future expansion areas

*Ensure consistency across regions while accounting for local cultural, language, market and regulatory differences



-Requirements-

*Minimum 3–5 years of experience in graphic design, brand development, content creation, or multimedia production

*Strong portfolio showcasing design, branding, and content/copywriting capabilities across print and digital

*Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools

*Excellent understanding of branding, packaging, digital marketing, and customer communication

*Creative thinker with strong attention to detail and an eye for aesthetic balance

*Highly organized, self-driven, and able to manage multiple timelines in a fast-paced environment

*Strong communication and collaboration skills, especially in remote work settings

*Experience in the health, wellness, pharmaceutical, or consumer goods sector is a plus

*Degree in Design, Marketing, Communications, or a related field preferred but not mandatory



Kindly submit your updated CV and sample portfolio to 
 for our review.

title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to
