description:
I'm looking for someone who can create high-quality Instagram Reels for my AI influencer pages. 



Here’s what you will do:

- Create images with my tools – Use my proprietary site (Seedream-style workflow, similar to Higgsfield) to generate on-brand images of the AI model based on prompts, references, and example videos I provide. (Focus: viral content)

- Turn images into short videos – Import the images into Kling (via the proprietary site) and build short vertical videos for Instagram Reels. Add smooth movement, zooms, pans, and simple effects so the videos feel alive and not static.

- Add captions and on-screen text – Add clear, readable captions and hooks. Follow my copy style and structure, or use text I provide, so each Reel has a strong message and call to action.

- Add music and audio – Choose strong background music that matches the vibe of the clip or example video I provide. Use ElevenLabs to create voiceovers when needed, using the provided script.

- Sync everything together – Match cuts and transitions to the beat of the music. Time captions, scenes, and voiceover so the Reel feels smooth, fast, and optimized for retention.

- Improve over time – Study content that performs well and use it as a base for new reels. Take feedback and continuously improve quality. I will provide example videos initially, but over time I expect you to create content independently from scratch.



*For this test you will use OUR site and credits 

*Ideally, to show you can recreate viral content. ^^^



Requirements:

- Strong experience with ComfyUI, Higgsfield or Seedream-style tools for AI image creation

- Experience using Kling or similar tools for turning images into short-form video

- Experience using ElevenLabs or similar tools for AI voiceover

- Proven skill creating Instagram Reels or TikTok-style videos (cuts, captions, music, pacing)

- Strong sense of timing, pacing, and what drives views and engagement

- Able to work independently, follow directions, and hit deadlines consistently



This position will start part-time and quickly transition to full-time (40 hours per week, paid weekly). I will provide guidance, but I’m looking for someone who already has experience with the tools listed above and understands what high-performing content looks like on Instagram Reels.



TO APPLY:

Message me here

- Include the word DOLLS somewhere in your message

- Send examples of past AI content (images, videos, full Reels, etc.)

- Share any experience you have creating and posting Instagram Reels



NEXT STEPS:

If I like your portfolio and application, I’ll respond here and ask for your 
 username. All future communication will move to 
.



Important: When you reach out, include the word DOLL at the bottom or somewhere in your message or it won’t be accepted—no matter how good your work is. This is to confirm attention to detail.

title: Wills & Estates Specialist Lawyer (Branch Lead)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Wills & Estates Lawyer to take full ownership of building and running our Wills & Estates (W&E) division. This is not just a legal drafting role—you will be responsible for establishing, managing, and scaling an entire practice area from end to end.



You will serve as the driving force behind this branch, ensuring high-quality client outcomes while building efficient systems and processes that support long-term growth.



Your Impact in This Role

As our Wills & Estates Specialist, your work will directly shape a new revenue stream and strengthen client trust in our firm. You will:

- Build and lead the W&E division from the ground up, creating structure, workflows, and best practices

- Deliver end-to-end estate planning services, including drafting wills, powers of attorney, and related legal documents

- Ensure exceptional client experience, guiding clients through sensitive life decisions with clarity and care

- Drive revenue and growth by developing scalable systems and identifying opportunities within the W&E space

- Maintain compliance and legal excellence, ensuring all documents and processes meet current legal standards

- Act as a trusted advisor, helping clients protect their assets and plan for the future with confidence

- Collaborate with leadership to align the W&E branch with overall business strategy



What You Bring & the Value You Add

You are more than a lawyer—you are a builder, operator, and strategic thinker who can turn a service into a thriving business unit.

- Proven experience in Wills & Estates law, including drafting wills and estate planning documents

- Strong understanding of end-to-end estate planning processes

- Ability to work autonomously and take full ownership of a practice area

- Experience in building or improving legal systems and workflows (highly valued)

- Excellent client communication and relationship management skills, especially in sensitive situations

- Commercial mindset with the ability to identify growth opportunities and improve efficiency

- High attention to detail with a commitment to accuracy and compliance



Why This Role Matters

This role is critical to expanding our service offering and deepening the value we provide to clients. By building a strong Wills & Estates division, you will:

- Create a sustainable and scalable business line

- Help clients make life-defining decisions with confidence and security

- Establish systems that enable long-term operational efficiency and growth

- Position yourself as a key leader within the firm, with real influence over direction and outcomes

title: Business Administration Officer - Permanent Remote, Flexible Hours (+10 GMT)
description:
*** DO NOT APPLY UNTIL YOU HAVE READ THIS AD IN FULL ***

Amigo Technology is an IT service business and Managed Service Provider (MSP), located on the Sunshine Coast, Australia. We have been operating for 15 years, with the goal of making computers and technology friendlier to our awesome small business clients. We are seeking an administrative officer to join our friendly team.



By joining the Amigo team, you will enjoy:



- A flexible work-from-home position, ideally between 25 and 35 hours per week, on a schedule that works for you

- A friendly team atmosphere where you’ll need a good sense of humour!

- Daily opportunities to help ordinary people with technology challenges in a team environment, with the goal of making technology friendly

- Competitive earnings, typically between 300php and 370php per hour, depending on ability and experience, plus bonuses



We are seeking a candidate who has:



- A keen interest in working in a process-driven environment and working together with a technology-focused team

- A desire to utilise a mix of creative and process-based problem solving

- Excellent English, both written and spoken

- A high level of attention to detail - you must put the word "AMIGO" in the “Additional Comments” section of our application form to be considered!

- A good sense of humour!



This position will have many opportunities for growth, and over time you will have access to internal mentoring, certificates and training programs to encourage you to work with a wider range of systems. Prior experience with the following would be greatly appreciated and will lead to greater earnings, although this is not a requirement:



- At least two years of experience working in an business administration position, ideally in IT services organisation

- Experience with various features of Xero, such as bank rules, activity statements, reporting and troubleshooting account issues

- Familiarity or experience with the Australian taxation system

- Ability to work with a variety of documents and spreadsheets, including the use of formulas and advanced formatting

- Experience with AI tools and automation



Your duties will include the following:



- Manage financial operations including accounts payable and receivable, bank reconciliation, billing, payroll processing, and financial reporting via Xero

- Oversee the complete client lifecycle by coordinating Managed Services Client (MSC) onboarding and offboarding, tracking SLA performance, and maintaining strong ongoing client relationships.

- Provide essential operational support through inventory and RMA management, meeting coordination, and regular audits of technician maintenance schedules via Quire.

- Coordinate human resources functions such as recruitment support, team rostering, leave management, and employee onboarding.

- Drive process improvement and compliance by auditing software licensing, reviewing team communications for quality, managing legal documentation, and identifying opportunities for workflow automation.

- Maintain the company's digital presence and sales collateral by executing
 campaigns, performing basic WordPress website updates, basic social media management, and organising centralised documentation.



If you have made it this far, great! Before you apply:



- You will be expected to learn quickly and contribute as part of a team. The workload will be both challenging and rewarding.

- We conduct background checks and our team is required to use managed remote workstations. Dishonest conduct will be quickly caught. If you’re thinking of using a mouse jiggler or being OE, please don’t apply.

- Applicants MUST submit their application via this form to be considered - all other application methods will be IGNORED: 
/form-admin-officer-application



Please also check and re-check the links to your resume to ensure they are correct. We will only contact valid submissions. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Transaction Coordinator (Residential Coordinator)
description:
We looking for an experienced, organized, and detail-oriented Residential Coordinator to join my team. We manage a property management and investment firm based in Illinois, and I need someone who can take ownership of the applicant lifecycle and ensure our operations run smoothly.



In this role, you’ll be responsible for making sure every applicant is fully qualified according to our policies and local laws. You’ll be the bridge between our leasing department, property managers, and prospective tenants—managing documentation, processing screenings, and ensuring leases are signed and fees are handled correctly in our system. You will also be a key resource for my Property Managers, helping them navigate tenant issues, rent payments, and move-in logistics.



Primary Responsibilities:



- Applicant Relations: I need you to ensure all applications are complete and accurate, collecting state IDs and income verification for every person applying. You’ll handle the full screening process—including background, credit, criminal, and employment checks—while making sure all administrative fees are collected or waived as appropriate.

- Leasing & Data Entry: You will type up leases, complete all necessary paperwork, and input data into Yardi accurately and on time. This includes managing rentable items like parking and storage additions.

- Tenant Relations: You’ll be a primary point of contact for our tenants, helping them understand their leases, answering move-in questions, and guiding them through processes like subletting, reletting, or roommate changes.

- Reporting & Ledgers: I’ll rely on you to assist with updating renewals and market rents, while keeping tenant ledgers fully up to date.

- Internal Collaboration: You’ll stay in close contact with me and the rest of the team to discuss portfolio status and consult on applicant decisions before we finalize any leasing agreements.

- Assist the management team with various tasks as they arise to ensure we stay compliant with company policy and local regulations.

- Attend tea
etings to share best practices and stay aligned on our goals.

- Handle additional projects or tasks as assigned by management.



Qualifications:



-  Communication & Professionalism: You must have strong oral and written communication skills and maintain a professional demeanor at all times.

- Conflict Resolution: I need someone who can stay calm and diffuse customer concerns before they escalate.

- Technical Skills: You should be proficient in Outlook, Word, and Excel. Experience with (or a strong desire to learn) Yardi, RentCafé, Monday, DocuSign, and Mxie is a huge plus.

- Organization: High-level organizational skills and a sharp eye for detail and follow-up are non-negotiable.

- Attitude: You should bring a positive, team-oriented attitude to the desk every day.

- Ability to work during CST Business hours (PH Graveyard Shift)



Kindly apply using this link:

title: Experienced Mortgage Administrator / Case Manager — Specialist UK Property Finance Broker
description:
About Envelop Finance



Envelop Finance is a UK-based specialist property finance broker, arranging a wide range of finance solutions for clients, including residential mortgages, buy-to-let mortgages, bridging loans, commercial mortgages, development finance, and other specialist lending.



We support clients through the full finance journey, from initial enquiry and application through to offer and completion.



We are looking for an experienced, highly organised, and detail-focused Mortgage Administrator / Case Manager to join our team on a full-time remote basis.



This role would suit someone with strong experience in mortgage administration, case management, financial services support, broker support, or specialist lending administration. Experience within the UK mortgage, specialist lending, bridging, commercial finance, or wider property finance industry would be highly preferred.



About the Role



You will be responsible for supporting property finance cases from application through to completion, helping ensure that clients, lenders, solicitors, estate agents, valuers, and advisers are kept updated and that files progress smoothly.



You should be confident managing multiple cases at once, chasing outstanding documents, updating CRM systems, and communicating professionally with clients and third parties.



This is a key role within the business, so we are looking for someone reliable, proactive, and able to take ownership of their work.



Key Responsibilities



Your responsibilities will include:



Managing mortgage and property finance cases from application to completion

Supporting cases across residential mortgages, buy-to-let, bridging finance, commercial mortgages, development finance, and other specialist property finance products

Preparing, checking, and submitting documents and application information

Packaging cases in line with lender requirements

Liaising with clients, lenders, solicitors, estate agents, valuers, and internal advisers

Chasing outstanding documents, updates, valuations, offers, and completion details

Keeping CRM and case management systems accurate and up to date

Monitoring deadlines and ensuring cases move forward efficiently

Handling client communications professionally by
 and, where required, phone

Supporting compliance and file-checking processes

Maintaining accurate records and following internal processes

Providing general administrative and operational support to the business

Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who has:



Previous experience as a Mortgage Administrator, Case Manager, Loan Processor, Paraplanner Support, Finance Administrator, Broker Support Administrator, or similar

Experience in the UK mortgage, finance, property, specialist lending, bridging, commercial finance, or insurance industry is strongly preferred

Excellent written and spoken English

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Excellent organisation and time-management skills

Confidence managing multiple cases and priorities

A proactive approach — someone who follows up without needing to be reminded

Experience working UK hours

High levels of confidentiality and professionalism

Good working knowledge of Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, CRMs, and online systems

Helpful but Not Essential



The following experience would be a strong advantage:



Virtual Assistant experience

Bookkeeping or finance admin experience

Xero, QuickBooks, or similar accounting software

Experience supporting a UK adviser, broker, accountant, estate agency, or financial services firm

Experience with bridging loans, commercial mortgages, development finance, or specialist lending

Client onboarding experience

Experience preparing reports, spreadsheets, or management information

Experience using mortgage CRM or case management systems

Working Hours



This is a full-time role working UK business hours.



You must be comfortable working remotely and being available during the UK working day.



Salary



The starting salary is from $1,250 USD per month, depending on experience.



We are open to discussing a higher salary for candidates with strong UK mortgage industry experience, specialist lending knowledge, excellent case-management ability, bookkeeping experience, or proven experience supporting UK finance businesses.



What We Offer

Full-time remote work

Long-term role with a growing UK specialist finance broker

Stable monthly salary

Supportive working environment

Opportunity to become a key part of the team

Exposure to a wide range of property finance cases

Opportunity to grow with the business over time

How to Apply



Please apply with:



Your CV or resume

A short summary of your mortgage, finance, case management, or VA experience

Details of any UK mortgage, specialist lending, bridging, commercial finance, bookkeeping, or CRM experience

Your expected monthly salary in USD

Your availability to start

Confirmation that you can work full-time UK business hours



Please use the subject line:



Experienced Mortgage Administrator / Case Manager — Envelop Finance



Please Read Before Applying



We are only looking for applicants who have carefully read this job advert and have relevant experience.



At the very top of your application, please write:



“Envelop Finance — I have read the full job description.”



Then answer these five questions:



What relevant mortgage, finance, property, or case management experience do you have?

Have you worked with a UK company before? If yes, in what role?

Have you worked with mortgages, bridging loans, commercial finance, or specialist lending before?

Can you work full-time UK hours?

Why do you think you would be a good fit for this role?



Generic applications, copy-and-paste responses, or applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Static Ad Designer (AI Driven Workflow)
description:
About the role



We are a direct to consumer skincare brand running paid Meta ads as our main growth channel. We are scaling and need two static designers to join the team. You will produce static ad creatives in 9x16 and 1x1 format every single day, working from briefings with AI image generation as your starting point.



What you will receive for every creative



You never start with a blank page. For each ad you will get three things from us.

First, inspiration. A reference ad or a few reference ads that point to the visual direction we want.

Second, a thesis. A short written explanation of why we believe this creative will work. The angle, the audience pain point, the mechanism, the emotional lever. So you understand the intent, not just the look.

Third, three variations to execute. These can be image variations, text variations, or a mix of both. Your job is to bring all three to life cleanly and consistently.



Your daily output



Three finished static ad creatives per day. Each delivered in both 9x16 and 1x1 format, properly named, organised in our Google Drive, ready to upload to Meta.



What you need to be good at



Working with AI image generators and refining outputs through iteration rather than accepting the first result.

Reading a briefing carefully and following it exactly.

Mobile first thinking. Most of our ads are watched on a phone, so legibility at small sizes matters more than anything else.

Strong written English so you can communicate in Slack and understand briefings.



What you do not need



Photoshop/Figma skills. The image generation and the strategy is where the value sits.



Reference for the style we are after



This is the kind of static creative we produce. Look through this ad library before applying so you know what you are saying yes 

to.: 
 active_status=active&ad_type=all&country=ALL&is_targeted_country=false&media_type=all&search_type=page&sort_data[mode]=relevancy_monthly_grouped&sort_data[direction]=desc&view_all_page_id=
To apply



Open your message with the words SKIN DESIGN. If your message does not start with those two words I will not read it.



Then in your message include the following:



1. Your availability and start date.

2. Three to five examples of static ad creatives you have made before. Direct response style preferred over brand or lifestyle.

3. A short answer to this question. Do you understand the terms TOF, MOF, and BOF? If yes, briefly explain in your own words what each stage means and what static ad creatives typically look like at each stage. Keep it short, two or three sentences per stage is enough. We want to see how you think about funnel context, not a textbook definition.

4. Your hourly rate and if you work in the weekends (130% more than week days pay)



We are hiring two designers from this round. If your work and your answers are strong you will receive a full time offer within one week.

title: Windows Desktop App Beta – Local Machine Testers Required
description:
We are building a native Windows desktop application. Before release, we need testers who will run real tests on real hardware.



Virtual machines will not work for this cycle. Cloud instances will not work. We need testers with a dedicated local machine running Windows 10 or Windows 11.



You must be ready to perform a full machine test. That means installing the application, running it under normal and heavy system load, uninstalling it cleanly, and reporting exactly what breaks, slows down, or behaves unexpectedly. You will test permissions, file writes, registry behavior, crash recovery, and resource consumption.



This is not a preview. This is not an early access demo. This is active beta testing with structured test cases and documented bug reporting.



What you get in return is early access to a professional Windows application, direct engineering response to your reports, and a formal thank you credit inside the application if you complete the full test cycle.



To apply, send an
 to betateam at windowsapptest dot com with the subject line Local Machine Beta.



Include the following in your message:



Your Windows version and build number

Processor model

Total RAM

Graphics card model

One paragraph describing a bug you found in a previous software test



Serious testers only. Slots are limited. If you cannot run tests on a local Windows machine, this opportunity is not for you.

title: Customer Service Representative

title: Website SEO Specialist
description:
The Website SEO Specialist leads the charge in optimizing our website's performance and driving the growth of organic traffic. As part of this role, you'll be at the forefront of boosting our online visibility and attaining top search engine rankings. We're looking for someone with a strategic mindset, a profound enthusiasm for SEO, and an unyielding dedication to delivering measurable outcomes. An SEO Specialist will play a pivotal role in refining our online presence to achieve unmatched success.



If you're a strategic thinker with a passion for SEO and a drive for results, we want you on our team. Join us as a Website SEO Specialist and play a key role in optimizing our online presence for success. Apply now to embark on a rewarding career in digital marketing with us!



Key Responsibilities:

- Conduct thorough keyword research to pinpoint pertinent search terms and optimization prospects.

- Enhance website content, meta tags, headings, and URLs to boost search engine visibility and enhance user experience.

- Carry out technical audits to detect and rectify issues affecting website crawlability, indexing, and ranking.

- Formulate and implement strategies for building links to obtain top-tier backlinks and enhance domain authority.

- Work closely with content creators to optimize website content for both search engines and user interaction.

- Monitor and analyze website performance metrics, keep track of keyword rankings, and compile routine SEO reports for stakeholders.



Qualifications

- Preferably has 2 years of experience previously working at an SEO Agency.

- Proven experience in SEO, with a strong track record of improving search engine rankings and driving organic traffic.

- In-depth knowledge of SEO tools and techniques, including keyword research tools, SEO auditing tools, and analytics platforms.

- Familiarity with HTML, CSS, and website CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress, Shopify) for implementing technical SEO optimizations.

- Strong analytical skills and attention to detail, with the ability to interpret data and draw actionable insights.

- Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work cross-functionally with content creators, developers, and marketing teams.

- SEO certification or relevant training courses is a plus.



So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.



Expectations:

title: IT QA Specialist
description:
The IT Quality Assurance role has ended up being 99% focused on Quality Assurance (QA) rather than audits. It is responsible for ensuring that IT systems and processes are consistently monitored and improved in alignment with MAG’s standards and industry regulations.



Responsibilities include performing detailed tests to identify and resolve system bugs, developing and maintaining automated test scripts, and providing expert and technical audits. An ability to be an expert in problem-solving, critical thinking and an understanding of complex system dependencies are essential in enabling the IT Manager to show where My Amazon Guy processes are broken and how those processes are affecting key data points. An individual with a strong passion to solve problems and improve data integrity will excel in this position.



Key Responsibilities

- Ensure proper prioritization of tasks is observed, and assignments are properly actioned and handled per MAG standards

- Proactively contribute to providing strategies for work quality advancements

- Collaborate with IT Devs to ensure testing and observation of solutions add value to end users

- Ensure all fields in tasks have met the standard requirement of the team

- Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on complex system issues

- Act as a Cross-Departmental Unblocker by managing tasks such as workflow automations

- Create templates and initiatives to improve QA process efficiency across the organization

- Coordinate and generate independent test cases for each newly developed application/system

- Manage QA IT projects during each phase, ensuring all tasks are reviewed for quality assurance

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative
description:
This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent WFH setup

- Unlimited FREE access to MAG School courses and SOP Library!

- Work schedule is in EST (Monday-Friday only)

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Why wait for permission to level up? Apply now and step into a role where your skills are truly valued.

title: Supply chain manager ecommerce
description:
Reading frontend design skill

Reading frontend design skill





Hier is de herschreven job post — zelfde inhoud, andere structuur en aanpak. Een paar keuzes die ik maakte:



De opening is directer en persoonlijker ("we are not looking for someone who follows processes")

De taken zijn gegroepeerd in compacte kaarten in plaats van een lange lijst

"Not included" is visueel gescheiden zodat kandidaten snel zien wat buiten scope valt

De wekelijkse output staat als grid — makkelijk te scannen

De slotlijn ("If a product goes out of stock, you own it.") blijft staan als afsluiter, want dat is de kern van de rol

Wil je de tekst ook als Word-document of HTML-bestand om direct op de website te plakken?



You said: zet hem in een tekst die ik 1 op 1 kan kopieren en kan plakken

zet hem in een tekst die ik 1 op 1 kan kopieren en kan plakken



16:47

Claude responded: Supply Chain Operator — Inventory & Replenishment

Supply Chain Operator — Inventory & Replenishment



We are not looking for someone who follows processes. We are looking for someone who makes sure products are in stock — before anyone has to ask.



The role



You own inventory flow. End to end.



You are responsible for inventory availability across all channels — our main warehouse, FBA, and LVB. You ensure the right products are in the right place at the right time, and you act before stock-outs happen. This is a performance system, not a task list.



What you'll actually do



Daily operations

— Monitor stock levels across warehouse, FBA and LVB

— Track incoming shipments and delays

— Maintain full visibility of inventory at all times



Replenishment & planning

— Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB

— Prioritise fast restocking of bestsellers

— Balance stock between channels



FBA shipments

— Create and manage shipments at box and pallet level

— Book and manage Amazon Freight

— Ensure smooth inbound flow



Coordination & control

— Work with warehouse and carriers to ensure correct execution

— Fix issues fast when something goes wrong

— Keep inbound and stock data clean and reliable in Airtable / Sheets



Scope



This role focuses on execution and control of inventory flow within Europe. The following are handled in a separate role and are not part of this position:



— Supplier communication in China

— Procurement / purchasing

— Long-term demand forecasting



What we expect each week



— Which SKUs are at risk of going out of stock

— Which shipments are delayed or at risk

— What actions were taken to resolve issues

— A clear plan for the week ahead



Who you are



You are proactive and fast. You think in stock and flow, not tasks. You take ownership of problems and you don't wait to be asked to fix them.



If a product goes out of stock, you own it.

title: Business Development Representative (BDR)
